It's not her fault, $(l.name). I've heard of this before... I think Fizz's been fitted with a neuroimplant. It rewires the brain to react positively to high-stress situations.

People who have these implants don't break under torture or run away from a fight - they enjoy it too much.
56156cc0306364981c00349a_44.spoken: It's not her fault. I've heard of this before... I think Fizz's been fitted with a neuroimplant. It rewires the brain to react positively to high-stress situations. People who have these implants don't break under torture or run away from a fight - they enjoy it too much.

561d66de306364f42300703c_10.spoken: You heard the man, lady. If you want us to leave, you're out of luck. We're deep in a corporate black laboratory, and we shot the place up on our way in. What makes you think that we're gonna stop now?

562fbdf96436617803006bc6_37.original:
{{GM}}Is0bel leans in and lowers her voice to a whisper.{{/GM}}

Hey, uh, $(l.name)...? This guy has no idea what you're talking about.
562fbdf96436617803006bc6_37.spoken: Hey, uh...? This guy has no idea what you're talking about.

563a7eb8306364fc140006b9_91.original:
{{GM}}Is0bel nods thoughtfully, and addresses the guard.{{/GM}}

It's a good thing we're all *friends* here, lady. I've seen this $(l.man) rip the horns off a troll with $(l.hisher) bare hands.
563a7eb8306364fc140006b9_91.spoken: It's a good thing we're all *friends* here, lady. I've seen this man rip the horns off a troll with their bare hands.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_7.original:
Sounds like a plan to me.

Lead on, $(l.name). I'll be right behind you.
5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_7.spoken: Sounds like a plan to me. Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_29.original: Lead on, $(l.name). I'll be right behind you.
5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_29.spoken: Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_35.original:
Let's hope you're right about that.

Lead on, $(l.name). I'll be right behind you.
5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_35.spoken: Let's hope you're right about that. Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

565370f6626632d423006c5d_2.original:
I guess that this is it. Whatever evidence Qiu and Lam are looking for, it's gotta be in there.

Go on, $(l.name). Search for something.
565370f6626632d423006c5d_2.spoken: I guess that this is it. Whatever evidence Qiu and Lam are looking for, it's gotta be in there. Go on. Search for something.

565370f6626632d423006c5d_21.original:
Open your eyes. There *is* no other terminal. This is it, and it's blank!

We've gotta cut and run, $(l.name). And we need to do it *now.*
565370f6626632d423006c5d_21.spoken: Open your eyes. There *is* no other terminal. This is it, and it's blank! We've gotta cut and run. And we need to do it *now.*

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_44.original:
For what it's worth, $(l.name), I hope that you do change your mind. Teams like this don't come along every day. But it's your decision.

Maybe you could tell Qiu to restore Gun Show's SIN and leave yours burnt, or something. But none of this will matter if we don't complete the job, so that needs to be our focus.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_44.spoken: For what it's worth, I hope that you do change your mind. Teams like this don't come along every day. But it's your decision. Maybe you could tell Qiu to restore Gun Show's SIN and leave yours burnt, or something. But none of this will matter if we don't complete the job, so that needs to be our focus.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_47.original: Calm down, Gun Show. There might be another way. Hell, maybe $(l.name) can request that Qiu restore your SIN, but not $(l.his). We don't know.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_47.spoken: Calm down, Gun Show. There might be another way. Hell, maybe the boss can request that Qiu restore your SIN, but not their own. We don't know.

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_12.original: Enjoy it, Gun Show. You too, $(l.name).
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_12.spoken: Enjoy it, Gun Show. You too.

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_23.original:
$+(l.he) can't, Duncan. Not if $(l.he) wants the team to survive.

I get where you're coming from, but you're being selfish. The needs of the team comes first.
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_23.spoken: they can't, Duncan. Not if they wants the team to survive. I get where you're coming from, but you're being selfish. The needs of the team comes first.

566f17b1643661780f00432b_6.original:
I'm glad that you're doing what Kindly wants, $(story.Global_Gobbet_Nickname)... but, I mean, you didn't have to *kill* her.

She could be kind of a bitch, yeah, but...
566f17b1643661780f00432b_6.spoken: I'm glad that you're doing what Kindly wants, Seattle... but, I mean, you didn't have to *kill* her. She could be kind of a bitch, yeah, but...

566f69ef6436613815007c49_11.spoken: Don't blame yourself. You're cut out for this life and he isn't. And the inverse is true - he had a normal life. You never did. What were you gonna do, go be a clerk in a Stuffer Shack? Sell tasers at WeaponsWorld? Yeah, I can't really see it.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_19.original: Uh, Jomo... the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) isn't seaworthy. She's like a sieve with a rudder.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_19.spoken: Uh, Jomo... the Bolthole isn't seaworthy. She's like a sieve with a rudder.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_26.original:
So what are you going to do?

You should at least let us take you back to the Benteng so that you can get your stuff. I mean, it's all still on-board the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName).
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_26.spoken: So what are you going to do? You should at least let us take you back to the Benteng so that you can get your stuff. I mean, it's all still on-board the Bolthole.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_54.original:
You did have a choice, $(l.name). You could've chosen your adoptive family over your team, but you didn't.

For what it's worth, I'm glad that you chose to stick with us. And if Gun Show has an issue with that, then he can take it up with all of us... we've got your back.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_54.spoken: You did have a choice. You could've chosen your adoptive family over your team, but you didn't. For what it's worth, I'm glad that you chose to stick with us. And if Gun Show has an issue with that, then he can take it up with all of us... we've got your back.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_133.original:
This is it, $(l.name). This is where we part ways.

When your medevac transport gets here, enjoy the flight. We won't be seeing each other again.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_133.spoken: This is it. This is where we part ways. When your medevac transport gets here, enjoy the flight. We won't be seeing each other again.

54b99b13306364e41b000280_16.original:
{{GM}}As you pass by the guard and into the party, Duncan whispers at you under his breath. His voice is heavy with amazement.{{/GM}}

I don't know what just happened, $(l.name)... but it was incredible.
54b99b13306364e41b000280_16.spoken: I don't know what just happened... but it was incredible.

54c007ae306364f4160019ce_2.original: What is wrong with you, $(l.man)?! D'you usually dip into people's wine collections while illegally searching their houses?
54c007ae306364f4160019ce_2.spoken: What is wrong with you, man?! D'you usually dip into people's wine collections while illegally searching their houses?

54c007ae306364f4160019ce_3.spoken: I don't give a damn how it looks. We break into an apartment, and you dribble your DNA all over the booze locker! I swear, it's like you're allergic to common sense.

54c007ae306364f4160019ce_5.original:
{{GM}}Duncan pulls an alcohol swab from his belt pouch and wipes off the mouth of the decanter, mumbling angrily to himself. He shakes his head.{{/GM}}

I swear, $(l.name). Sometimes...

54c2c193323437f024003921_19.spoken: I don't believe it. This is saying there's an APB out on us. You and me both.

54c2c193323437f024003921_64.original:
{{GM}}Wu gives you his "don't be an idiot" voice.{{/GM}}

With what resources? We don't know anybody in this country, $(l.firstname). We have no network here.
54c2c193323437f024003921_64.spoken: With what resources? We don't know anybody in this country. We have no network here.

54c696f3303031301d005190_54.original:
{{GM}}You can hear Wu's teeth grind.{{/GM}}

Raymond didn't *do* drugs, $(l.firstname).

54c696f3303031301d005190_139.original:
{{GM}}Wu pulls himself up to his full height.{{/GM}}

Yeah, well I had something going in Seattle, $(l.firstname). I had my license. I was going freelance. Found a storefront in Bellevue where Carter and I were gonna set up shop.
54c696f3303031301d005190_139.spoken: Yeah, well I had something going in Seattle. I had my license. I was going freelance. Found a storefront in Bellevue where Carter and I were gonna set up shop.

54c696f3303031301d005190_141.original:
{{GM}}Wu pulls himself up to his full height.{{/GM}}

There's only one way out of this, $(l.firstname), and that's *through* it.
54c696f3303031301d005190_141.spoken: There's only one way out of this, and that's *through* it.

54c696f3303031301d005190_183.original: Let's go, $(l.firstname). I'm beat to hell.
54c696f3303031301d005190_183.spoken: Let's go. I'm beat to hell.

54c696f3303031301d005190_187.original: I don't think so. I don't think I'm gonna be okay for a long time, $(l.firstname).
54c696f3303031301d005190_187.spoken: I don't think so. I don't think I'm gonna be okay for a long time.

54c696f3303031301d005190_321.spoken: No matter who you choose to help you snatch this guy, *I'm* gonna be there when you extract the information from him about Raymond. You got it?

54cfdf5b306364a06a008577_4.original:
I'm kinda out of my element here, $(l.name). I'm not much of a party person.

How do you wanna handle this? Check the apartment first?
54cfdf5b306364a06a008577_4.spoken: I'm kinda out of my element here. I'm not much of a party person. How do you wanna handle this? Check the apartment first?

54cff281303031f808007fca_31.original:
{{GM}}Duncan gives you a sidelong glance. Growls out an answer.{{/GM}}

$+(l.he)'ll behave $(l.him)self. Won't you, $(l.firstname)?

54d00020306364a06a008a84_17.original:
That was a waste of time. Ma's computer was squeaky clean - no incriminating evidence, nothing.

Nobody's that clean, $(l.name). He's probably paying someone to cover his tracks for him.
54d00020306364a06a008a84_17.spoken: That was a waste of time. Ma's computer was squeaky clean - no incriminating evidence, nothing. Nobody's that clean. He's probably paying someone to cover his tracks for him.

54d01ac6303031f808008051_3.spoken: Oh my god... Are you fucking kidding me?

54d01ac6303031f808008051_17.spoken: Of course I still need Raymond! He's my *father*, don't you get it? Did you *ever* get it? Look at what he did for me. Did for *us!* Think of everything he taught us. You want me to forget that?

54d01ac6303031f808008051_35.original:
Don't patronize me, $(l.firstname).

{{GM}}He steps back, sucking in a deep breath.{{/GM}}

54d01ac6303031f808008051_40.original:
Because we're gonna BURN OUR SINs, $(l.firstname). 

Jesus Christ, do you get what that *means?* 

The moment we do that, we're dead. To all the world, we're dead. We're wiped clean.
54d01ac6303031f808008051_40.spoken: Because we're gonna BURN OUR SINs. Jesus Christ, do you get what that *means?* The moment we do that, we're dead. To all the world, we're dead. We're wiped clean.

54d01ac6303031f808008051_45.original:
Put on your big boy pants? I've been wearing big boy pants for years. And who the fuck are *you* to tell me that after *all this time?*

{{GM}}Wu's neck cranes forward, his lower jaw thrust out ahead of him.{{/GM}}

You left me behind, $(l.firstname).

You left me *behind.*
54d01ac6303031f808008051_45.spoken: Put on your big boy pants? I've been wearing big boy pants for years. And who the fuck are *you* to tell me that after *all this time?* You left me behind. You left me *behind.*

54d01ac6303031f808008051_46.original:
You can't just *leave* like this, $(l.firstname)!

What am I gonna say to Raymond? You know how he is.
54d01ac6303031f808008051_46.spoken: You can't just *leave* like this! What am I gonna say to Raymond? You know how he is.

54d01ac6303031f808008051_51.original:
{{GM}}His eyes widen.{{/GM}}

A job that's too good to pass up? I thought... I thought we left that shit behind, $(l.firstname).
54d01ac6303031f808008051_51.spoken: A job that's too good to pass up? I thought... I thought we left that shit behind.

54d01ac6303031f808008051_52.original:
{{GM}}His eyes widen.{{/GM}}

I can't... I can't give you help like that anymore. I'm on a good path now, $(l.firstname). I can't afford to mess that up.
54d01ac6303031f808008051_52.spoken: I can't... I can't give you help like that anymore. I'm on a good path now. I can't afford to mess that up.

54d01ac6303031f808008051_53.original:
{{GM}}His eyes widen.{{/GM}}

A deal? I thought... I thought we left that shit behind, $(l.firstname).
54d01ac6303031f808008051_53.spoken: A deal? I thought... I thought we left that shit behind.

54d01ac6303031f808008051_54.spoken: I thought I knew all your friends. I don't like this. It sounds like... it sounds like the kind of shit we said we'd leave behind.

54d01ac6303031f808008051_55.spoken: Can't talk about it? I don't like this. It sounds like... it sounds like the kind of shit we said we'd leave behind.

54d01ac6303031f808008051_68.original:
Listen, $(l.firstname). Back in the Barrens. Whenever I was out of control, you just *handled* the situation. Remember?

With Carter gone... I'm just a raw nerve. I'm afraid I'm gonna slip back... and people are gonna start getting hurt again.
54d01ac6303031f808008051_68.spoken: Listen. Back in the Barrens. Whenever I was out of control, you just *handled* the situation. Remember? With Carter gone... I'm just a raw nerve. I'm afraid I'm gonna slip back... and people are gonna start getting hurt again.

54d01ac6303031f808008051_76.original: I got a feeling you're gonna be very, very wrong about that, $(l.firstname).
54d01ac6303031f808008051_76.spoken: I got a feeling you're gonna be very, very wrong about that.

54d3f034323437f057003738_10.original: I'd listen to $(l.him) if I were you. You turn us away, you might piss Cheng off enough for those soldiers to come knocking.
54d3f034323437f057003738_10.spoken: I'd listen to them if I were you. You turn us away, you might piss Cheng off enough for those soldiers to come knocking.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_6.original:
$+(l.he)'s right, Ray. I don't know what sort of justice you're looking for, but coming here alone... facing Qian Ya... 

I was wrong, little man. You're no coward.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_6.spoken: they's right, Ray. I don't know what sort of justice you're looking for, but coming here alone... facing Qian Ya... I was wrong, little man. You're no coward.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_20.original: Just bringing Ray up to speed on current events, $(l.firstname).
54d96ae73030316814006f45_20.spoken: Just bringing Ray up to speed on current events.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_38.original:
{{GM}}Wu watches the old man for a moment, without speaking. Then he shakes his head, confused.{{/GM}}

I don't know what to think about him anymore, $(l.firstname). I don't know what to think about any of this.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_38.spoken: I don't know what to think about him anymore. I don't know what to think about any of this.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_46.spoken: Uh, we just defeated a demon-queen. What more do you want? Long goddamn day. Feels good to stretch.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_49.original:
{{GM}}Wu spins his torso around, glares at you red-eyed.{{/GM}}

He's *not* dead, $(l.firstname)! Didn't you hear her? 

She's gonna *feast* on him. Torture him.

He's *worse* than dead. Way, way worse. He left us. And now he's gonna be tortured for a thousand years or some such shit.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_49.spoken: He's *not* dead! Didn't you hear her? She's gonna *feast* on him. Torture him. He's *worse* than dead. Way, way worse. He left us. And now he's gonna be tortured for a thousand years or some such shit.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_50.original:
{{GM}}Wu spins his torso around, glares at you red-eyed.{{/GM}}

What do you want me to say, $(l.firstname)? That he was *noble?* That he was *brave?*

Fuck that. He's gone. He left us. He lied to us, he hurt people, and then he left us. 

And now he's gonna be tortured for a thousand years or some such shit.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_50.spoken: What do you want me to say? That he was *noble?* That he was *brave?* Fuck that. He's gone. He left us. He lied to us, he hurt people, and then he left us. And now he's gonna be tortured for a thousand years or some such shit.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_51.original:
Stop!

{{GM}}Wu spins his torso around, glares at you red-eyed.{{/GM}}

What do you want me to say, $(l.firstname)? No, I am *not* okay, is that better?

Raymond is gone. He left us. He lied to us, he hurt people, and then he left us. His name wasn't even *Raymond!*

And now he's gonna be tortured for a thousand years, or some such shit.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_51.spoken: Stop! What do you want me to say? No, I am *not* okay, is that better? Raymond is gone. He left us. He lied to us, he hurt people, and then he left us. His name wasn't even *Raymond!* And now he's gonna be tortured for a thousand years, or some such shit.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_56.original:
I was wrong about Raymond, $(l.firstname). Really wrong.

{{GM}}He looks up at you again, his face drained of anger. Drained of frustration.{{/GM}}

Ray was no coward.

I could never have done what he did. Not in a million years.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_56.spoken: I was wrong about Raymond. Really wrong. Ray was no coward. I could never have done what he did. Not in a million years.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_71.original:
Tucking me in, $(l.firstname)? Are you my mom now? 

Replacement for Raymond?
54d96ae73030316814006f45_71.spoken: Tucking me in? Are you my mom now? Replacement for Raymond?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_72.original:
Tucking me in, $(l.firstname)? Are you my dad now?

Replacement for Raymond?
54d96ae73030316814006f45_72.spoken: Tucking me in? Are you my dad now? Replacement for Raymond?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_89.original:
I don't know, $(l.firstname). He was clearly obsessed with the Walled City and whatever prosperity is. He sounds like a sleepwalker trying to stumble his way through a dream or something. 

A sleepwalker who hires shadowrunners.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_89.spoken: I don't know. He was clearly obsessed with the Walled City and whatever prosperity is. He sounds like a sleepwalker trying to stumble his way through a dream or something. A sleepwalker who hires shadowrunners.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_95.original:
You know Raymond, $(l.firstname). He taught us what he wanted to teach us. Told us what he wanted us to know. Everything else was met with a wall of good-natured silence. 

He used to say, "You are the master of the unspoken word, Mr. Wu. Once it is out of your mouth, it is out of your control."
54d96ae73030316814006f45_95.spoken: You know Raymond. He taught us what he wanted to teach us. Told us what he wanted us to know. Everything else was met with a wall of good-natured silence. He used to say, "You are the master of the unspoken word, Mr. Wu. Once it is out of your mouth, it is out of your control."

54d96ae73030316814006f45_105.original: Be careful about taking the road to revenge, $(l.firstname). It usually ends at two grave sites.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_105.spoken: Be careful about taking the road to revenge. It usually ends at two grave sites.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_108.original:
Yeah, I guess that's true. Holy shit, $(l.firstname), you did some time.

{{GM}}He shakes his head.{{/GM}}

Well, I get that you have nothing back home, but this is all about Raymond for me. I need to understand what happened to him and who's responsible. 

I need justice.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_108.spoken: Yeah, I guess that's true. Holy shit, you did some time. Well, I get that you have nothing back home, but this is all about Raymond for me. I need to understand what happened to him and who's responsible. I need justice.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_110.original:
Be careful of taking the road to revenge, $(l.firstname). It usually ends at two grave sites.

I need to understand what happened to him and who's responsible. 

I need justice.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_110.spoken: Be careful of taking the road to revenge. It usually ends at two grave sites. I need to understand what happened to him and who's responsible. I need justice.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_136.original:
She's a Rat shaman, $(l.firstname). Of course she talks to rats. Remember that guy in the Barrens, JoeyD? Small time BTL guy - lived at the Royale Apartments? 

He had a Skunk shaman working guard duty for him. Covered him when he slept. Guess he figured that no matter what, the stink would wake him up.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_136.spoken: She's a Rat shaman. Of course she talks to rats. Remember that guy in the Barrens, JoeyD? Small time BTL guy - lived at the Royale Apartments? He had a Skunk shaman working guard duty for him. Covered him when he slept. Guess he figured that no matter what, the stink would wake him up.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_145.original:
They may look similar, but the Walled City *felt* different, $(l.firstname). Thick, heavy, and overwhelmed by... I don't know... wretchedness, I guess.

Whatever. It was the Walled City in my dream, for sure.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_145.spoken: They may look similar, but the Walled City *felt* different. Thick, heavy, and overwhelmed by... I don't know... wretchedness, I guess. Whatever. It was the Walled City in my dream, for sure.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_153.original:
Later's good. I wanna do some cardio, work off some steam. Then it's rack time for me.

You should do the same, $(l.firstname). A couple hundred pushups would do you good.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_153.spoken: Later's good. I wanna do some cardio, work off some steam. Then it's rack time for me. You should do the same. A couple hundred pushups would do you good.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_159.original:
{{GM}}You enter Wu's cabin to find him moving through some sort of stretching routine. His muscles ripple as he flows tranquilly from one pose to the next.{{/GM}}

You look different, $(l.firstname).

54d96ae73030316814006f45_173.original:
Come on, $(l.firstname), think. Of *course* you're a cog. *Everyone's a cog.* Whether you're working for them, consuming their crap, getting brainwashed by news media that they control, voting for the people that they put in front of you, or being policed by people that they own, you're a cog.

And you're the lowest kind of cog.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_173.spoken: Come on, think. Of *course* you're a cog. *Everyone's a cog.* Whether you're working for them, consuming their crap, getting brainwashed by news media that they control, voting for the people that they put in front of you, or being policed by people that they own, you're a cog. And you're the lowest kind of cog.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_185.spoken: That isn't gonna happen. I mean, I told you *one time* I was thinking about it when I was *thirteen!* Let it go. I'm not gonna pollute my body with that shit.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_193.original:
It's funny how people remember things. Yeah, when we squatted together and later, when we were living with Ray, I was still a violent son of a bitch, but basically under control. 

But that was *you,* $(l.name). You were the voice of reason. The brains.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_193.spoken: It's funny how people remember things. Yeah, when we squatted together and later, when we were living with Ray, I was still a violent son of a bitch, but basically under control. But that was you. You were the voice of reason. The brains.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_209.original:
Man, I wish you'd put that a different way, $(l.firstname), but I get what you're saying. I don't wanna be anyone's attack dog anymore. 

{{GM}}Wu folds his arms across his chest and nods to himself, satisfied.{{/GM}}
54d96ae73030316814006f45_209.spoken: Man, I wish you'd put that a different way, but I get what you're saying. I don't wanna be anyone's attack dog anymore.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_222.original: That least of all. We're not exactly talking about an idyllic youth here, $(l.firstname). Still, it was better than being on the streets.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_222.spoken: That least of all. We're not exactly talking about an idyllic youth here. Still, it was better than being on the streets.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_225.original: Oh. The dark times. We're not exactly talking about an idyllic youth here, $(l.firstname).
54d96ae73030316814006f45_225.spoken: Oh. The dark times. We're not exactly talking about an idyllic youth here.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_239.original:
Did I say that? No.

There's a difference between "I don't feel like talking right now" and "never speak to me again," $(l.firstname). It's subtle, but I think that you can find it if you try.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_239.spoken: Did I say that? No. There's a difference between "I don't feel like talking right now" and "never speak to me again." It's subtle, but I think that you can find it if you try.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_241.spoken: You can say that again. Oh, and... good talk. I'll catch up with you later.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_242.original:
Thanks. I'll bask in it.

Oh, and... good talk, $(l.firstname). I'll catch up with you later.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_242.spoken: Thanks. I'll bask in it. Oh, and... good talk. I'll catch up with you later.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_257.original:
Damn right. And so am I. 

{{GM}}He picks up an ammo box and begins using it like a dumbbell.{{/GM}}

You seem like a natural at leading this crew, $(l.firstname). But I still don't completely understand. 

What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?
54d96ae73030316814006f45_257.spoken: Damn right. And so am I. You seem like a natural at leading this crew. But I still don't completely understand. What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_258.original:
Damn right.

{{GM}}He picks up an ammo box and begins using it like a dumbbell.{{/GM}}

You seem like a natural at leading this crew, $(l.firstname). But I still don't completely understand. 

What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?
54d96ae73030316814006f45_258.spoken: Damn right. You seem like a natural at leading this crew. But I still don't completely understand. What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_259.original:
If I'm right and he's alive, we'll be the ones to get him *out of it.*

{{GM}}He picks up an ammo box and begins using it like a dumbbell.{{/GM}}

You seem like a natural at leading this crew, $(l.firstname). But I still don't completely understand. 

What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?
54d96ae73030316814006f45_259.spoken: If I'm right and he's alive, we'll be the ones to get him *out of it.* You seem like a natural at leading this crew. But I still don't completely understand. What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_261.spoken: Regardless, you're good at running this crew. But I still don't completely understand. What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_271.spoken: By the way, I gotta tell you - you're good at running this crew. But there's something I still don't completely understand. What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_272.original:
Well, I gotta tell you - you're good at running this crew, $(l.firstname). 

But there's something I still don't completely understand. 

{{GM}}He picks up an ammo box and begins using it like a dumbbell.{{/GM}}

What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?
54d96ae73030316814006f45_272.spoken: Well, I gotta tell you - you're good at running this crew. But there's something I still don't completely understand. What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_273.original:
Yeah? I'm not convinced. 

You're different, $(l.firstname). You've grown. And you're good at running this crew, too. But there's something I still don't completely understand. 

{{GM}}He picks up an ammo box and begins using it like a dumbbell.{{/GM}}

What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?
54d96ae73030316814006f45_273.spoken: Yeah? I'm not convinced. You're different. You've grown. And you're good at running this crew, too. But there's something I still don't completely understand. What do you get out of being a shadowrunner?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_288.spoken: That's what Carter used to say. Not this time. This time, the old Duncan is coming out to play.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_291.original:
Of course, we. What did I say?

No, it's us, $(l.firstname). There's no way I could figure out what's going on without you.

Besides, I want you there when the old Duncan comes out to play.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_291.spoken: Of course, we. What did I say? No, it's us. There's no way I could figure out what's going on without you. Besides, I want you there when the old Duncan comes out to play.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_292.original:
Don't patronize me, $(l.firstname). The woman hurt us. Hurt me.

Now the old Duncan is coming out to play.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_292.spoken: Don't patronize me. The woman hurt us. Hurt me. Now the old Duncan is coming out to play.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_293.original:
Try not to lecture me, $(l.firstname). And this isn't me being fixated. I'm *focused.*

You heard Kindly Cheng. The woman is ruthless. And we have our *own* evidence of that, don't we? She hurt us. Hurt me.

Now the old Duncan is coming out to play.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_293.spoken: Try not to lecture me. And this isn't me being fixated. I'm *focused.* You heard Kindly Cheng. The woman is ruthless. And we have our *own* evidence of that, don't we? She hurt us. Hurt me. Now the old Duncan is coming out to play.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_298.original:
Think about it, $(l.firstname)! They'll never see it coming.

This is the way to go. My way.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_298.spoken: Think about it! They'll never see it coming. This is the way to go. My way.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_312.original:
Yeah. I'm getting that feeling, too.

Anyway, have a good night, $(l.firstname). I'll catch you tomorrow.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_312.spoken: Yeah. I'm getting that feeling, too. Anyway, have a good night. I'll catch you tomorrow.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_313.original:
Y'know what? I'd rather not. I've put enough people away to know what it's like on the inside.

Anyway, have a good night, $(l.firstname). I'll catch you tomorrow.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_313.spoken: Y'know what? I'd rather not. I've put enough people away to know what it's like on the inside. Anyway, have a good night. I'll catch you tomorrow.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_324.original:
Not right now, $(l.firstname). I don't want to talk about our last run or the Walled City or the triads or anything else.

I just gotta think. Work through this.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_324.spoken: Not right now. I don't want to talk about our last run or the Walled City or the triads or anything else. I just gotta think. Work through this.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_325.original:
That's not the way it works with me, $(l.firstname). You know that. I can't avoid thinking about stuff when it gets lodged in my head.

I just gotta think. Work through this.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_325.spoken: That's not the way it works with me. You know that. I can't avoid thinking about stuff when it gets lodged in my head. I just gotta think. Work through this.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_367.original:
I don't want to talk about that right now, $(l.firstname).

I've got enough on my mind as it is. Stuff like my father betraying my trust.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_367.spoken: I don't want to talk about that right now. I've got enough on my mind as it is. Stuff like my father betraying my trust.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_368.spoken: Especially that last time. The week you left. I don't want to talk anymore. I've got enough on my mind as it is. Stuff like my father betraying my trust.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_378.original:
Do you *see* a porthole, $(l.firstname)? This is an interior cabin. Not the best for ventilation.

But I don't think you came by to check on my hygiene.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_378.spoken: Do you *see* a porthole? This is an interior cabin. Not the best for ventilation. But I don't think you came by to check on my hygiene.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_384.spoken: I know. I haven't stopped thinking about him since we first saw him in that video. The one where he attacked Raymond in the teahouse. Listen, I'm not gonna press you to take me with you when you head out to snatch him.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_386.original: Fuck you, $(l.firstname). You can take me with you on the run or not - your call. But I intend to be there for the fun part.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_386.spoken: Fuck you. You can take me with you on the run or not - your call. But I intend to be there for the fun part.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_393.spoken: Knock off the "Easy, Duncan" crap. I'm not doing anything for "kicks." This is the guy who knows what the hell is going on. The one who may have killed Raymond. And I'm gonna squeeze him until I find out what he knows.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_435.original:
Hey, $(l.firstname). I got some things I gotta take care of here. 

Let's talk later.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_435.spoken: Hey. I got some things I gotta take care of here. Let's talk later.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_436.original:
I'm gonna exercise a bit, $(l.firstname). Helps me clear my head. 

Come back later and we'll talk.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_436.spoken: I'm gonna exercise a bit. Helps me clear my head. Come back later and we'll talk.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_437.original:
Bad timing, $(l.firstname). I think I ate something that was... off. Still can't get used to the food here.

Come back later when my digestive system's more agreeable.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_437.spoken: Bad timing. I think I ate something that was... off. Still can't get used to the food here. Come back later when my digestive system's more agreeable.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_439.original:
Hey, $(l.firstname). I got some things I gotta take care of here. 

Let's talk later.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_439.spoken: Hey. I got some things I gotta take care of here. Let's talk later.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_441.original:
I don't know, $(l.firstname). I've had enough of ghouls for one lifetime. The Barrens were full of 'em.

Remember what the 162s did to that Aztlaner family that lived by the old Town Center? Remember how we *found* them?
54d96ae73030316814006f45_441.spoken: I don't know. I've had enough of ghouls for one lifetime. The Barrens were full of 'em. Remember what the 162s did to that Aztlaner family that lived by the old Town Center? Remember how we *found* them?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_442.spoken: Yeah. Made my stomach turn. Nobody deserves to go out like that. I dunno. I don't think I'll ever get comfortable with having a ghoul on our crew.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_443.spoken: Yeah, but still. Nobody deserves to go out like *that.* I dunno... I don't think I'll ever get comfortable with having a ghoul on our crew.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_447.spoken: Can't. I've been having nightmares about it since I was a kid. Still makes my skin crawl. I dunno... I don't think I'll ever get comfortable with having a ghoul on our crew.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_452.original:
I didn't know that shadowrunners dealt with crap like this.

Can't say I'm a fan, $(l.firstname). Not even a little bit.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_452.spoken: I didn't know that shadowrunners dealt with crap like this. Can't say I'm a fan. Not even a little bit.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_459.original:
{{GM}}He shakes his head.{{/GM}}

I dunno, $(l.firstname). I guess that I just preferred the simplicity of being a cop.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_459.spoken: I dunno. I guess that I just preferred the simplicity of being a cop.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_461.spoken: We killed the vampire, so that's something. But we didn't get the Wong girl fired, and that was kind of the point of the run. I dunno. I guess that I just preferred the simplicity of being a cop.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_467.original:
...Anyway. In all seriousness, it went about as well as I can imagine any run going. We got Talon out of the way, and that's good - don't need a bad son of a bitch like that coming back after us later.

I dunno, $(l.firstname). Doesn't always feel right taking people out like that, but it definitely feels like the *smart* thing to do.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_467.spoken: ...Anyway. In all seriousness, it went about as well as I can imagine any run going. We got Talon out of the way, and that's good - don't need a bad son of a bitch like that coming back after us later. I dunno. Doesn't always feel right taking people out like that, but it definitely feels like the *smart* thing to do.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_470.original:
So I guess we're vandals-for-hire now? Renting ourselves out to tip people's tables and scrawl graffiti on their walls?

I dunno, $(l.firstname). Feels like bush-league Barrens ganger crap to me. The kind of stuff that we outgrew when we were eight.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_470.spoken: So I guess we're vandals-for-hire now? Renting ourselves out to tip people's tables and scrawl graffiti on their walls? I dunno. Feels like bush-league Barrens ganger crap to me. The kind of stuff that we outgrew when we were eight.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_475.original:
That's right, it isn't. I need my personal space.

Gotta keep that work-life balance in place, $(l.firstname).
54d96ae73030316814006f45_475.spoken: That's right, it isn't. I need my personal space. Gotta keep that work-life balance in place.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_491.original:
Oh, come on, $(l.firstname). If she hadn't dropped the ball, none of this would have happened.

I won't say that to her in person, of course. But this is on her, not us.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_491.spoken: Oh, come on. If she hadn't dropped the ball, none of this would have happened. I won't say that to her in person, of course. But this is on her, not us.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_492.original:
I don't even know what to say about that, $(l.firstname).

You remember when we were kids, how we'd argue over who'd win in a fight? The Halloweeners versus Tamanous, the Ghosts of Tir Tairngire versus Ares Firewatch.

In our minds, the Renraku Red Samurai always came out on top. And now we've taken out a squad of them.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_492.spoken: I don't even know what to say about that. You remember when we were kids, how we'd argue over who'd win in a fight? The Halloweeners versus Tamanous, the Ghosts of Tir Tairngire versus Ares Firewatch. In our minds, the Renraku Red Samurai always came out on top. And now we've taken out a squad of them.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_498.original:
Anyway, we got Is0bel her software... or encryption key... or whatever the hell it was that she wanted.

I dunno, $(l.firstname). Somehow, I came out of this feeling like a neighborhood bully shaking down a skinny kid for his lunch. But if it can help us, well... whatever.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_498.spoken: Anyway, we got Is0bel her software... or encryption key... or whatever the hell it was that she wanted. I dunno. Somehow, I came out of this feeling like a neighborhood bully shaking down a skinny kid for his lunch. But if it can help us, well... whatever.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_500.original:
{{GM}}He looks at his boots for a minute, making a decision.{{/GM}}

Hey... listen, $(l.firstname). I didn't disagree with you in front of the crew but I wouldn't have let that guy just walk away like that.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_500.spoken: Hey... listen. I didn't disagree with you in front of the crew but I wouldn't have let that guy just walk away like that.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_505.spoken: No. You're doing just fine. I'm just telling you what I think - privately. I'll get off it now. Just one more thing - that guy took Raymond. For that alone, I'd drill him.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_507.spoken: That's what we've *been* doing. Seems like all that we do. Just one more thing - that guy took Raymond. For that alone, I'd drill him.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_511.spoken: Been a long time since we ran the streets together. Lived in a squat. I wanna say that if feels like old times, but it doesn't. This is different.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_517.spoken: We got the job done. Thanks for including me on the rescue team. Glad I was there when he woke up. It was a relief to see he had his memories intact. I'm worried about him, though. That way he's talking... it's not good... that stuttering or whatever it is.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_520.original:
Yeah, tell me about it.

{{GM}}Wu drops a gnarly hand on your shoulder.{{/GM}}

Well, regardless of Raymond or Edward or whoever he is, I'll follow your lead, $(l.firstname). 

Best I can commit to.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_520.spoken: Yeah, tell me about it. Well, regardless of Raymond or Edward or whoever he is, I'll follow your lead. Best I can commit to.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_522.original:
What happened to "He's the only father you've got"? The same applies to you, doesn't it?

I'm not just gonna abandon him, $(l.firstname), regardless of what he's done. Raymond's done a lot for us and I'll never forget it. 

I said that he's got a lot to answer for and I mean it. I'm holding his feet to the fire when this is over. But you were right - he's the only father we have and until it *is* over, I will do everything I can to help him.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_522.spoken: What happened to "He's the only father you've got"? The same applies to you, doesn't it? I'm not just gonna abandon him, regardless of what he's done. Raymond's done a lot for us and I'll never forget it. I said that he's got a lot to answer for and I mean it. I'm holding his feet to the fire when this is over. But you were right - he's the only father we have and until it *is* over, I will do everything I can to help him.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_523.original:
Don't try and manipulate me, $(l.firstname). It isn't cool.

Nevertheless, we agree.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_523.spoken: Don't try and manipulate me. It isn't cool. Nevertheless, we agree.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_526.original: Don't be stubborn like Raymond, $(l.firstname). Let's just play this out. See where it leads.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_526.spoken: Don't be stubborn like Raymond. Let's just play this out. See where it leads.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_532.original:
I thought you might be. Well, regardless of Raymond or Edward or whoever he is, we've got to play this out. 

I'll follow your lead, $(l.firstname). Try and correct the old man's mistake. And after that, we'll be done with him.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_532.spoken: I thought you might be. Well, regardless of Raymond or Edward or whoever he is, we've got to play this out. I'll follow your lead. Try and correct the old man's mistake. And after that, we'll be done with him.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_539.spoken: Yeah, I dig it. You have my word.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_540.spoken: Understood. I'll do what I gotta do. But if we've gotta do... something drastic... I hope we'll be able to talk about it first. I don't want to have the wrong on my conscience for the rest of my life

54d96ae73030316814006f45_542.original: Wasn't on the last run, $(l.firstname). I assume it came out okay since you're here to ask about it.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_542.spoken: Wasn't on the last run. I assume it came out okay since you're here to ask about it.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_545.original: I sat that one out, remember $(l.firstname)?
54d96ae73030316814006f45_545.spoken: I sat that one out, remember?

54d96ae73030316814006f45_548.spoken: Wasn't on the last run. Just stuck around the boat and waited to hear if you got killed or not.

54da8fd0323437d884007acf_0.original:
Those guards are still out there, $(l.name)... the same guards that Kindly doesn't want us killing.

We should probably go out the way that we came in.
54da8fd0323437d884007acf_0.spoken: Those guards are still out there... the same guards that Kindly doesn't want us killing. We should probably go out the way that we came in.

54dbef30653937cc15006dd1_11.original: Hey $(l.name), these guys are right on the edge. Both blasted, one pissed off, the other... well an asshole.
54dbef30653937cc15006dd1_11.spoken: Hey, these guys are right on the edge. Both blasted, one pissed off, the other... well an asshole.

54e26a883063641415004409_52.original:
{{GM}}Wu whips his head back, fixing you with an incredulous look.{{/GM}}

Come on, $(l.name)! You recognize that place, right? That's right outside the Jackal's Lantern. Any corp suit would be eaten for lunch if he was out there! But he looks like he fits right in.
54e26a883063641415004409_52.spoken: Come on! You recognize that place, right? That's right outside the Jackal's Lantern. Any corp suit would be eaten for lunch if he was out there! But he looks like he fits right in.

54e6531030636444140071ff_8.original: Careful doesn't even cover it, $(l.firstname). Careful is what you are if you drop a beer bottle. What we have to be is perfect, if we want to get out of this alive. No slips, no mistakes, every shot a hit.
54e6531030636444140071ff_8.spoken: Careful doesn't even cover it. Careful is what you are if you drop a beer bottle. What we have to be is perfect, if we want to get out of this alive. No slips, no mistakes, every shot a hit.

54e6531030636444140071ff_26.original:
You think that's a good idea, $(l.name)? Think about it: what Hwang said made a lot of sense. Maybe he's lying, maybe he's not...

It's your call, but if we mess this up, we're gonna be bullet traps in a firing range.
54e6531030636444140071ff_26.spoken: You think that's a good idea? Think about it: what Hwang said made a lot of sense. Maybe he's lying, maybe he's not... It's your call, but if we mess this up, we're gonna be bullet traps in a firing range.

54e6531030636444140071ff_41.spoken: I hate backing out on a job... But I hate being double crossed even more. What's the play?

54e6531030636444140071ff_77.original: Careful doesn't even cover it, $(l.name). Careful is what you are if you drop a beer bottle. What we have to be is perfect, if we want to get out of this alive. No slips, no mistakes, every shot a hit.
54e6531030636444140071ff_77.spoken: Careful doesn't even cover it. Careful is what you are if you drop a beer bottle. What we have to be is perfect, if we want to get out of this alive. No slips, no mistakes, every shot a hit.

54ebb94f306364901b001373_6.original:
{{GM}}Wu gives a sharp intake of breath, rocking back on his heels.{{/GM}}

Tsunami's bad news, $(l.name). Top tier private military contractor - tanks, close air support, dedicated naval transport division. You name it, they have it. They're not the kind of muscle you hire on the cheap. They cost a lotta nuyen.
54ebb94f306364901b001373_6.spoken: Tsunami's bad news. Top tier private military contractor - tanks, close air support, dedicated naval transport division. You name it, they have it. They're not the kind of muscle you hire on the cheap. They cost a lotta nuyen.

54ecfca8343061e01b00108f_7.original: Still don't know why we don't cap this twig. He's no good, $(s.name). Just another gangster out here hurting people. Hong Kong would be better off without him.
54ecfca8343061e01b00108f_7.spoken: Still don't know why we don't cap this twig. He's no good. Just another gangster out here hurting people. Hong Kong would be better off without him.

54ecfca8343061e01b00108f_15.original: Still, $(l.name). I've got this nagging feeling that we could've done better. A lot better.
54ecfca8343061e01b00108f_15.spoken: Still. I've got this nagging feeling that we could've done better. A lot better.

54ff5820306364a01b004921_116.original:
I hear you, $(l.name), I really do. But if Ares finds out from them that we're the thieves, our frame job will never stick. The Yellow Lotus won't pay us.

And it gets worse. Once word gets out that we hung these people out to dry, nobody's going to trust us, and work will dry up. Hong Kong isn't Seattle - loyalty toward your fellows matters a hell of a lot here.
54ff5820306364a01b004921_116.spoken: I hear you, I really do. But if Ares finds out from them that we're the thieves, our frame job will never stick. The Yellow Lotus won't pay us. And it gets worse. Once word gets out that we hung these people out to dry, nobody's going to trust us, and work will dry up. Hong Kong isn't Seattle - loyalty toward your fellows matters a hell of a lot here.

54ff6324306364380e00491d_10.spoken: I just hope we can be gone before they realize we were ever here. I don't like the idea of Knight-Errant tracking us back to the Bolthole. The last thing we need is a bunch of armed soldiers coming to where we live.

550af5e63234375c2f0000a2_9.original:
In Cantonese, $(l.firstname). 

{{GM}}He sounds like Raymond when he does that.{{/GM}}

551ddc55323431e012004958_1.original:
Looks like we've battered this place enough, $(l.name). Just like our client wanted.

All that's left is to trash the temple's statue, and then we can leave.
551ddc55323431e012004958_1.spoken: Looks like we've battered this place enough. Just like our client wanted. All that's left is to trash the temple's statue, and then we can leave.

551ddc55323431e012004958_10.original: That's it, $(l.name). Job's done. Now let's book it before this place comes apart at the hinges.
551ddc55323431e012004958_10.spoken: That's it. Job's done. Now let's book it before this place comes apart at the hinges.

55269efc3063648c150026e6_1.original:
Hey, $(l.name)? I don't know a whole lot about science or all that, but I know what blood looks like when it hits a wall. This isn't natural.

Somebody deliberately smeared blood all over these walls. See how it looks like it's got paint trails? That's because somebody used Tong's parts like a brush.
55269efc3063648c150026e6_1.spoken: Hey? I don't know a whole lot about science or all that, but I know what blood looks like when it hits a wall. This isn't natural. Somebody deliberately smeared blood all over these walls. See how it looks like it's got paint trails? That's because somebody used Tong's parts like a brush.

552c087f306364900600298c_1.spoken: Look at this. These scratches look like they're from a long bladed weapon like a sword or machete.

552edd7a306364800e0071bd_7.original:
{{GM}}Wu shoots you a sidelong glance, tusks bared as he grits his jaw.{{/GM}}

Why the hell are we talking to this thing, $(l.name)? It's a goddamned ghoul, and you *know* what they're like.
552edd7a306364800e0071bd_7.spoken: Why the hell are we talking to this thing? It's a goddamned ghoul, and you *know* what they're like.

552edd7a306364800e0071bd_9.spoken: Really? You wanna crack jokes, you cannibal? You're the kind of monster that'd devour a family, just because it's convenient. Remember the 162s? He's just like them.
