Wait, hold that thought. We've gotta do something about the test subjects first. They didn't choose this fate - Shiawase made that decision for them.

So should we lock them up, or set them free? It's your call, $(l.name).
5604464e3063648823004d0d_39.spoken: Wait, hold that thought. We've gotta do something about the test subjects first. They didn't choose this fate - Shiawase made that decision for them. So should we lock them up, or set them free? It's your call.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_59.original: $(l.firstname), you're out! Thank God! They've had you locked away in there since we got here!
5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_59.spoken: you're out! Thank God! They've had you locked away in there since we got here!

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_122.spoken: you're out! Thank God! They've had you locked away in there since we got here! Looks... empty? The way that you were pounding on the door, I assumed that somebody was beating on you in there.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_125.spoken: you're out! Thank God! They've had you locked away in there since we got here! Looks... empty? The way that you were yelling, I assumed that somebody was beating on you in there.

56098865643661c8160012df_105.original:
There you go. Take your victories where you can find 'em.

So, $(l.firstname)... what's our plan now? Please tell me that you've got one.
56098865643661c8160012df_105.spoken: There you go. Take your victories where you can find 'em. So... what's our plan now? Please tell me that you've got one.

56098865643661c8160012df_109.original:
Obviously. They've made it pretty clear that they won't let us waltz out of here.

So, $(l.firstname)... what's our plan now? Please tell me that you've got one.
56098865643661c8160012df_109.spoken: Obviously. They've made it pretty clear that they won't let us waltz out of here. So... what's our plan now? Please tell me that you've got one.

560dd1eb643661700e0076a1_9.spoken: We could probably handle them, sure. Wouldn't want to chance having 'em radio for backup, though. You're calling the shots... I'll do whatever you say. Pang’s bar is right around the corner, though. I’d suggest that we just beeline it there.

560dd1eb643661700e0076a1_19.original: Right on your heels, $(l.name). Pang's bar should be just around the corner.
560dd1eb643661700e0076a1_19.spoken: Right on your heels. Pang's bar should be just around the corner.

560dd1eb643661700e0076a1_20.original: Right on your heels, $(l.name). Pang's bar should be just around the corner.
560dd1eb643661700e0076a1_20.spoken: Right on your heels. Pang's bar should be just around the corner.

560dd1eb643661700e0076a1_22.original:
This riot is the city's response to systemic police brutality, $(l.name). Something tells me that Krait's plan to "restore order" isn't gonna be gentle.

We don't wanna be out here when that call comes in.
560dd1eb643661700e0076a1_22.spoken: This riot is the city's response to systemic police brutality. Something tells me that Krait's plan to "restore order" isn't gonna be gentle. We don't wanna be out here when that call comes in.

561d66de306364f42300703c_6.spoken: You heard the man. We're in this up to our armpits already, and we've got no intention of turning back now. All that you're doing right now is pissing me off.

56218ac8306364fc18005d11_17.original:
{{GM}}Duncan suddenly lurches toward the window of the tram, cursing under his breath.{{/GM}}

You're not gonna like this, $(l.name)... but we're headed the wrong way.
56218ac8306364fc18005d11_17.spoken: You're not gonna like this... but we're headed the wrong way.

562fbdf96436617803006bc6_36.original:
{{GM}}Duncan growls into your ear.{{/GM}}

Wake up, $(l.firstname). This guy doesn't know what the fuck you're talking about.
562fbdf96436617803006bc6_36.spoken: Wake up. This guy doesn't know what the fuck you're talking about.

563a7eb8306364fc140006b9_87.spoken: Don't test them, lady. I've seen this man break tables in half with a kick - by accident. Thankfully, we're peaceful people... given the right motivation.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_5.original:
Sounds like a plan to me.

Lead on, $(l.firstname). I'll be right behind you.
5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_5.spoken: Sounds like a plan to me. Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_27.original: Lead on, $(l.firstname). I'll be right behind you.
5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_27.spoken: Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_33.original:
Let's hope you're right about that.

Lead on, $(l.firstname). I'll be right behind you.
5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_33.spoken: Let's hope you're right about that. Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

565370f6626632d423006c5d_19.original:
There *is* no other terminal. This is it, and it's blank!

We've gotta cut and run, $(l.firstname). And we need to do it *now.*
565370f6626632d423006c5d_19.spoken: There *is* no other terminal. This is it, and it's blank! We've gotta cut and run. And we need to do it *now.*

565370f6626632d423006c5d_52.original:
I guess that this is it. Whatever evidence Qiu and Lam are looking for, it's gotta be in there.

Go on, $(l.name). Search for something.
565370f6626632d423006c5d_52.spoken: I guess that this is it. Whatever evidence Qiu and Lam are looking for, it's gotta be in there. Go on. Search for something.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_32.spoken: We finish this thing, and we could go back to Seattle. We could see *Dad* again. Help him recover from what Jo Tsang did to him. Hell, I could be a cop again, and you could do... whatever you wanted to do before you got dragged into this whole mess!

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_46.spoken: If you take this from me... if you keep me from getting my life back... so help me, I'll--

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_49.original:
...Yeah. We can defer until later. But remember what I told you.

This is *important* to me, $(l.firstname).
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_49.spoken: ...Yeah. We can defer until later. But remember what I told you. This is *important* to me.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_95.original:
Might as well get to it, then, because we've got nothin'.

Oh, and $(l.firstname)? Hurry. These choppy waters are doing a number on my stomach, and I'm fresh out of Dramamine.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_95.spoken: Might as well get to it, then, because we've got nothin'. Oh, and hey? Hurry. These choppy waters are doing a number on my stomach, and I'm fresh out of Dramamine.

56621c5264366160130044e8_3.original:
{{GM}}Duncan frowns at the rusty gate.{{/GM}}

Yeah, $(l.firstname). It kinda does.

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_16.original:
Jesus, $(l.firstname), think about what you're saying... this is our one and only chance to get our lives back.

Please, reconsider this. I'm begging you.
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_16.spoken: Jesus, think about what you're saying... this is our one and only chance to get our lives back. Please, reconsider this. I'm begging you.

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_25.original: $(l.firstname)... think about what you're doing. I want my life back, damn it!
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_25.spoken: Come on... think about what you're doing. I want my life back, damn it!

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_36.original: $(l.firstname)... think about what you're doing. I want my life back, damn it!
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_36.spoken: Come on... think about what you're doing. I want my life back, damn it!

566f17b1643661780f00432b_1.original:
I can't believe that you did that. I can't fucking believe it.

We could've had our lives back, $(l.firstname). I could've seen Dad again.
566f17b1643661780f00432b_1.spoken: I can't believe that you did that. I can't fucking believe it. We could've had our lives back. I could've seen Dad again.

566f17b1643661780f00432b_11.original:
I can't believe that you did that. I can't fucking believe it.

We could've had our lives back, $(l.firstname).
566f17b1643661780f00432b_11.spoken: I can't believe that you did that. I can't fucking believe it. We could've had our lives back.

56787587626632bc06006fa0_13.spoken: Yeah. I will. Weren't you supposed to give him a call after we lifted off, by the way?

56787587626632bc06006fa0_25.spoken: Good. Now, if you'll excuse me, I'm gonna tune out for a while. You should do the same... take a load off. Enjoy yourself.

56787587626632bc06006fa0_29.original: I don't. You do whatever you need to do, $(l.firstname) - I won't try to stop you. But for God's sake, fucking *tell* me before you go running off into the night this time, okay?
56787587626632bc06006fa0_29.spoken: I don't. You do whatever you need to do - I won't try to stop you. But for God's sake, fucking tell me before you go running off into the night this time, okay?

569596123063640c1f006f01_4.spoken: No. No way. Just *look* at them in there - they're positioned all around the doorway! Look, I'm as big a fan of settling things nonviolently as the next guy, but trying to waltz in there peacefully isn't gonna work. Now get with the program... it's go time.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_4.spoken: You just sacrificed the only chance I was ever gonna get to lead a normal life. Fuck no, there's no room for discussion. I'm done with you. Permanently. If we didn't go back as far as we do, I'd put a bullet in your fuckin' spine.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_7.spoken: ...Yeah. All right. But *they* doesn't fuckin' talk to me on the trip.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_32.spoken: I'm done with you. Permanently. If we didn't go back as far as we do, I'd put a bullet in your fuckin' spine.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_33.spoken: Listen to me carefully. I'm done taking your orders, and I'm done with you. If we didn't go back as far as we do, I'd put a bullet in your fuckin' spine.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_34.spoken: You aren't listening, are you? I'm through with you. Done. If we didn't go back as far as we do, I'd put a bullet in your fuckin' spine.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_75.spoken: No. Can't say that I am. When you see Kindly Cheng, tell the old bitch that I've tendered my resignation.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_77.spoken: No. Can't say that I do. When you see Kindly Cheng, tell the old bitch that I've tendered my resignation.

54b99b13306364e41b000280_7.spoken: It's, uh... it is a pilot. We're shopping it to the networks. Talk to my agent. they can fill you in on the details.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_8.spoken: Be careful. Her aura is streaked with corruption - I can practically taste it. She is a vampire. These others are her pawns.

54bef3b9306364501c001580_39.original: ...And why would I do that, $(l.name)? I fail to understand.
54bef3b9306364501c001580_39.spoken: ...And why would I do that? I fail to understand.

54c696f3303031301d005190_227.original:
Yes, $(l.name). It is good to see you.

{{GM}}They both have expressions that say they'd rather be anywhere else.{{/GM}}
54c696f3303031301d005190_227.spoken: Yes. It is good to see you.

54cfdf5b306364a06a008577_1.original:
We should discuss our approach, $(l.name). 

I would recommend searching the apartment as our first course of action. I am somewhat... dubious about the idea of crashing the party. We ghouls are seldom welcome at such events.
54cfdf5b306364a06a008577_1.spoken: We should discuss our approach. I would recommend searching the apartment as our first course of action. I am somewhat... dubious about the idea of crashing the party. We ghouls are seldom welcome at such events.

54cfdf5b306364a06a008577_20.original:
I agree. For obvious reasons.

Lead on, $(l.name). We will follow.
54cfdf5b306364a06a008577_20.spoken: I agree. For obvious reasons. Lead on. We will follow.

54d00020306364a06a008a84_13.original:
Ma didn't say much of value when we talked to him, either.

You're going to have to search the apartment, $(l.name). Turn it upside down. There must be something in here we can use.
54d00020306364a06a008a84_13.spoken: Ma didn't say much of value when we talked to him, either. You're going to have to search the apartment. Turn it upside down. There must be something in here we can use.

54d96be03030316814006f7f_13.original: Some day, $(l.name). But not today. For now, let us rest and allow the mighty of Hong Kong to wrestle with each other.
54d96be03030316814006f7f_13.spoken: Some day. But not today. For now, let us rest and allow the mighty of Hong Kong to wrestle with each other.

54d96be03030316814006f7f_32.spoken: Welcome to my sanctuary. I apologize for the lack of light, but as I did not need it, Gobbet took the bulbs for use elsewhere. How can I be of assistance?

54d96be03030316814006f7f_117.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu is seated in the lotus position, eyes closed. His fingertips rest on a braille reader that is plugged into his PDA; the device fills the room with a soft clicking from the pin combinations. As you approach, he lifts his hands from the reader's surface.{{/GM}}

Hello again, $(l.name). Is there something I can assist you with?
54d96be03030316814006f7f_117.spoken: Hello again. Is there something I can assist you with?

54d96be03030316814006f7f_247.original:
Thank you, $(l.name). I am sorry I cannot talk about it now, but... I need to process the emotions. They are still raw.

I am tired. Come back later, and we can talk more.
54d96be03030316814006f7f_247.spoken: Thank you. I am sorry I cannot talk about it now, but... I need to process the emotions. They are still raw. I am tired. Come back later, and we can talk more.

54d96be03030316814006f7f_263.spoken: Hello. Pardon me for continuing my exercises. I feel that I have been letting them slip, of late.

54d96be03030316814006f7f_321.original:
Ahh. And you believe that absent that opposition, I would have little to define myself? 

That is very cheap philosophy, $(l.name), and unworthy of you.
54d96be03030316814006f7f_321.spoken: Ahh. And you believe that absent that opposition, I would have little to define myself? That is very cheap philosophy, and unworthy of you.

54d96be03030316814006f7f_331.original: I told you, my goal was to survive, not to destroy the team. Your insistence on not remembering things that I have told you can be tiresome, $(l.name).
54d96be03030316814006f7f_331.spoken: I told you, my goal was to survive, not to destroy the team. Your insistence on not remembering things that I have told you can be tiresome.

54d96be03030316814006f7f_351.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu blinks several times, his surprise evident.{{/GM}}

That is remarkably kind of you, $(l.name). Were this a year or more ago, I would not believe you. After having seen how you handled the Whampoans, however, I do.
54d96be03030316814006f7f_351.spoken: That is remarkably kind of you. Were this a year or more ago, I would not believe you. After having seen how you handled the Whampoans, however, I do.

54d96be03030316814006f7f_363.spoken: Please mind your step. I fear I have made a mess, and many of my possessions are quite delicate. I would be rather upset if you were to accidentally crush any under your feet. I apologize for the mess.

54d96be03030316814006f7f_401.spoken: Good evening. A fine evening, isn't it? What can I do for you?

54d96be03030316814006f7f_430.original: Welcome back. What can I do for you, $(l.name)?
54d96be03030316814006f7f_430.spoken: Welcome back. What can I do for you?

54d96be03030316814006f7f_433.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu does not open his eyes as you approach, but simply continues to meditate.{{/GM}}

Come back another time, $(l.name). I am still pondering our last conversation.
54d96be03030316814006f7f_433.spoken: Come back another time. I am still pondering our last conversation.

54d96be03030316814006f7f_435.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu is rummaging through his box of mementos, searching for a particular object by touch alone.{{/GM}}

Could we speak later, $(l.name)? I am feeling a little distracted at the moment.
54d96be03030316814006f7f_435.spoken: Could we speak later? I am feeling a little distracted at the moment.

54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_19.original:
I am unfond of suprises, $(l.name). This is a surprise of a significant sort. 

I don't doubt we are capable of killing any Seoulpa resistance, but I would recommend caution all the same.
54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_19.spoken: I am unfond of suprises. This is a surprise of a significant sort. I don't doubt we are capable of killing any Seoulpa resistance, but I would recommend caution all the same.

54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_33.original:
He meant his threats, $(l.name). He obscured his voice, but he spoke with a great deal of precision. That is the hallmark of someone who is capable of a great deal of violence without any remorse.

{{GM}}Gaichu slowly curls one corner of his mouth upward into a wry grin.{{/GM}}
54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_33.spoken: He meant his threats. He obscured his voice, but he spoke with a great deal of precision. That is the hallmark of someone who is capable of a great deal of violence without any remorse.

54da5dc6306364a88e0035ea_9.original: I can hear no sounds to indicate they're aware of us, $(l.name). Gunfire belowdecks will surely alert them, however. We should be careful, lest we tip our hand.
54da5dc6306364a88e0035ea_9.spoken: I can hear no sounds to indicate they're aware of us. Gunfire belowdecks will surely alert them, however. We should be careful, lest we tip our hand.

54e6531030636444140071ff_1.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu adjusts his sword, drawing it a few inches from the scabbard to check the edge. He slides it back in, apparently satisfied.{{/GM}}

We should tread lightly in Ho Chung, $(l.name). It's certain that our mystery caller will attempt to ambush us before or during the hand-off with Wright.
54e6531030636444140071ff_1.spoken: We should tread lightly in Ho Chung. It's certain that our mystery caller will attempt to ambush us before or during the hand-off with Wright.

54e6531030636444140071ff_54.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu clicks his tongue a few times, tasting the stale air of the MTR station.{{/GM}}

Tell me, $(l.name), do you believe that dealing with Hwang is wise? Men of his organization are not known for their honesty.
54e6531030636444140071ff_54.spoken: Tell me, do you believe that dealing with Hwang is wise? Men of his organization are not known for their honesty.

54e6531030636444140071ff_70.original: We need to tread lightly here, $(l.name). It's certain that our caller will try to ambush us before or during the hand-off with Wright.
54e6531030636444140071ff_70.spoken: We need to tread lightly here. It's certain that our caller will try to ambush us before or during the hand-off with Wright.

54f6285b306364140400187c_1.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu shrugs, and turns his face vaguely in your direction.{{/GM}}

I deeply regret that you cannot take me anywhere, $(l.name). These sorts of scenes become so tiresome after a while.
54f6285b306364140400187c_1.spoken: I deeply regret that you cannot take me anywhere. These sorts of scenes become so tiresome after a while.

5500650e306364980b004921_20.spoken: Wonderful. If tradition holds, they'll posture needlessly, claim exploits and work they never participated in, and then expect us to be meekly cowed. Thank you again, for breaking from tradition on that score.

554a769e3063642017006b1f_20.original: $(l.name), do you recall what Racter told us? The laser labs should be in the upper reaches of the building. As to which specific floor, I couldn't say.
554a769e3063642017006b1f_20.spoken: do you recall what Racter told us? The laser labs should be in the upper reaches of the building. As to which specific floor, I couldn't say.

555a5164323437080f00276b_81.original:
$+(l.he)'s right. From our perspective, there isn't much difference between one demon-god ruling the Walled City and a hundred.

The place is doomed either way.
555a5164323437080f00276b_81.spoken: they's right. From our perspective, there isn't much difference between one demon-god ruling the Walled City and a hundred. The place is doomed either way.

555a5164323437080f00276b_82.original:
So I've made a decision. If $(l.he) *doesn't* go through with this, *I* will.

You need to go back where you came from, or I'll open the choke on the machine and you can perish with us. I look forward to laying open as many of your kind as I can before I die.
555a5164323437080f00276b_82.spoken: So I've made a decision. If they *doesn't* go through with this, *I* will. You need to go back where you came from, or I'll open the choke on the machine and you can perish with us. I look forward to laying open as many of your kind as I can before I die.

555a61da323431501900164e_17.spoken: If your enemies find you, show them no mercy. Cut them down like wheat. Come. Let us go to war together. Before this night is over, I will taste the flesh of a god.

555a61da323431501900164e_25.original:
Do not worry, $(l.name). I will travel with Cheng's team and ensure that they succeed.

We will escort your father via side streets until it is safe for us to regroup.
555a61da323431501900164e_25.spoken: Do not worry. I will travel with Cheng's team and ensure that they succeed. We will escort your father via side streets until it is safe for us to regroup.

556740a732343744370063d1_16.original:
$(l.name)... We should let Tanjiro go. He has given us more than enough to accomplish the task at hand, and he is...a friend, of sorts.

I would be sorry if any harm came to him.
556740a732343744370063d1_16.spoken: Listen... We should let Tanjiro go. He has given us more than enough to accomplish the task at hand, and he is...a friend, of sorts. I would be sorry if any harm came to him.

557f39083234374414000810_11.original: Shall we make our move, $(l.name)? Lead the way, and I shall follow.
557f39083234374414000810_11.spoken: Shall we make our move? Lead the way, and I shall follow.

557f6564323437bc38000176_11.spoken: What do you know of it?! Do you know what it is to be hunted at every turn? Treated like an animal and despised by all who see you? I could have stayed with the unit! I could have been the best of them!

557f6564323437bc38000176_17.original:
We are done here, $(l.name). I am free.

Let us go home.
557f6564323437bc38000176_17.spoken: We are done here. I am free. Let us go home.

55820d1c623666c8260088b7_11.original:
He must be disoriented from the ASIST programming.  It appears that we got to him just in time. 

There is no time for discussion, $(l.name). We must move.
55820d1c623666c8260088b7_11.spoken: He must be disoriented from the ASIST programming. It appears that we got to him just in time. There is no time for discussion. We must move.

5594b0843234312019001a4a_14.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu shifts his weight.{{/GM}}

At this point, the only thing we can do is move forward. Lead the way, $(l.name).
5594b0843234312019001a4a_14.spoken: At this point, the only thing we can do is move forward. Lead the way.

559f14f7303031181b0064f0_26.original: I have found a new respect for you today, $(l.name). Enduring that man's prattle was a torture beyond many that I have witnessed. And yet, you waded through it all the way to the end, obtaining for us an important Tsang security code.
559f14f7303031181b0064f0_26.spoken: I have found a new respect for you today. Enduring that man's prattle was a torture beyond many that I have witnessed. And yet, you waded through it all the way to the end, obtaining for us an important Tsang security code.

55a94da3623666741900929c_10.original:
Personally, I would suggest that you take to wandering, $(l.name). Travel the length and breadth of this great island, visiting good fortune upon those who need it most.

You are masterless now, even as I am. You need not serve the likes of Kindly Cheng again.
55a94da3623666741900929c_10.spoken: Personally, I would suggest that you take to wandering. Travel the length and breadth of this great island, visiting good fortune upon those who need it most. You are masterless now, even as I am. You need not serve the likes of Kindly Cheng again.

55a94da3623666741900929c_17.spoken: This has been quite a day. With your leave, I will spend the remainder of the evening in silent meditation. You should rest as well. You look as tired as I've ever seen you.

55a94da3623666741900929c_37.original:
The quiet is an enemy, $(l.name). It seeks to turn you against yourself. To transform victory into defeat.

Don't let it do that. This night, we have won. Perhaps not in the manner that I anticipated, but it was a victory nonetheless.
55a94da3623666741900929c_37.spoken: The quiet is an enemy. It seeks to turn you against yourself. To transform victory into defeat. Don't let it do that. This night, we have won. Perhaps not in the manner that I anticipated, but it was a victory nonetheless.

5600401d626632e015004520_20.original:
Pardon me if I do not stand, $(l.name). Fine as these swords may be, they require as much maintenance as any other weapon. Burrs to be sanded out, dents to be re-formed, et cetera. The salt air here does the blades no favors.

Please, make yourself at home.
5600401d626632e015004520_20.spoken: Pardon me if I do not stand. Fine as these swords may be, they require as much maintenance as any other weapon. Burrs to be sanded out, dents to be re-formed, et cetera. The salt air here does the blades no favors. Please, make yourself at home.

5600401d626632e015004520_51.original:
Mmm, so long as we can free the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName). They have it chained down fairly well - it would sink quickly if attacked.

Keep your eyes open. That is all that I am saying.
5600401d626632e015004520_51.spoken: Mmm, so long as we can free the Bolthole. They have it chained down fairly well - it would sink quickly if attacked. Keep your eyes open. That is all that I am saying.

5600401d626632e015004520_64.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu purses his lips, regarding you with no small amount of suspicion.{{/GM}}

Have you actually ever been on a vacation, $(l.name)? Had a chance to relax without worrying about work, or being shot at? It can be surprisingly refreshing, you know.
5600401d626632e015004520_64.spoken: Have you actually ever been on a vacation? Had a chance to relax without worrying about work, or being shot at? It can be surprisingly refreshing, you know.

5600401d626632e015004520_66.spoken: I am indifferent, I must confess. The pirates seem competent, but they are afraid of me. I briefly stepped off of the Bolthole, and it was made very clear to me that it would be better if I went back inside.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_6.spoken: Not prisoners? Ridiculous. They knocked us out and locked us in a pen. They've even gone so far as to have the Bolthole impounded.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_31.original:
You're right, of course. Our being here must be a fortunate occurrence... how could it not be? Your deal with the Yama King guarantees it.

All that being said, I still have more questions than I am comfortable with. Do you know why we are here, $(l.name)?
5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_31.spoken: You're right, of course. Our being here must be a fortunate occurrence... how could it not be? Your deal with the Yama King guarantees it. All that being said, I still have more questions than I am comfortable with. Do you know why we are here?

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_47.spoken: Yes. A great inconvenience for the both of us. None of this makes any sense. They questioned you, yes... but they did not question me. Why? Any interrogator worth his salt would have collected information from both of us simultaneously.

56098865643661c8160012df_87.spoken: Our willingness is only a part of the equation. Kindly Cheng needs to know what is happening here as well. She must already know that the Bolthole has been impounded. It would be wise to inform her of the rest before proceeding any further.

56098865643661c8160012df_93.original:
Agreed. And we must bring her up to speed on what is happening here as well.

She must already know that the HKPF has the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName)... now, she will know why.
56098865643661c8160012df_93.spoken: Agreed. And we must bring her up to speed on what is happening here as well. She must already know that the HKPF has the Bolthole... now, she will know why.

56098865643661c8160012df_97.original:
By all means, call her... but I would advise you to remember your manners, $(l.name).

Cheng is still a powerful woman, and she can be quite particular about such things.
56098865643661c8160012df_97.spoken: By all means, call her... but I would advise you to remember your manners. Cheng is still a powerful woman, and she can be quite particular about such things.

56098865643661c8160012df_107.original:
You're alive and moving about of your own free will. That is more than something, $(l.name). It's everything.

Now tell me: what is our next move? How do we turn this situation to our advantage?
56098865643661c8160012df_107.spoken: You're alive and moving about of your own free will. That is more than something. It's everything. Now tell me: what is our next move? How do we turn this situation to our advantage?

56098865643661c8160012df_120.original:
We have bigger things to worry about than police surveillance. We need a plan.

The HKPF have put us into a delicate situation, $(l.name). How would you extricate us from it?
56098865643661c8160012df_120.spoken: We have bigger things to worry about than police surveillance. We need a plan. The HKPF have put us into a delicate situation. How would you extricate us from it?

56098865643661c8160012df_121.original:
I would not count on that. The $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) has been under the HKPF's control for at least twelve hours now. It is almost certain that they rigged her with listening devices during that time.

More likely than not, they are already listening to every word that we say.
56098865643661c8160012df_121.spoken: I would not count on that. The Bolthole has been under the HKPF's control for at least twelve hours now. It is almost certain that they rigged her with listening devices during that time. More likely than not, they are already listening to every word that we say.

561ef7da643661281b000d3d_18.spoken: Finally, we arrive. Come. Let's finish this and be done with it.

562144fc643661e80d004512_3.original:
$+(l.he) really is. And if things should go awry, we will simply kill anyone who resists.

It is a remarkably efficient solution.
562144fc643661e80d004512_3.spoken: they really is. And if things should go awry, we will simply kill anyone who resists. It is a remarkably efficient solution.

56218ac8306364fc18005d11_18.spoken: Something is wrong. Do you feel it? This tram made a wrong turn at the last fork. We are headed in the wrong direction.

562fbdf96436617803006bc6_38.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu hisses into your ear.{{/GM}}

This cannot be Sheng, $(l.name). He does not know what you're talking about.
562fbdf96436617803006bc6_38.spoken: This cannot be Sheng. He does not know what you're talking about.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_6.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu answers with a noncommittal grunt.{{/GM}}

Lead on, $(l.name). I'll be right behind you.
5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_6.spoken: Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_16.spoken: A temporary solution. It will not hold them for long. The killing is far from over. We will shed blood to the scream of these blaring alarms, and together, we will cut our way to the evidence that we seek.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_28.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu answers with a noncommittal grunt.{{/GM}}

Lead on, $(l.name). I'll be right behind you.
5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_28.spoken: Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_34.original:
{{GM}}Gaichu answers with a noncommittal grunt.{{/GM}}

Lead on, $(l.name). I'll be right behind you.
5643bf5f643661c0130063f0_34.spoken: Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

565370f6626632d423006c5d_54.original:
I hear the electrical whine of a terminal. Whatever evidence Qiu and Lam are looking for, this is where we will find it.

Go on, $(l.name). Search for something.
565370f6626632d423006c5d_54.spoken: I hear the electrical whine of a terminal. Whatever evidence Qiu and Lam are looking for, this is where we will find it. Go on. Search for something.

565f332762663208210043d4_22.original: As you say. I will go to the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) and await your return.
565f332762663208210043d4_22.spoken: As you say. I will go to the Bolthole and await your return.

565f332762663208210043d4_26.original: The $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) is here? But... she isn't seaworthy! How did you--
565f332762663208210043d4_26.spoken: The Bolthole is here? But... she isn't seaworthy! How did you--

566b46da643661f4110066d7_10.original:
Fourteen years of unerring good fortune.

For the term of the contract, $(l.name) cannot fail. If you fight $(l.him), fate itself will conspire against you.
566b46da643661f4110066d7_10.spoken: Fourteen years of unerring good fortune. For the term of the contract, my companion cannot fail. If you fight them, fate itself will conspire against you.

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_32.original:
The shadows have forged you into the $(l.man) that you are today, $(l.name). To retreat back to the person you used to be would be a mistake.

I would not make such a choice. Nor would I associate with anyone who would.
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_32.spoken: The shadows have forged you into the man that you are today. To retreat back to the person you used to be would be a mistake. I would not make such a choice. Nor would I associate with anyone who would.

5695567e643661dc1600166d_6.original:
Perhaps we should explore a little and see what there is to see. With luck, we will find another way up without going loud.

It is your call, $(l.name). I will back you, whatever you choose to do.
5695567e643661dc1600166d_6.spoken: Perhaps we should explore a little and see what there is to see. With luck, we will find another way up without going loud. It is your call. I will back you, whatever you choose to do.

569596123063640c1f006f01_7.original:
That will not work, $(l.name). There are too many guards, and the confines are too cramped.

They will attempt to kill us on sight. We must put an end to them first.
569596123063640c1f006f01_7.spoken: That will not work. There are too many guards, and the confines are too cramped. They will attempt to kill us on sight. We must put an end to them first.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_21.original:
The $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) isn't seaworthy, Captain.

If we try to take her on an unassisted voyage of any length, she will capsize on the first wave.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_21.spoken: The Bolthole isn't seaworthy, Captain. If we try to take her on an unassisted voyage of any length, she will capsize on the first wave.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_28.original:
You should allow us to take you back to the Benteng so that you can collect your belongings.

If memory serves, they're all still on board the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName).
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_28.spoken: You should allow us to take you back to the Benteng so that you can collect your belongings. If memory serves, they're all still on board the Bolthole.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_55.original:
You did have a choice, $(l.name). You could have chosen your adoptive family over your team. In your position, many would have.

I am happy that you opted to stick with us. And if Duncan takes issue with that, then he can take it up me.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_55.spoken: You did have a choice. You could have chosen your adoptive family over your team. In your position, many would have. I am happy that you opted to stick with us. And if Duncan takes issue with that, then he can take it up me.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_128.original:
Not to worry, $(l.name). We will carry on without you.

This group will persist for as long as I am alive.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_128.spoken: Not to worry. We will carry on without you. This group will persist for as long as I am alive.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_135.original:
You made your decision, $(l.name). Rather than accepting what you are, you have opted to flee back to what you were.

Our time in the shadows together is done.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_135.spoken: You made your decision. Rather than accepting what you are, you have opted to flee back to what you were. Our time in the shadows together is done.

54d96c983030316814006fac_60.original:
{{GM}}He turns toward you, smiling, and for the first time you can see his face. He has broadly handsome Slavic features and a chiseled jaw. His eyes are like flecks of ice.{{/GM}}

So sorry to have kept you waiting, $(l.honorific)...?
54d96c983030316814006fac_60.spoken: So sorry to have kept you waiting...?

54d96c983030316814006fac_133.original:
{{GM}}After an awkward moment, he withdraws his hand. If he's irritated, he doesn't show it.{{/GM}}

I am very pleased to meet you, $(l.name). In a community such as Heoi, it's important to be on good terms with one's neighbors.
54d96c983030316814006fac_133.spoken: I am very pleased to meet you. In a community such as Heoi, it's important to be on good terms with one's neighbors.

54d96c983030316814006fac_290.original:
Now think of the circumstances surrounding your own birth, and the building blocks that shaped you into the $(l.man) you are today.

Your mother and father exchanged fluids - sloppily, no doubt, and with all the mindless abandon that such biological imperatives entail.
54d96c983030316814006fac_290.spoken: Now think of the circumstances surrounding your own birth, and the building blocks that shaped you into the man you are today. Your mother and father exchanged fluids - sloppily, no doubt, and with all the mindless abandon that such biological imperatives entail.

54d96c983030316814006fac_308.spoken: Look around you. Everything *about* the world that we inhabit bears the stamp of metahuman tampering, from the food that we eat to the homes that we live in to the air we breathe. "Playing God" is a meaningless term. We've been reshaping our environment since time immemorial. All that I'm advocating is a further refinement of the process.

54d96c983030316814006fac_368.original:
{{GM}}He studies your face, peering at you through the gloom.{{/GM}}

But tell me, $(l.name)... are you certain that you *want* to know? Some secrets are less pleasant than others. You might prefer to leave this stone unturned.
54d96c983030316814006fac_368.spoken: But tell me... are you certain that you *want* to know? Some secrets are less pleasant than others. You might prefer to leave this stone unturned.

54d96c983030316814006fac_382.original:
{{GM}}He spreads his arms.{{/GM}}

Look at me, $(l.name). I have a shred of essence left in me, and only barely that. But I suffer none of the ill effects associated with traumatic essence loss.
54d96c983030316814006fac_382.spoken: Look at me. I have a shred of essence left in me, and only barely that. But I suffer none of the ill effects associated with traumatic essence loss.

54d96c983030316814006fac_470.original:
Exactly. So what is there to be upset about?

Do not judge me for what I am, $(l.name). I may have been born without the capacity for empathy, but that doesn't make me any more a monster than you, or Duncan, or anyone else on this boat.

If you disagree with me, you should probably quit running the shadows and find a less violent profession. Something in package delivery, perhaps.
54d96c983030316814006fac_470.spoken: Exactly. So what is there to be upset about? Do not judge me for what I am. I may have been born without the capacity for empathy, but that doesn't make me any more a monster than you, or Duncan, or anyone else on this boat. If you disagree with me, you should probably quit running the shadows and find a less violent profession. Something in package delivery, perhaps.

54d96c983030316814006fac_477.original:
A $(l.man) after my own heart. I wish that others were so open-minded.

I am not a broken thing to be fixed. I'm exactly what I was meant to be. You don't know how rare it is to find others who accept me as such.
54d96c983030316814006fac_477.spoken: A man after my own heart. I wish that others were so open-minded. I am not a broken thing to be fixed. I'm exactly what I was meant to be. You don't know how rare it is to find others who accept me as such.

54d96c983030316814006fac_478.spoken: Thank you. The feeling is quite mutual, I assure you. Your acceptance is as appreciated as it was unexpected. I will not forget it.

54d96c983030316814006fac_496.spoken: Of course it does. You do not share our selective advantage. You see what is to come, and it repels you. For a man in your position, this is only natural. Revulsion is the expected response.

54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_17.original: I'm getting an uneasy feeling about this job, $(l.name). Something is off with Tigath. I can't put my finger on it, but I would be very cautious about meeting him.
54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_17.spoken: I'm getting an uneasy feeling about this job. Something is off with Tigath. I can't put my finger on it, but I would be very cautious about meeting him.

54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_60.original: Well. I think you've made a new friend, $(l.name). I think he's unwittingly just gotten in far over his head.
54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_60.spoken: Well. I think you've made a new friend. I think he's unwittingly just gotten in far over his head.

54e26a883063641415004409_51.original:
I disagree, $(l.name). This man has claimed to be unfamiliar with violence, and interested only in blowing the whistle on Eastern Tiger. 

Why wouldn't he tell us about a botched run?
54e26a883063641415004409_51.spoken: I disagree. This man has claimed to be unfamiliar with violence, and interested only in blowing the whistle on Eastern Tiger. Why wouldn't he tell us about a botched run?

54e6531030636444140071ff_50.original:
You know, $(l.name)... If the caller is one of the Seoulpa rings that's after Tigath, I'd be interested in scrounging some of their equipment.

I hear they're very tech savvy, and use drones extensively.
54e6531030636444140071ff_50.spoken: You know... If the caller is one of the Seoulpa rings that's after Tigath, I'd be interested in scrounging some of their equipment. I hear they're very tech savvy, and use drones extensively.

5500650e306364980b004921_14.original:
{{GM}}Racter busily taps out some commands on his arm bracer. Koschei whirrs and flexes its legs beside him.{{/GM}}

I'm seeing a lot of radio traffic. Whatever that blast was, Ares wasn't expecting it. I think we're about to run face-first into another runner team, $(l.name).
5500650e306364980b004921_14.spoken: I'm seeing a lot of radio traffic. Whatever that blast was, Ares wasn't expecting it. I think we're about to run face-first into another runner team.

55131926306364cc04007eec_0.spoken: Excellent. We have arrived. We should make certain to find the auto-repair prototype while we're here.

55269efc3063648c150026e6_6.original:
These blood patterns aren't natural, $(l.name). The smearing here wasn't done by Tong. There's too much blood. 

The killer must have spread the blood across the walls deliberately.
55269efc3063648c150026e6_6.spoken: These blood patterns aren't natural. The smearing here wasn't done by Tong. There's too much blood. The killer must have spread the blood across the walls deliberately.

552c087f306364900600298c_4.spoken: Look at this. These scratches look like they're from a long bladed weapon like a sword or machete.

555a5164323437080f00276b_83.original:
$+(l.he)'s right. From our perspective, there isn't much difference between one demon-god ruling the Walled City and a hundred.

The place is doomed either way.
555a5164323437080f00276b_83.spoken: they's right. From our perspective, there isn't much difference between one demon-god ruling the Walled City and a hundred. The place is doomed either way.

555a5164323437080f00276b_84.original:
So I've made a decision. If $(l.he) *doesn't* go through with this, *I* will.

You need to go back where you came from, or I'll open the choke on the machine and you can die with us.
555a5164323437080f00276b_84.spoken: So I've made a decision. If they *doesn't* go through with this, *I* will. You need to go back where you came from, or I'll open the choke on the machine and you can die with us.

555a61da323431501900164e_18.spoken: Be safe, my friend. Come. Let us find this machine that your adoptive father built.

557630cf323431480d002236_2.original: Just a moment, $(l.name). I'm as eager as you are to deface the temple, but we should be thorough. There's still more we can do here to disrupt the flow of qi.
557630cf323431480d002236_2.spoken: Just a moment. I'm as eager as you are to deface the temple, but we should be thorough. There's still more we can do here to disrupt the flow of qi.

55820d1c623666c8260088b7_10.original:
He must be disoriented from the ASIST programming.  It appears that we got to him just in time. 

There is no time for discussion, $(l.name). We must move.
55820d1c623666c8260088b7_10.spoken: He must be disoriented from the ASIST programming. It appears that we got to him just in time. There is no time for discussion. We must move.

5594b0843234312019001a4a_22.spoken: There is a poetry to this. At this critical moment, we're presented with an urgent message from Raymond... only to have it interrupted. The timing, the tension... so perfect. Bad luck, eh? And we are certainly in the place for it.

5604464e3063648823004d0d_66.spoken: A productive conversation. Now, how shall we proceed? I'd like to remind you that we have a sterilization countdown in progress, Silver Dream subjects at our backs, and a potential disease outbreak in this facility to contend with.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_39.spoken: Not prisoners? Ridiculous. They knocked us out and penned us like animals. They've even gone so far as to have the Bolthole impounded.

56098865643661c8160012df_88.spoken: We are only a part of the equation. Kindly Cheng needs to know what's happening as well. The old woman must already know that the police have seized the Bolthole. We should bring her up to date on what has happened since.

56098865643661c8160012df_94.original:
Agreed. And we must bring her up to speed on what is happening here as well.

She must already know that the HKPF has the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName)... now, she will know why.
56098865643661c8160012df_94.spoken: Agreed. And we must bring her up to speed on what is happening here as well. She must already know that the HKPF has the Bolthole... now, she will know why.

56098865643661c8160012df_122.original:
A dangerous assumption, my friend. Our captors have most likely installed listening devices on the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName).

In fact, I'll bet you anything that they're listening to every word that we say.
56098865643661c8160012df_122.spoken: A dangerous assumption, my friend. Our captors have most likely installed listening devices on the Bolthole. In fact, I'll bet you anything that they're listening to every word that we say.

565f332762663208210043d4_19.spoken: As you say, my friend. I shall inspect the Bolthole and see if anything was damaged during transit.

565f332762663208210043d4_25.original: The $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) is here? But... she isn't seaworthy! How did you--
565f332762663208210043d4_25.spoken: The Bolthole is here? But... she isn't seaworthy! How did you--

566b46da643661f4110066d7_19.original:
Fourteen years of unerring good fortune.

For the term of the contract, $(l.name) cannot fail. If you fight $(l.him), fate itself will conspire against you.
566b46da643661f4110066d7_19.spoken: Fourteen years of unerring good fortune. For the term of the contract, my companion cannot fail. If you fight them, fate itself will conspire against you.

5695567e643661dc1600166d_5.original:
Perhaps we should explore a little and see what there is to see. With luck, we will find another way up without going loud.

It is your call, $(l.name). I will back you, whatever you choose to do.
5695567e643661dc1600166d_5.spoken: Perhaps we should explore a little and see what there is to see. With luck, we will find another way up without going loud. It is your call. I will back you, whatever you choose to do.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_20.original:
The $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) isn't seaworthy, Captain.

If we try to take her on an unassisted voyage of any length, she'll capsize on the first wave.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_20.spoken: The Bolthole isn't seaworthy, Captain. If we try to take her on an unassisted voyage of any length, she'll capsize on the first wave.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_27.original:
You should allow us to take you back to the Benteng so that you can collect your belongings.

If memory serves, they're all still on board the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName).
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_27.spoken: You should allow us to take you back to the Benteng so that you can collect your belongings. If memory serves, they're all still on board the Bolthole.

54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_3.original:
>>From: Kindly Cheng
>>To: $(l.name)
>>Subject: Welcome to Heoi

$(l.name),

On behalf of your friends at The Heoi Chamber of Commerce and the Swift Winds Mahjong Parlor, I welcome you to the community of Heoi and to our new business venture.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_3.spoken: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Welcome to Heoi Little bird, On behalf of your friends at The Heoi Chamber of Commerce and the Swift Winds Mahjong Parlor, I welcome you to the community of Heoi and to our new business venture.

54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_5.original:
>>From: Is0bel
>>To: $(l.name)
>>Subject: Your Mission Computer

Hey, $(l.name). I've set up your mission computer to automatically collect and collate news reports, information and media that might be of interest to you. Some of the keywords I've got it trolling for are things like "Raymond," "Duncan," "Walled City," et cetera.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_5.spoken: From: Is0bel Subject: Your Mission Computer Hey. I've set up your mission computer to automatically collect and collate news reports, information and media that might be of interest to you. Some of the keywords I've got it trolling for are things like "Raymond," "Duncan," "Walled City," et cetera.

54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_7.original:
>>From: Bao JianJun
>>To: $(l.name)
>>Subject: Resources

I have been instructed to inform you of the various suppliers present in Heoi.

Auntie Cheng has cultivated a commercial district of well-stocked and trustworthy vendors. Whoever you choose to do business with, you will be in good hands.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_7.spoken: From: Bao JianJun Subject: Resources I have been instructed to inform you of the various suppliers present in Heoi. Auntie Cheng has cultivated a commercial district of well-stocked and trustworthy vendors. Whoever you choose to do business with, you will be in good hands.

54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_11.original:
>>From: Bao JianJun
>>To: $(l.name)
>>Subject: Resources

I have been instructed to inform you of the various suppliers present in Heoi.

Auntie Cheng has cultivated a commercial district of well-stocked and trustworthy vendors. Whoever you choose to do business with, you will be in good hands.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_11.spoken: From: Bao JianJun Subject: Resources I have been instructed to inform you of the various suppliers present in Heoi. Auntie Cheng has cultivated a commercial district of well-stocked and trustworthy vendors. Whoever you choose to do business with, you will be in good hands.

54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_15.original:
>>From: Kindly Cheng
>>To: $(l.name)
>>Subject: Serial Killer

I've got a problem, $(l.name), and you're going to help me solve it.

I do a lot of business with the Whampoans. If you're not familiar with the term, I'll forgive you... you are an outsider, after all.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_15.spoken: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Serial Killer I've got a problem, little bird, and you're going to help me solve it. I do a lot of business with the Whampoans. If you're not familiar with the term, I'll forgive you... you are an outsider, after all.

54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_20.original:
>>From: Kindly Cheng
>>To: $(l.name)
>>Subject: Re: Serial Killer

Good. I'll tell the Elders you're coming. 

They don't like outsiders, and they might shoot at you if I don't warn them that you'll be arriving.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_20.spoken: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Re: Serial Killer Good. I'll tell the Elders you're coming. They don't like outsiders, and they might shoot at you if I don't warn them that you'll be arriving.

54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_22.original:
>>From: Kindly Cheng
>>To: $(l.name)
>>Subject: Fwd: Artifact Liberation

For years, the Yellow Lotus acted as tax collectors within the Walled City. Since the Walled City was built by Josephine Tsang, and the Yellow Lotus was run by Auntie Cheng, they must’ve had a working business relationship... for a while, at least.

From what Nightjar told me (he was her favorite - you got that, right?), Auntie was known as a real up-and-comer back then. She was on the fast track to be the next Yellow Lotus 438... that’s a big-deal gig, $(story.Global_Gobbet_Nickname). Money and power galore.

54c696f3303031301d005190_332.spoken: There you are. Your crew here tells me that you were able to locate and interrogate the Plastic-Faced Man. They haven't told me his current disposition, however. I assume everything went as I instructed?

54c696f3303031301d005190_335.spoken: Don't make me pull things out of you. Once I start, I'll find it hard to stop.

54c696f3303031301d005190_348.original: Don't act like an arrogant idiot, $(l.name). It's a waste of my time.
54c696f3303031301d005190_348.spoken: Don't act like an arrogant idiot. It's a waste of my time.

54c696f3303031301d005190_370.spoken: Those passes should get you through the lobby. You'll still have to explain your presence, so don't expect to just walk on through.

54c696f3303031301d005190_413.spoken: One more thing. While you're in her headquarters, look for anything we can use to incriminate or embarrass Josephine Tsang. I want dirt. Something I can feed to... an acquaintance... on the Executive Council. Someone who stands to gain from it.

55b3d7776236668819001370_166.spoken: You've made quite a splash since arriving in Hong Kong. Many shadowruns completed in a very short time. The reports from our clients are glowing. Mostly.

55b3d7776236668819001370_180.spoken: Now get some sleep. You look like shit. Tomorrow, we'll talk about the future.

55b3d7776236668819001370_185.original:
Yes, $(l.name), we! This is your victory, too.

{{GM}}The thin black cigar bounces excitedly in Kindly's mouth as she speaks.{{/GM}}

*We* will be the instruments of her destruction! 

We're gonna *hurt* that woman.
55b3d7776236668819001370_185.spoken: Yes, we! This is your victory, too. *We* will be the instruments of her destruction! We're gonna *hurt* that woman.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_18.original:
Godspeed, $(L.name).

And if you can do something to stop my neighborhood going to hell... that'd be rock solid.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_18.spoken: Godspeed. And if you can do something to stop my neighborhood going to hell... that'd be rock solid.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_49.spoken: Hey, my fellow countryman returns! You want some chips and dip? Help yourself, it's on the engine block. There's a big Sahara Combat League race tonight. Everybody's coming over... you want to come? No, I bet Kindly's keeping you busy.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_51.spoken: Scrub up and get me the defibrillator paddles. I'm installing some headers on this guy's liver, and now we're going to shock him back to life! But seriously, hand me the lube. What can I do you for, today?

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_55.spoken: These dreams are getting out of hand. You've got 'em too, right? I *normally* wake up more tired than when I fell asleep, but this is nuts.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_59.spoken: Hey. Big typhoon on the way in. Better batten down the hatches. It's gonna be a kicker.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_61.original:
{{GM}}Ambrose is still cleaning up, cheerfully whistling along to muted doom metal music.{{/GM}}

Hey, $(L.name). What can I do you for?
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_61.spoken: Hey. What can I do you for?

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_67.original:
{{GM}}Ambrose anxiously sips his whiskey.{{/GM}}

Big storm coming in, $(L.name). I'm gonna bed down soon. You need something?
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_67.spoken: Big storm coming in. I'm gonna bed down soon. You need something?

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_68.original:
{{GM}}Muted retro-doom metal pervades Chrome Alley like an industrial spill of undead dreams. Ambrose whistles cheerfully along.{{/GM}}

Hey, $(L.name)! What can I do you for?
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_68.spoken: Hey! What can I do you for?

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_95.original:
Nightmares? Hell, $(L.name)... that's my life!

I curl up with a bottle of vodka and a handful of pills every night. But if you mean the "toothy hunting horror" dream... yeah, I've been having it.

Shit, it's just one more nightmare.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_95.spoken: Nightmares? Hell... that's my life! I curl up with a bottle of vodka and a handful of pills every night. But if you mean the "toothy hunting horror" dream... yeah, I've been having it. Shit, it's just one more nightmare.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_150.original:
Hey, it's grand digging up the wreckage of the past, $(L.name)... but time's wasting. I left Chicago, I landed in the Kong. After a while of running the Kong shadows, I landed here - in Chrome Alley. That's really the gist of it.

Now we'd better get back to earning a living.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_150.spoken: Hey, it's grand digging up the wreckage of the past... but time's wasting. I left Chicago, I landed in the Kong. After a while of running the Kong shadows, I landed here - in Chrome Alley. That's really the gist of it. Now we'd better get back to earning a living.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_158.original:
Hong Kong's a good lily pad for a derby crasher like yourself, $(L.name).

The shadows are deep. The money flows. It's friendly to foreigners - and there's no *real* government. The whole place is run by corporations and syndicates.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_158.spoken: Hong Kong's a good lily pad for a derby crasher like yourself. The shadows are deep. The money flows. It's friendly to foreigners - and there's no *real* government. The whole place is run by corporations and syndicates.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_178.spoken: I kinda like you, in spite of your choice moments. Watch yourself, out there.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_191.original:
{{GM}}He appraises you, quietly.{{/GM}}

Well... you're doing good, $(L.name). I feel okay about telling you this.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_191.spoken: Well... you're doing good. I feel okay about telling you this.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_240.spoken: Listen... this is a stressful subject for me. We can talk more about the past another day. For now, I'm spent.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_242.spoken: Oh man... you can really shake hot sauce in the eyes of a heavy moment. I like that about you... the world needs more of that. Soon your pain will end! Where was I? Oh yeah...

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_245.original:
Hey, I appreciate your asking, $(L.name). I don't need anything... just BS'ing, since you asked.

Don't let me hold you back from paying work. I don't want to take up your time.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_245.spoken: Hey, I appreciate your asking. I don't need anything... just BS'ing, since you asked. Don't let me hold you back from paying work. I don't want to take up your time.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_250.original:
{{GM}}Ambrose's face becomes grim.{{/GM}}

You want to keep going with this, $(L.name)? All right...
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_250.spoken: You want to keep going with this? All right...

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_262.spoken: That's a raw nerve. Karen betrayed me. I don't want to talk about it.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_298.original: It's okay, $(L.name). She, uh... she made her peace. I guess.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_298.spoken: It's okay. She, uh... she made her peace. I guess.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_299.original: I know you do, $(L.name). I know you do.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_299.spoken: I know you do. I know you do.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_310.original:
I used to be a real piece of work, $(L.name). When I got busted up, for the first time in my life I had to rely on other people. Broke, hunted, and close to death. Not so different from how you showed up... except for the death part.

Someone here owed Karen a favor. The people of Heoi took care of us.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_310.spoken: I used to be a real piece of work. When I got busted up, for the first time in my life I had to rely on other people. Broke, hunted, and close to death. Not so different from how you showed up... except for the death part. Someone here owed Karen a favor. The people of Heoi took care of us.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_312.original:
{{GM}}Ambrose sighs, and clutches his shot glass against his chest - like a religious talisman. He looks thoughtfully at you.{{/GM}}

That's more than I've told anyone in a long time. It does the heart good, $(L.name). Thanks.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_312.spoken: That's more than I've told anyone in a long time. It does the heart good. Thanks.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_318.original: Maybe so, $(L.name)... but I like to think there's a little more meaning to it.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_318.spoken: Maybe so... but I like to think there's a little more meaning to it.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_319.original: That's about all a $(L.guy) can do.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_319.spoken: That's about all a person can do.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_323.original:
{{GM}}His eyes are shining when he looks back at you.{{/GM}}

Thanks, $(L.name). I never learned it in full, even though she said it over me every day, when I was all messed up.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_323.spoken: Thanks. I never learned it in full, even though she said it over me every day, when I was all messed up.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_347.original:
I'm not admitting anything.

It's all ancient history, $(L.name).
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_347.spoken: I'm not admitting anything. It's all ancient history.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_348.original:
I'm not saying anything at all.

It's all ancient history, $(L.name).
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_348.spoken: I'm not saying anything at all. It's all ancient history.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_355.original:
Thanks, $(L.name).

{{GM}}There's a hint of real gratitude in his voice.{{/GM}}

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_366.spoken: Welcome to the shadows. Enjoy your stay.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_372.original: Sorry, $(L.name)... I can't discuss a patient's treatment without permission. Confidentiality and Hippocratic oath and all that stuff.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_372.spoken: Sorry... I can't discuss a patient's treatment without permission. Confidentiality and Hippocratic oath and all that stuff.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_374.original:
Hey, I'm a real doctor to the people here!

Look, $(L.name), how would you feel if I told people about the injuries you and your team come in with, huh? I gotta respect people's privacy.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_374.spoken: Hey, I'm a real doctor to the people here! Look, how would you feel if I told people about the injuries you and your team come in with, huh? I gotta respect people's privacy.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_383.original: Thanks, $(L.name). He'll be happy to get those.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_383.spoken: Thanks. He'll be happy to get those.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_398.original:
Sorry, $(L.name). I'm not a drug dealer. I only handle 'em for people who need them for medical reasons.

Well, psychological. Medical. Because they already have the habit. Whatever.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_398.spoken: Sorry. I'm not a drug dealer. I only handle 'em for people who need them for medical reasons. Well, psychological. Medical. Because they already have the habit. Whatever.

54d545e23030312c0c00300c_399.original:
I commend you thinking about him, $(L.name). I really do. A lot of cases like Matty come through my door, and I feel for them.

If I didn't have this gig, I might be right there with him. There but by the grace of chrome and booty go I.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_399.spoken: I commend you thinking about him. I really do. A lot of cases like Matty come through my door, and I feel for them. If I didn't have this gig, I might be right there with him. There but by the grace of chrome and booty go I.

554693e9393936841900720a_33.original:
{{GM}}Ermine haggles with a dwarf over the price of a customized shotgun, sealing the deal with the offer of a size-appropriate bandolier. The dwarf leaves happy, and Ermine slots another black market credstick into her stash.{{/GM}}

Welcome back, $(l.name). How can I help you?
554693e9393936841900720a_33.spoken: Welcome back. How can I help you?

554693e9393936841900720a_80.original:
{{GM}}The dread creeping through Heoi has pervaded even the induced euphoria of Club 88. Ermine herself is not immune, looking to be caught between the need for rest and the inability to find the peace necessary for it.{{/GM}}

It’s not a good time, $(l.name).

554693e9393936841900720a_113.original:
{{GM}}Ermine's voice cool and professional. Her expression is earnest.{{/GM}}

For me, it wasn't about humans versus elves or orks or dwarves or "my kind." I want you to understand that, $(L.name). It was about common humanity. It's about how we treat *all* people.
554693e9393936841900720a_113.spoken: For me, it wasn't about humans versus elves or orks or dwarves or "my kind." I want you to understand that. It was about common humanity. It's about how we treat *all* people.

554693e9393936841900720a_128.original:
{{GM}}The darkness infecting the people of Heoi has finally cleared and spirits are again bright. Nowhere is that more evident than with Ermine Ka Fai.{{/GM}}

It is good to see you alive and well, $(l.name). Do we have you to thank for our good fortune?
554693e9393936841900720a_128.spoken: It is good to see you alive and well. Do we have you to thank for our good fortune?

554693e9393936841900720a_146.original: You have my undying gratitude. Thank you, $(l.name).
554693e9393936841900720a_146.spoken: You have my undying gratitude. Thank you.

554693e9393936841900720a_164.original: For everything you've done, for my family and Heoi, you have my undying gratitude. Thank you, $(l.name).
554693e9393936841900720a_164.spoken: For everything you've done, for my family and Heoi, you have my undying gratitude. Thank you.

554693e9393936841900720a_165.original:
{{GM}}Ermine nods with slow determination. Her jaw is set with resolve.{{/GM}}

I'll carry on, $(L.name). That's what I do. Henry and I had a good life together, and we raised two wonderful boys into men.
554693e9393936841900720a_165.spoken: I'll carry on. That's what I do. Henry and I had a good life together, and we raised two wonderful boys into men.

554693e9393936841900720a_183.original: For everything you've done, for my family and Heoi, you have my undying gratitude. Thank you, $(l.name).
554693e9393936841900720a_183.spoken: For everything you've done, for my family and Heoi, you have my undying gratitude. Thank you.

554693e9393936841900720a_184.spoken: I will. And if you should ever find Callum... please... Tell him to come home.

554693e9393936841900720a_200.original: For everything you've done, for my family and Heoi, you have my undying gratitude. Thank you, $(l.name).
554693e9393936841900720a_200.spoken: For everything you've done, for my family and Heoi, you have my undying gratitude. Thank you.

554693e9393936841900720a_201.spoken: I will. And if you should ever find Freddy... please... Tell him to come home.

554693e9393936841900720a_219.spoken: I will. And if you should ever find them... please... Tell them to come home.

554693e9393936841900720a_236.spoken: I will. And if you should ever find them... please... Tell them to come home.

554693e9393936841900720a_248.original: He's lost his sons, $(L.name). But... we've come together. We need to.
554693e9393936841900720a_248.spoken: He's lost his sons. But... we've come together. We need to.

554693e9393936841900720a_252.original:
{{GM}}Ermine bites her lip.{{/GM}}

How do you think I am? It's all over, $(L.name). It's all over.
554693e9393936841900720a_252.spoken: How do you think I am? It's all over. It's all over.

554693e9393936841900720a_274.spoken: Soon... I think I'll be leaving all of this, too.

54d5743c3030314013003009_4.spoken: I can't believe you're *shopping* right now. Watch out for yourself.

54d5743c3030314013003009_8.original:
Whoa... thanks, $(L.name).

{{GM}}Law takes the submachine gun reverently from you.{{/GM}}

54d5743c3030314013003009_14.spoken: Thanks. Man, this is... okay, this is serious. All right, I'm good. Anything I can help you out on?

54d5743c3030314013003009_18.original: Thanks, $(L.name). That's a good idea. I'll do it.
54d5743c3030314013003009_18.spoken: Thanks. That's a good idea. I'll do it.

54d5743c3030314013003009_39.spoken: See you later. Watch your back and shoot straight, and all...

54d5743c3030314013003009_67.original:
Hey, $(L.name)! I was hoping you'd come around.

You got a minute?
54d5743c3030314013003009_67.spoken: Hey! I was hoping you'd come around. You got a minute?

54d5743c3030314013003009_71.spoken: Wicked. That's pretty iron-clad. Pretty vicious. If you do good, you'll be noticed.

54d5743c3030314013003009_84.spoken: Yo! How can I style out the carnivore? What d'you need?

54d5743c3030314013003009_85.spoken: Yo! Welcome back to the Palace. You got anything interesting to tell me today? 'Cause I got nothing but fixing hair curlers and debugging old ladies' PDAs. I swear I'm gonna die of boredom.

54d5743c3030314013003009_88.spoken: Hey! I, uh... I just wanted to say I'm sorry. I didn't mean to, uh... to put anyone in danger.

54d5743c3030314013003009_90.original:
Yeah, I don't want anything to do with shadowrunning, anymore.

I'm not like you, $(L.name)... I'm not some carnivore. I don't want to be one.
54d5743c3030314013003009_90.spoken: Yeah, I don't want anything to do with shadowrunning, anymore. I'm not like you... I'm not some carnivore. I don't want to be one.

54d5743c3030314013003009_91.original:
{{GM}}Law looks pensively around the docks.{{/GM}}

I want to get out of here, $(L.name). I want to get on to something bigger.
54d5743c3030314013003009_91.spoken: I want to get out of here. I want to get on to something bigger.

54d5743c3030314013003009_94.spoken: I guess that makes my strategy clear... Welcome to Law's Technology Palace. What useless junk can I sell you?

54d5743c3030314013003009_98.original:
Yeah, well... whatever the rules are, I don't want anything to do with it.

I'm not like you, $(L.name)... I'm not some carnivore. I don't want to be one.
54d5743c3030314013003009_98.spoken: Yeah, well... whatever the rules are, I don't want anything to do with it. I'm not like you... I'm not some carnivore. I don't want to be one.

54d5743c3030314013003009_99.original:
I guess you'd know. Well, I don't want anything more to do with it.

I'm not like you, $(L.name)... I'm not some carnivore. I don't want to be one.
54d5743c3030314013003009_99.spoken: I guess you'd know. Well, I don't want anything more to do with it. I'm not like you... I'm not some carnivore. I don't want to be one.

54d5743c3030314013003009_100.original:
You're a real carnivore, $(L.name)... I get that. I'm not like that, though, and I don't want to be.

I don't want anything to do with shadowrunning, anymore.
54d5743c3030314013003009_100.spoken: You're a real carnivore... I get that. I'm not like that, though, and I don't want to be. I don't want anything to do with shadowrunning, anymore.

54d5743c3030314013003009_101.original:
Yo, $(L.name)! Welcome back to the Palace. The Palace of BOOM!

{{GM}}Law laughs to himself.{{/GM}}
54d5743c3030314013003009_101.spoken: Yo! Welcome back to the Palace. The Palace of BOOM!

54d5743c3030314013003009_106.original:
See you later, $(L.name). Watch out for yourself, carnivore.

Long live the BOOM!
54d5743c3030314013003009_106.spoken: See you later. Watch out for yourself, carnivore. Long live the BOOM!

54d5743c3030314013003009_107.original: Yo $(L.name), lemme know if you need anything. You're the biggest carnivore in the Kong.
54d5743c3030314013003009_107.spoken: Yo, lemme know if you need anything. You're the biggest carnivore in the Kong.

54d5743c3030314013003009_108.spoken: Yo! Anything you need, let me know.

54d5743c3030314013003009_112.original:
Yo, you got it.

Anybody ever tell you you're kinda a spooky $(L.guy), $(L.name)? You kinda are.
54d5743c3030314013003009_112.spoken: Yo, you got it. Anybody ever tell you you're kinda a spooky one? You kinda are.

54d5743c3030314013003009_123.spoken: Yeah... I can. What should I do?

54d5743c3030314013003009_125.original:
{{GM}}Maximum Law looks like he's about to be sick. His voice is faint.{{/GM}}

Th-thanks, $(L.name).

54d5743c3030314013003009_126.original:
{{GM}}Law nods, and swallows hard again.{{/GM}}

What should I do, $(l.name)?

54d5743c3030314013003009_180.original:
I'll come by the boat later... when I can get a little time.

Man, I can't wait. You're the best, $(L.name).
54d5743c3030314013003009_180.spoken: I'll come by the boat later... when I can get a little time. Man, I can't wait. You're the best.

54d5743c3030314013003009_181.original:
What? Are you huffing spray paint? I can't believe you, $(L.name)!

First of all, "Master Felon" has no plot, you just run around doing random stuff, like, "Oooo, look at me, I'm rigging your skooter!" Second of all, that 2030s cheesy retro fashion is the stupidest thing ever. Third...
54d5743c3030314013003009_181.spoken: What? Are you huffing spray paint? I can't believe you! First of all, "Master Felon" has no plot, you just run around doing random stuff, like, "Oooo, look at me, I'm rigging your skooter!" Second of all, that 2030s cheesy retro fashion is the stupidest thing ever. Third...

54d5743c3030314013003009_189.spoken: It's a pleasure handling meta with you. A little meta is like a fresh memory defragment... it makes my whole day better.

54d5743c3030314013003009_203.original:
I mean, I believe you $(L.name), 'cause you're legit... but *no one* else will. Here, I'll still hook you up.

I guess reality is as strange as fiction.
54d5743c3030314013003009_203.spoken: I mean, I believe you, 'cause you're legit... but no one else will. Here, I'll still hook you up. I guess reality is as strange as fiction.

54d5743c3030314013003009_206.spoken: Do I look like a fucking tabloid? Come on. You're a stone-cold, steely-eyed killing machine!

54d5743c3030314013003009_266.spoken: Whoa... For real? Man... this is going to go down in tribal lore.

54d5743c3030314013003009_305.original: Like I said, I'll take it off your hands for ¥$(scene.Payout_WCSimsenseChip).
54d5743c3030314013003009_305.spoken: Like I said, I'll take it off your hands for the price I named.

54d579a43030314013003045_7.original: Y'know, $(l.name), the course of my life changed partly because of you. And I don't mean that in a bad way. Really, I'm happy with my part in all this... that I could help you out, if even a little.
54d579a43030314013003045_7.spoken: Y'know, the course of my life changed partly because of you. And I don't mean that in a bad way. Really, I'm happy with my part in all this... that I could help you out, if even a little.

54d579a43030314013003045_55.original:
{{GM}}She shakes your hand. Her grip is surprisingly firm.{{/GM}}

So, $(l.name). What can I do for you? I've got spells, alchemical reagents, foci... whatever you want, really. Might have to do some digging to find it, but if it's magical, it's around here somewhere.
54d579a43030314013003045_55.spoken: So. What can I do for you? I've got spells, alchemical reagents, foci... whatever you want, really. Might have to do some digging to find it, but if it's magical, it's around here somewhere.

54d579a43030314013003045_58.spoken: As a matter of fact, I have. But we all get the occasional vivid dream - nothing special there.

54d579a43030314013003045_104.spoken: You have keen senses. It's true. I was... I was born a Phyllis.

54d579a43030314013003045_124.original:
{{GM}}She looks stricken.{{/GM}}

Are you for real? Shit, $(l.name).

54d579a43030314013003045_132.original:
{{GM}}You can see Crafty studying you. She exhales through her nose, and it seems as if she's considering something.{{/GM}}

I know we've just met, $(l.name), but you have a generous ear. I don't mind discussing my mother with you as long as we keep the details between us.
54d579a43030314013003045_132.spoken: I know we've just met, but you have a generous ear. I don't mind discussing my mother with you as long as we keep the details between us.

54d579a43030314013003045_149.original:
All right, $(l.name). I'm going to get started. Now. But it'll take time - the House of Five Phases is jammed from floor to ceiling with books, and any one of them could hold valuable information.

Check in once in a while, and I'll share my findings with you.
54d579a43030314013003045_149.spoken: All right. I'm going to get started. Now. But it'll take time - the House of Five Phases is jammed from floor to ceiling with books, and any one of them could hold valuable information. Check in once in a while, and I'll share my findings with you.

54d579a43030314013003045_165.spoken: I'm not sure we can. At least, I haven't found anything about that in my mother's texts yet. We don't want to dive into this haphazardly. Remember, these omens can be dangerous.

54d579a43030314013003045_184.spoken: No way, I've dug myself too deep to back out now. And I don't say that as a bad thing - I've made progress. I'm proud of that. The sooner I figure out these dreams, the sooner I can rest. And trust me, I'll make up for it in spades - and naps.

54d579a43030314013003045_236.original:
I know where you're coming from, $(l.name). But my mother still allowed herself to be corrupted. She put herself in the way of evil, and it took her. Not a second thought for anyone else.

Her research has given us valuable resources. I'm glad these journals - these pieces of her mind - can be used to arm ourselves against the Yama Kings. The knowledge it's given us will help in the trials to come.
54d579a43030314013003045_236.spoken: I know where you're coming from. But my mother still allowed herself to be corrupted. She put herself in the way of evil, and it took her. Not a second thought for anyone else. Her research has given us valuable resources. I'm glad these journals - these pieces of her mind - can be used to arm ourselves against the Yama Kings. The knowledge it's given us will help in the trials to come.

54d579a43030314013003045_237.spoken: Please. You have to stop it - this evil. For yourself, for my mother... for every man, woman, and child in the Walled City and Heoi. Nobody outside of our community will care about this. They've already written people like us off. If what's happening here is to be undone, *we* have to be the ones to undo it.

54d579a43030314013003045_245.original: Nothing new to report, $(l.name). You're welcome to take a look around if you're here for supplies.
54d579a43030314013003045_245.spoken: Nothing new to report. You're welcome to take a look around if you're here for supplies.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_7.original: It is good to hear you s-say that, $(l.firstname). And I'm glad you were here... especially at the e-end.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_7.spoken: It is good to hear you s-say that. And I'm glad you were here... especially at the e-end.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_12.original:
{{GM}}The old man's eye crinkle in amusement.{{/GM}}
