It is good to see some things... have not ch-changed, $(l.firstname).
54d96ae73030316814006f45_12.spoken: It is good to see some things... have not ch-changed.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_32.original:
{{GM}}His eyes crinkle again.{{/GM}}

Still the same, $(l.firstname)... I guess s-some things don't change.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_32.spoken: Still the same... I guess s-some things don't change.

554158bb3234370819002cee_23.original:
The Yama King... c-could return at any moment. I must set things in motion now.

{{GM}}He stands up straight, the authoritarian of old.{{/GM}}

Take care of Duncan, $(l.firstname). You are family - if not by birth, then by circumstance. 

Never forget that.
554158bb3234370819002cee_23.spoken: The Yama King... c-could return at any moment. I must set things in motion now. Take care of Duncan. You are family - if not by birth, then by circumstance. Never forget that.

555a5164323437080f00276b_50.original:
I believe that I have... m-made a decision. If $(l.he) doesn't go through with this... *I* will.

{{GM}}There's steel in his voice. The kind that you haven't heard since the old days, before prison, before you left home.{{/GM}}
555a5164323437080f00276b_50.spoken: I believe that I have... m-made a decision. If they doesn't go through with this... *I* will.

555a5164323437080f00276b_85.original:
$+(l.he)'s right. From our p-perspective... there isn't much difference between one d-demon-god ruling the Walled City... and a hundred.

The place is doomed either way.
555a5164323437080f00276b_85.spoken: they's right. From our p-perspective... there isn't much difference between one d-demon-god ruling the Walled City... and a hundred. The place is doomed either way.

555a5164323437080f00276b_86.original:
So I have... m-made a decision. If $(l.he) *doesn't* go through with this... *I* will.

You need to go back where you c-came from or I will...l open the choke on the machine... and you can d-die with us.
555a5164323437080f00276b_86.spoken: So I have... m-made a decision. If they *doesn't* go through with this... *I* will. You need to go back where you c-came from or I will...l open the choke on the machine... and you can d-die with us.

555a5164323437080f00276b_87.original:
You cannot do this, $(l.name). I w-w-won't allow it.

If you try... I will s-stop you.
555a5164323437080f00276b_87.spoken: You cannot do this. I w-w-won't allow it. If you try... I will s-stop you.

555a5164323437080f00276b_108.original: You cannot do this, $(l.firstname). You c-cannot trust it!
555a5164323437080f00276b_108.spoken: You cannot do this. You c-cannot trust it!

558898d6623666a012005538_20.original:
I will be... right behind you, $(l.firstname). 

T-take c-care of yourself.
558898d6623666a012005538_20.spoken: I will be... right behind you. T-take c-care of yourself.

5589c2fc623666fc370055a8_27.original:
Unconditional love is unconditional, $(l.firstname). I am not b-blind to what my m-mother has d-done... she has hurt people... hurt *me.*

But she is my mother. She m-made me who I am... 

{{GM}}He closes his eyes at the irony of his statement.{{/GM}}

I will not stop loving her.
5589c2fc623666fc370055a8_27.spoken: Unconditional love is unconditional. I am not b-blind to what my m-mother has d-done... she has hurt people... hurt *me.* But she is my mother. She m-made me who I am... I will not stop loving her.

5594b0843234312019001a4a_5.original: Please, $(l.firstname)... try to avoid more c-casualties.
5594b0843234312019001a4a_5.spoken: Please... try to avoid more c-casualties.

5594b0843234312019001a4a_6.original:
No, $(l.firstname). 

Tsang security... are little more than wage slaves with g-guns... unlikely they understand what is really going on.

Same with the locals... some have become c-crazed from the Yama King's visions.
5594b0843234312019001a4a_6.spoken: No. Tsang security... are little more than wage slaves with g-guns... unlikely they understand what is really going on. Same with the locals... some have become c-crazed from the Yama King's visions.

559c3db0623666e8210026e8_21.original:
No, $(l.firstname). My mother wanted me back... wanted me to take over the company. Be the person I was... trained to be.

But first, I needed to be... modified.

{{GM}}He lowers his head.{{/GM}}

I needed to forget about what happened.
559c3db0623666e8210026e8_21.spoken: No. My mother wanted me back... wanted me to take over the company. Be the person I was... trained to be. But first, I needed to be... modified. I needed to forget about what happened.

559ec0526236669809002374_34.original:
I don't just have... s-something to do with it... $(l.honorific) $(l.lastname). 

This is my fault.
559ec0526236669809002374_34.spoken: I don't just have... s-something to do with it... This is my fault.

55a94da3623666741900929c_47.original:
I'm afraid I am s-still *in* hell, $(l.honorific) $(l.lastname). Like Duncan, I need time to p-process all that... has happened. 

I have lived with a p-profound guilt for... twenty years.

Coming face-to-face with m-my... victims has made it all the more... acute.
55a94da3623666741900929c_47.spoken: I'm afraid I am s-still in hell. Like Duncan, I need time to p-process all that... has happened. I have lived with a p-profound guilt for... twenty years. Coming face-to-face with m-my... victims has made it all the more... acute.

55ca7566643661a816000a25_1.original:
{{GM}}Although his breathing is a bit erratic, Raymond seems steady enough on his feet.{{/GM}}

Lead on, $(l.firstname). I'll be right behind you.
55ca7566643661a816000a25_1.spoken: Lead on. I'll be right behind you.

54d56f243030316013003007_16.original:
{{GM}}He gives you the shooter sign.{{/GM}}

Here's looking at you, $(L.name). Come around any time.
54d56f243030316013003007_16.spoken: Here's looking at you. Come around any time.

54d56f243030316013003007_55.original: Oh! A $(L.man) after my own heart!
54d56f243030316013003007_55.spoken: Oh! A man after my own heart!

54d56f243030316013003007_59.spoken: beautiful! To what do I owe this unexpected pleasure...? Why, you're not here for some robotics, are you? Well, shucks!

54d56f243030316013003007_66.original: $(L.name)! I hardly saw you there. Come on in, don't be a stranger, beautiful!
54d56f243030316013003007_66.spoken: Hey! I hardly saw you there. Come on in, don't be a stranger, beautiful!

54d56f243030316013003007_83.original: Can you do me a favor, $(L.name)? I can't leave the lot right now.
54d56f243030316013003007_83.spoken: Can you do me a favor? I can't leave the lot right now.

54d56f243030316013003007_89.original:
{{GM}}Matthew is still looking at the ground. He glances up briefly as you approach.{{/GM}}

Uh... hi, $(L.name). Did you get my medicine?
54d56f243030316013003007_89.spoken: Uh... hi. Did you get my medicine?

54d56f243030316013003007_103.original: Oh... okay... thanks, $(L.name). You scared me for second.
54d56f243030316013003007_103.spoken: Oh... okay... thanks. You scared me for second.

54d56f243030316013003007_108.spoken: Well, that was a close one! Thanks to you, we're back in business... and just for you, I've got a red-hot deal on solar chargers, just in time for the sun!

54d56f243030316013003007_109.spoken: We're back in business... but our pockets seem to be lighter. Noted, beautiful. Noted.

54d56f243030316013003007_127.spoken: *Whew!* Wow! Smell that fresh air! Feel that victory! Some lucky soul is gonna get a GREAT deal on a drone today. All thanks to you!

54d56f243030316013003007_140.spoken: Thanks. I know what I'm doing. I'm going back now.

54d56f243030316013003007_148.original:
It makes me angry, $(L.name). Angry about this heartless shit heap that calls itself metahumanity.

But it also makes me proud.
54d56f243030316013003007_148.spoken: It makes me angry. Angry about this heartless shit heap that calls itself metahumanity. But it also makes me proud.

54d56f243030316013003007_157.original: Me too, $(L.name). Me too. It's a real pleasure, being real!
54d56f243030316013003007_157.spoken: Me too. Me too. It's a real pleasure, being real!

54d56f243030316013003007_164.original:
{{GM}}Matthew just stares at his feet, for a long time... then mumbles quietly, still looking down.{{/GM}}

I don't want to be here, $(L.name). I don't want any of this.
54d56f243030316013003007_164.spoken: I don't want to be here. I don't want any of this.

54d56f243030316013003007_169.original:
{{GM}}Matthew points at your chest with a cigarillo.{{/GM}}

You, $(L.sir), are an asshole.

54d56f243030316013003007_180.original:
{{GM}}Matthew hastily extracts a fresh cigarillo from his breast pocket. Drops it. Pulls out another.{{/GM}}

Gotta work now! How can I help you, $(L.name), on this lovely, lovely, LOVELY day?
54d56f243030316013003007_180.spoken: Gotta work now! How can I help you, on this lovely, lovely, LOVELY day?

54d56f243030316013003007_204.spoken: I know what you're thinking... I think it myself. "Drones take jobs." Well, medicine takes jobs from undertakers, and sewer drones take jobs from people who used to crawl through filth to feed their families.

54d56f243030316013003007_209.spoken: Mmmm-mmmmm! Wow, just smell that brisk spring air! This topic is fascinating, really fascinating. But, uh... I've got to get back to work. Shall we walk the lot?

54d56f243030316013003007_218.original: I'm glad you understand... you're a scholar as well as a gentle$(L.man), $(L.name)!
54d56f243030316013003007_218.spoken: I'm glad you understand... you're a scholar as well as a gentleman!

54d56f243030316013003007_223.original: Oh! A $(L.man) after my own heart!
54d56f243030316013003007_223.spoken: Oh! A man after my own heart!

550af5e63234375c2f0000a2_12.spoken: You gonna be a dick about this? We're in Hong Kong. Only Cantonese from now on. Just like when we lived at Raymond's house. Those endless drills are about to pay off.

563e7751643661b00e0012c3_5.original:
Yes, we do, Lam. Wake up - we're in trouble here.

Ready your weapons, $(l.name). We're being fucked.
563e7751643661b00e0012c3_5.spoken: Yes, we do, Lam. Wake up - we're in trouble here. Ready your weapons. We're being fucked.

563fdb626436610c0a002c0e_26.original:
Yeah. Look, $(l.name), I *had* to scan you myself. I'm sorry that it hurt, but I couldn't trust the intel that Koo was feeding me.

I did what I had to do. That's the truth, take it or leave it.
563fdb626436610c0a002c0e_26.spoken: Yeah. Look, I *had* to scan you myself. I'm sorry that it hurt, but I couldn't trust the intel that Koo was feeding me. I did what I had to do. That's the truth, take it or leave it.

563fe4ca643661e417003301_16.original:
The SDU is coming for us, $(l.name). They're going to trap us in this room like a wasp in a killing jar.

If we don't help each other, we're all going to die. Trust in that.
563fe4ca643661e417003301_16.spoken: The SDU is coming for us. They're going to trap us in this room like a wasp in a killing jar. If we don't help each other, we're all going to die. Trust in that.

563fe789643661e417003324_1.original: We can't leave here without that PDA, $(l.name). Quit wasting time and grab it.
563fe789643661e417003324_1.spoken: We can't leave here without that PDA. Quit wasting time and grab it.

56412c216436616817006113_11.original:
No. I'll have to find the panel and do it manually.

Listen, $(l.name). I was able to unlock the main door to this command center, but it won't stay that way for long. On-site security initiated a protocol to seal us in here just before they booted me.

We've got a couple of minutes, maybe less, before the locks reengage and we wind up trapped in here.
56412c216436616817006113_11.spoken: No. I'll have to find the panel and do it manually. Listen. I was able to unlock the main door to this command center, but it won't stay that way for long. On-site security initiated a protocol to seal us in here just before they booted me. We've got a couple of minutes, maybe less, before the locks reengage and we wind up trapped in here.

5643ea246436619414006772_2.original:
...And there we go. Staircase unlocked.

Do me a favor and take point, $(l.name). I think that I soaked up some drain busting us out of that trap... my head is swimming.
5643ea246436619414006772_2.spoken: ...And there we go. Staircase unlocked. Do me a favor and take point. I think that I soaked up some drain busting us out of that trap... my head is swimming.

5645228f643661a012003253_3.original:
...There. That wasn't so bad after all.

The panel's unlocked, $(l.name). You take it from here.
5645228f643661a012003253_3.spoken: ...There. That wasn't so bad after all. The panel's unlocked. You take it from here.

5645228f643661a012003253_8.spoken: Good job. I wouldn't have thought of this. Hey, do me a favor and take point, all right? I think that I soaked up some drain busting us out of that trap... my head is swimming.

566213356436616013004496_8.spoken: All right. Let's do it. Lead on. And remember - when you see hostiles, take 'em out. If they manage to raise an alarm, you'd better believe that security personnel will flood into that warehouse, and that's a complication that we don't need.

566213356436616013004496_18.spoken: when we do find a group of Krait's people, we need to be surgical. Take them from ambush if possible, and kill them quickly. That means that we creep ahead, not sprint. And if we spot them, we shoot them before they catch sight of us. Got it?

5668ba94643661cc120023e7_3.spoken: Look at the insignias on those vehicles. Knight Errant-branded police vehicles. Ares regalia on HKPF materiel, and enough firepower to take out half the buildings in Victoria Harbour. Hell, you do the math.

5668ba94643661cc120023e7_37.spoken: Fuck that, I can't even *stand!* I'm useless to you like this! You're going to have to kill her yourself. Just remember what you stand to gain when this is through.

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_22.spoken: I'm too weak to stop you. Do what you're going to do. Enjoy your life in the shadows. You just sacrificed your one and only chance to get out.

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_28.original:
{{GM}}The voice comes out faster this time, carrying an edge of urgency.{{/GM}}

Please stay on the line, $(l.sir). I'm going to get my manager--
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_28.spoken: Please stay on the line. I'm going to get my manager--

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_38.original:
Listen to me, $(l.name). This is your *only* chance at getting out from under Kindly Cheng's thumb. Of getting your old life back.

Are you really willing to give that up?
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_38.spoken: Listen to me. This is your *only* chance at getting out from under Kindly Cheng's thumb. Of getting your old life back. Are you really willing to give that up?

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_48.spoken: I will. Believe it. And thank you. Dial 1343 and tell Corporate that the warehouse is secure. They'll take care of the rest.

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_49.spoken: I... see. And what do you intend to do, exactly? Think before you answer. You'll never get an offer like the one that I'm making you again. You kill me, and you'll never leave the shadows - not for as long as you live.

566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_51.spoken: Hell of a surprise... guess it doesn't matter now, though. Reach into my pocket. Grab my PDA.

5671f1076266321824004dcf_5.spoken: I'm not gonna lie... I'm really hurting over here. I think I'm feeling the delayed aftereffects of that magical energy I soaked up back at the police station. Look, I'll do my best to see this through, but if anything should happen--

56a69b986266327031004206_6.original:
We’re here now, and this is the only chance at this we’re gonna get. So we push forward, whether we want to or not.

C'mon, $(l.name). Let's get this over with.
56a69b986266327031004206_6.spoken: We’re here now, and this is the only chance at this we’re gonna get. So we push forward, whether we want to or not. C'mon. Let's get this over with.

56a69b986266327031004206_7.original:
Guess it's a good thing you've got my back, then.

C'mon, $(l.name). Let's keep moving.
56a69b986266327031004206_7.spoken: Guess it's a good thing you've got my back, then. C'mon. Let's keep moving.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_36.original:
{{GM}}Qiu glances up at you. You don't see anger in her expression, per se... it looks more like disappointment.{{/GM}}

I hope so, too, $(l.name). For your own sake.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_36.spoken: I hope so, too. For your own sake.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_80.original:
{{GM}}Qiu glances up at you. You don't see anger in her expression, per se... it looks more like disappointment.{{/GM}}

I hope that Kindly Cheng appreciates your decision, $(l.name). For your sake, I truly do.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_80.spoken: I hope that Kindly Cheng appreciates your decision. For your sake, I truly do.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_140.original:
It was good working with you, $(l.name). I've gotta admit, in the beginning, I had my doubts... considering what happened to your old team, I wasn't sure that I could trust you.

I've never been so happy to have been proven wrong.
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_140.spoken: It was good working with you. I've gotta admit, in the beginning, I had my doubts... considering what happened to your old team, I wasn't sure that I could trust you. I've never been so happy to have been proven wrong.

5546946b39393684190077c9_25.original: No, $(l.sir). No regrets. No regrets at all.
5546946b39393684190077c9_25.spoken: No. No regrets. No regrets at all.

5546946b39393684190077c9_79.original:
{{GM}}The patriarch of the Ka Fai clan seems more morose than usual. The effect is particularly pronounced because of his massive size and worn granite exterior. He looks like a mountain that has collapsed under its own weight.{{/GM}}

You return to us again, $(l.name).

5546946b39393684190077c9_138.spoken: It is... it is. It's time for me to go.

5546946b39393684190077c9_139.spoken: You're right. She'll be there. Waiting for me. I'll stay this course just a little longer.

5546946b39393684190077c9_144.original: You're a strange $(l.man). But here it is.
5546946b39393684190077c9_144.spoken: You're a strange man. But here it is.

5546946b39393684190077c9_158.original: I wish you well, $(l.name). You have done my family a great service. We can’t thank you enough.
5546946b39393684190077c9_158.spoken: I wish you well. You have done my family a great service. We can’t thank you enough.

5546946b39393684190077c9_171.original: I wish you well, $(l.name). You have done my family a great service. We can’t thank you enough.
5546946b39393684190077c9_171.spoken: I wish you well. You have done my family a great service. We can’t thank you enough.

5546946b39393684190077c9_174.original:
{{GM}}The old troll patriarch has a look of quiet resolve in his eyes.{{/GM}}

Hello, $(L.name). I will abide. I will.
5546946b39393684190077c9_174.spoken: Hello. I will abide. I will.

565f3a6b62663208210043e7_57.original:
>>>>>[Did you authorize a second mind probe of $(l.lastname) while $(l.he) was unconscious? I'm looking at the transcript of $(l.hisher) interview, and $(l.he) insists that two mages were screwing around with $(l.hisher) brain last night.]<<<<<

- Lam_Andy
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_57.spoken: [Did you authorize a second mind probe of the prisoner while they were unconscious? I'm looking at the transcript of their interview, and they insist that two mages were screwing around with their brain last night.] - Lam_Andy

565f3a6b62663208210043e7_58.original:
>>>>>[No. I was against you having $(l.him) scanned in the first place, remember? Why would I give authorization for two different mages to poke around in $(l.hisher) brain?]<<<<<

- Qiu_Fiona
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_58.spoken: >>>>>[No. I was against you having them scanned in the first place, remember? Why would I give authorization for two different mages to poke around in their brain?]<<<<< - Qiu_Fiona

565f3a6b62663208210043e7_60.original:
>>>>>[I didn't authorize anything, Lam. And unless we have a second magical interrogator that I don't know about on the task force, I'm gonna go ahead and guess that $(l.he)'s making it up.]<<<<<

- Qiu_Fiona
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_60.spoken: >>>>>[I didn't authorize anything, Lam. And unless we have a second magical interrogator that I don't know about on the task force, I'm gonna go ahead and guess that they's making it up.]<<<<< - Qiu_Fiona

565f3a6b62663208210043e7_101.original: Go back to your boat, $(l.name). Talk to your team. I'll call you when I know more.
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_101.spoken: Go back to your boat. Talk to your team. I'll call you when I know more.

565f3a6b62663208210043e7_131.original:
Then what is this about? You want me to grovel for you?

Fine. I'm really, really sorry that I hurt you, $(l.name). I wouldn't have done it if I didn't have to, but I didn't feel that I could trust the intel that Koo pulled from you. After what happened in the Tigers' Den, the reason why should be obvious.
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_131.spoken: Then what is this about? You want me to grovel for you? Fine. I'm really, really sorry that I hurt you. I wouldn't have done it if I didn't have to, but I didn't feel that I could trust the intel that Koo pulled from you. After what happened in the Tigers' Den, the reason why should be obvious.

565f3a6b62663208210043e7_137.original:
Look. If we find out who's behind all of this and figure out how to bring them down, you'll be rolling in nuyen. Hell, the reward that I have in store for you is beyond generous. But if you want a heap of cash right now, you're out of luck.

I've drained my personal accounts just getting us here, $(l.name). And I'm not Mitsuhama's most popular employee these days.
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_137.spoken: Look. If we find out who's behind all of this and figure out how to bring them down, you'll be rolling in nuyen. Hell, the reward that I have in store for you is beyond generous. But if you want a heap of cash right now, you're out of luck. I've drained my personal accounts just getting us here. And I'm not Mitsuhama's most popular employee these days.

565f3a6b62663208210043e7_142.original:
{{GM}}She shakes her head to clear it, gritting her teeth in discomfort.{{/GM}}

We've got a job to do, $(l.name). Headache or no, I intend to do it.
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_142.spoken: We've got a job to do. Headache or no, I intend to do it.

56671922306364501800284d_16.original:
I'm sure you've run into somebody with an axe to grind against $(l.race_plural) at some point in your life. Think of that, but make it the law. Now imagine that  the thugs who're getting up in your face think you're a monster that's going to kill their kids.

Long story short, they marched us out at gunpoint. It happened right before I was born, but I heard a lot of stories.
56671922306364501800284d_16.spoken: I'm sure you've run into somebody with an axe to grind against your kind at some point in your life. Think of that, but make it the law. Now imagine that the thugs who're getting up in your face think you're a monster that's going to kill their kids. Long story short, they marched us out at gunpoint. It happened right before I was born, but I heard a lot of stories.

566719dd3063645018002877_6.original:
You don't know the half of it, $(l.man). Take my advice and cook your own food while you're here. Utama's got a "chef" on her crew, but his skill set begins and ends with adding packets of instant noodle flavoring to things.

The man is a culinary butcher, wanted for flavor murder across southeast Asia. Don't trust him.
566719dd3063645018002877_6.spoken: You don't know the half of it, man. Take my advice and cook your own food while you're here. Utama's got a "chef" on her crew, but his skill set begins and ends with adding packets of instant noodle flavoring to things. The man is a culinary butcher, wanted for flavor murder across southeast Asia. Don't trust him.

5600347d626632e015004458_6.original: Savor this moment, $(l.name). You're looking at the end result of me calling in the very last of my favors with Corporate.
5600347d626632e015004458_6.spoken: Savor this moment. You're looking at the end result of me calling in the very last of my favors with Corporate.

5600347d626632e015004458_12.original:
This is gonna be home for the foreseeable future, $(l.name). We've got nowhere else to go, and I'm fresh out of strings to pull.

We get Mitsuhama something that they can use, something *irrefutable,* or we resign ourselves to life on the open sea.
5600347d626632e015004458_12.spoken: This is gonna be home for the foreseeable future. We've got nowhere else to go, and I'm fresh out of strings to pull. We get Mitsuhama something that they can use, something *irrefutable,* or we resign ourselves to life on the open sea.

5600347d626632e015004458_17.original:
Keep your head in the game, $(l.name). We've still got work to do, and we're gonna start with Lam's PDA.

Meet me at my command trailer. We're gonna crack that thing, and we're going to find some answers.
5600347d626632e015004458_17.spoken: Keep your head in the game. We've still got work to do, and we're gonna start with Lam's PDA. Meet me at my command trailer. We're gonna crack that thing, and we're going to find some answers.

5600347d626632e015004458_21.original: Savor this moment, $(l.name). You're looking at the end result of me calling in the very last of my favors with Corporate.
5600347d626632e015004458_21.spoken: Savor this moment. You're looking at the end result of me calling in the very last of my favors with Corporate.

56097ecf643661801100391d_5.spoken: Long story short? We've got a problem, and you're in a unique position to help us solve it. This is a job offer. We want to hire you.

56097ecf643661801100391d_22.original:
You really are the perfect runner for this job, $(l.name). What we pulled from your mind in interrogation confirmed it.

We know that we can trust you for this job, and that's invaluable to people in our position.
56097ecf643661801100391d_22.spoken: You really are the perfect runner for this job. What we pulled from your mind in interrogation confirmed it. We know that we can trust you for this job, and that's invaluable to people in our position.

56097ecf643661801100391d_41.spoken: They should be heading to the Bolthole as we speak. Fun name, by the way.

56097ecf643661801100391d_47.spoken: They should be heading to the Bolthole as we speak. Fun name, by the way.

56097ecf643661801100391d_51.original:
By the way, $(l.name), you and your brother were some of the first victims of Krait's malfeasance. The ABP that Josephine Tsang had her put out on you sent up red flags for us.

You may also be aware that the APB was lifted, and your file scrubbed clean. Lam and I were the ones who made that happen.
56097ecf643661801100391d_51.spoken: By the way, you and your brother were some of the first victims of Krait's malfeasance. The ABP that Josephine Tsang had her put out on you sent up red flags for us. You may also be aware that the APB was lifted, and your file scrubbed clean. Lam and I were the ones who made that happen.

56097ecf643661801100391d_61.spoken: It wasn't a kidnapping. We did you a favor by pulling you off of the streets. Yang showed you the video, you know what I'm talking about.

56097ecf643661801100391d_62.original:
Don't be ridiculous, of course not. We helped you because we've got a problem, and you're in a unique position to help us solve it.

This is a job offer, $(l.name). We want to hire you.
56097ecf643661801100391d_62.spoken: Don't be ridiculous, of course not. We helped you because we've got a problem, and you're in a unique position to help us solve it. This is a job offer. We want to hire you.

56097ecf643661801100391d_63.original:
Maybe not. But as it happens, we do need one from you.

We've got a problem, $(l.name) - one that you're in a unique position to help us solve. We want to hire you.
56097ecf643661801100391d_63.spoken: Maybe not. But as it happens, we do need one from you. We've got a problem - one that you're in a unique position to help us solve. We want to hire you.

5609dc5c643661e00e007ff7_46.original:
These aren't good cops. They're Krait's people - corrupt, violent, and dangerous. The kind of assholes that ruin the public's confidence in the HKPF and put real constables' lives in danger.

No, $(l.name). I don't mind if you shoot them. If I could get away with it, I'd take them out myself.
5609dc5c643661e00e007ff7_46.spoken: These aren't good cops. They're Krait's people - corrupt, violent, and dangerous. The kind of assholes that ruin the public's confidence in the HKPF and put real constables' lives in danger. No. I don't mind if you shoot them. If I could get away with it, I'd take them out myself.

565f332762663208210043d4_11.spoken: We'll to talk to her, then. C'mon. Let's go.

565f3a6b62663208210043e7_66.original:
Yeah, Lam. It is.

Keep going, $(l.name). Let's see what else there is to see.
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_66.spoken: Yeah, Lam. It is. Keep going. Let's see what else there is to see.

565f3a6b62663208210043e7_112.original:
If I had any more surprises in store, I'd have sprung them on you already. But I don't, $(l.name). I'm pissed off, I'm hurt, I'm tired, and I'm scared to death of what's coming.

All that I really want to do is lie down and sleep for a month, but that isn't an option, either.
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_112.spoken: If I had any more surprises in store, I'd have sprung them on you already. But I don't. I'm pissed off, I'm hurt, I'm tired, and I'm scared to death of what's coming. All that I really want to do is lie down and sleep for a month, but that isn't an option, either.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_13.original:
The call was a bust, $(l.name). I've still got a few execs willing to go to bat for me, but the rest have already written us off as a failure. Nobody's gonna risk antagonizing Ares on my say-so.

We're gonna need a hell of a lot more than one misfiled email if we're gonna convince them to move on this.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_13.spoken: The call was a bust. I've still got a few execs willing to go to bat for me, but the rest have already written us off as a failure. Nobody's gonna risk antagonizing Ares on my say-so. We're gonna need a hell of a lot more than one misfiled email if we're gonna convince them to move on this.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_15.spoken: Yeah. Looks that way. Look... I told you that you and your team would be well-compensated for helping me, but I never really specified exactly what your reward would be. I think that you should know.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_21.original:
{{GM}}Qiu's voice cuts in, talking over her.{{/GM}}

As for you, $(l.name)... you're a different story. For you, I've got something better than money.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_21.spoken: As for you... you're a different story. For you, I've got something better than money.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_27.spoken: ...I can't argue with the second part. Okay. You win. Go, do whatever work you need to do. Tie up loose ends, make your clients happy. Take in the sights on the Benteng. All the standard stuff. When you're finished, go to Jomo. He'll sneak us into Tai Po, and we can finish this.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_28.spoken: Oh, and, uh. Your boss's rock... that cong that you took from Eddie Pang... got broken in the move. I found it in about fifty pieces when we got here. It's in the wastebasket under my desk if you still want it, but I can't imagine it's worth much any more. Sorry about that.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_60.spoken: Okay... do whatever you need to do. It'll give me a chance to close my eyes for a few minutes, if nothing else. When you're finished, go to Jomo. He'll sneak us into Tai Po, and we can finish this.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_61.original:
Go to Jomo when you're ready. He'll sneak us into Tai Po, and we'll bring this thing to a close.

Oh, and $(l.name)... I can't promise that we'll come back to the Benteng after this is over. Take in the sights now, because it might be the last chance you get.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_61.spoken: Go to Jomo when you're ready. He'll sneak us into Tai Po, and we'll bring this thing to a close. Oh, and listen... I can't promise that we'll come back to the Benteng after this is over. Take in the sights now, because it might be the last chance you get.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_72.original: Listen, $(l.name)... forget about the money. I've got something better lined up for you.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_72.spoken: Listen... forget about the money. I've got something better lined up for you.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_78.spoken: Look... I told you that you and your team would be well-compensated for helping me, but I never really specified exactly what your reward would be. I think that you should know.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_79.spoken: I'm happy for you. Me, I'd rather have an amphibious assault squad and air support on my side, but what do I know? You're the shadowrunner. Look... I told you that you and your team would be well-compensated for helping me, but I never really specified exactly what your reward would be. I think that you should know.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_80.original:
The call was a bust, $(l.name). I've still got a few execs willing to go to bat for me, but the rest have already written us off as a failure. Nobody's gonna risk sparking off a corp war on my say-so, and I can't even tell them who they'd be fighting against.

We're gonna need a hell of a lot more than we've got if we're going to convince anyone to move on this.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_80.spoken: The call was a bust. I've still got a few execs willing to go to bat for me, but the rest have already written us off as a failure. Nobody's gonna risk sparking off a corp war on my say-so, and I can't even tell them who they'd be fighting against. We're gonna need a hell of a lot more than we've got if we're going to convince anyone to move on this.

55469435393936841900773d_42.original:
{{GM}}Frederick Ka Fai stands stolidly by the club door, his arms folded across an impossibly large chest. He eyes those entering and leaving the club like a god might look down from Olympus, and he smiles while doing so.{{/GM}}

Hey, $(l.name). Been hearing more about you.
55469435393936841900773d_42.spoken: Hey. Been hearing more about you.

55469435393936841900773d_81.original: You getting cute with me, $(l.name)? Because you know, I’ve been letting you strut about with your arms on account of respect for what you do. Don’t go making me rethink that.
55469435393936841900773d_81.spoken: You getting cute with me? Because you know, I’ve been letting you strut about with your arms on account of respect for what you do. Don’t go making me rethink that.

55469435393936841900773d_141.original:
{{GM}}Freddy Ka Fai greets all comers at the front entrance of Club 88. He performs his duty like a professional. No more fooling around, no more fantasies. The patrons note the difference and show him a new sort of respect.{{/GM}}

Good to see you back, $(l.name).

5546930d3939368419006863_47.original:
{{GM}}Callum sits with his eyes closed and his head back. One might assume he’s asleep or trying to shake a particularly nasty hangover. But when he stirs, his eyes are clear and uncharacteristically focused.{{/GM}}

$(l.name), right? What brings you back?

5546930d3939368419006863_99.original:
{{GM}}Callum is in a rare state, steeped neither in melancholy nor in alcohol-fueled oblivion. His excitement can barely be held back by the corners of his mouth, and this comes in stark contrast to the dread hanging over Heoi.{{/GM}}

This is it, $(l.name). It’s actually happening!
5546930d3939368419006863_99.spoken: This is it. It’s actually happening!

5546930d3939368419006863_115.original:
{{GM}}Callum nods thoughtfully.{{/GM}}

Thanks, $(L.name). I think you might be right... even though I wish you weren't.
5546930d3939368419006863_115.spoken: Thanks. I think you might be right... even though I wish you weren't.

55e8b58a643661a812007a17_14.spoken: We don't even have two mages on-site. There's no way that you got scanned twice. But hey, believe what you want. Don't let it distract you, though... we've got work to do.

55e8b58a643661a812007a17_16.spoken: ...Yeah. Figured you might say something like that. Look, you aren't gonna keep anything from us by refusing to cooperate. We've already pulled all the facts from your brain. They're just... disorganized. Jumbled up a bit.

55e8b58a643661a812007a17_102.spoken: We know a lot of things about you. One of the many benefits of magical interrogation - it cuts through the bullshit and gets you right to the facts. Sorry about the nosebleed, by the way.

55e8b58a643661a812007a17_105.original:
I'd advise you to keep your threats to yourself, $(l.honorific) $(l.lastname). You aren't going anywhere unless we choose to let you go. 

By the way, the nosebleed that you suffered was nothing - a minor side effect of magical interrogation. Believe me, it could've been a lot worse.
55e8b58a643661a812007a17_105.spoken: I'd advise you to keep your threats to yourself. You aren't going anywhere unless we choose to let you go. By the way, the nosebleed that you suffered was nothing - a minor side effect of magical interrogation. Believe me, it could've been a lot worse.

56049c1c643661740e00133d_2.original:
Very good. Thank you for recapping all of that for me, $(l.honorific) $(l.lastname). Your testimony was extremely helpful.

And now that you've helped us, it's only fair that you learn something in return.
56049c1c643661740e00133d_2.spoken: Very good. Thank you for recapping all of that for me. Your testimony was extremely helpful. And now that you've helped us, it's only fair that you learn something in return.

56049c1c643661740e00133d_46.original:
Y'know, as a rule, I don't like smartasses, but you make a fair point.

All right. Thank you for recapping all of that for me, $(l.honorific) $(l.lastname). Your testimony was extremely helpful.
56049c1c643661740e00133d_46.spoken: Y'know, as a rule, I don't like smartasses, but you make a fair point. All right. Thank you for recapping all of that for me. Your testimony was extremely helpful.

55924316303035cc1d0042e3_70.spoken: Sorry. If I give away any more product, I'll wind up a charity case myself. Be a good man and give that sample to Stephen. I can't claim that it will cure his bad dreams, but it should provide him some modicum of relief.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_4.spoken: Just so. My servants have been watching you since you arrived. I suspect that you are an evil man, and that you are here to do harm to Neville. And so I came to stop you.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_6.original:
You may call me Ku Feng. My servants have been watching you since you arrived.

I suspect that you are an evil $(l.man), and that you are here to do harm to Neville. And so I came to stop you.
54be84343063641c1f00153f_6.spoken: You may call me Ku Feng. My servants have been watching you since you arrived. I suspect that you are an evil man, and that you are here to do harm to Neville. And so I came to stop you.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_29.spoken: No more foolish questions. I am Ku Feng, and I will tolerate no disrespect. I suspect that you are an evil man. I think that you are here to do harm to Neville, and I am here to stop you.

54be84343063641c1f00153f_31.original:
You think yourself so clever, sniffing around Neville's affairs like an amateur detective. So sly. So quiet.

But you are not quiet enough to escape my ears, little $(l.man).
54be84343063641c1f00153f_31.spoken: You think yourself so clever, sniffing around Neville's affairs like an amateur detective. So sly. So quiet. But you are not quiet enough to escape my ears, little man.

54be866c3063641c1f001550_1.original: Are you prepared to become my servant, $(l.race)? You must not resist, or I'll be forced to kill you. Should it come to that, I'll endeavor to make it swift and painless... but no promises.
54be866c3063641c1f001550_1.spoken: Are you prepared to become my servant, mortal? You must not resist, or I'll be forced to kill you. Should it come to that, I'll endeavor to make it swift and painless... but no promises.

54be866c3063641c1f001550_2.spoken: This will be entertaining. Kill them!

54be866c3063641c1f001550_3.spoken: This will be entertaining. Kill them!

5566624c3234310817000fb3_3.spoken: We can't go in. Not unless you're actively looking to get hurt. I've dealt with these people - they're not right in the head.

5567dd753234317c1b00101d_1.spoken: I'm afraid that we're going to have to part ways here. The negative energy of this place has grown a little too strong for my liking.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_47.spoken: Well, see? There you go. If you had a good lawyer, that wouldn't be a problem. Saves you a world of trouble, man.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_59.original:
{{GM}}Leaning against the weapons table, Shen rests one hand atop a glass-covered case. Inside the case is a thin Chinese sword - a jian - with an ornate grip and blade etchings. A small label on the side of the case reads "For White Ming."{{/GM}}

Ho there, $(l.name). Come to find a blade, or maybe some ginseng and peony root?
54d55f873030311411003a6c_59.spoken: Ho there. Come to find a blade, or maybe some ginseng and peony root?

54d55f873030311411003a6c_60.spoken: You think all I do is sit on this boat and wait for you to show up? Come on. You're Kindly Cheng's pet shadowrunner. Your name's all over Heoi. You stand out, man. That's a good thing. It means you're becoming somebody, not staying one of the forgettables.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_94.original:
You're at the edge of the Walled City, $(l.name). That's the kind of hellhole that gets created when we let the megas get their way. I've had people moralize and preach at me about being a better person. To hell with that.

{{GM}}Shen spits off the side of the boat, scowling.{{/GM}}
54d55f873030311411003a6c_94.spoken: You're at the edge of the Walled City. That's the kind of hellhole that gets created when we let the megas get their way. I've had people moralize and preach at me about being a better person. To hell with that.

54d55f873030311411003a6c_121.original:
{{GM}}Shen nods in greeting as you approach.{{/GM}}

Good to see you, $(l.name). What can I get you today?
54d55f873030311411003a6c_121.spoken: Good to see you. What can I get you today?

555a5164323437080f00276b_102.original:
{{GM}}Duncan grinds his teeth.{{/GM}}

Seriously, $(l.firstname)? *Money?* You expected that to work?!
555a5164323437080f00276b_102.spoken: Seriously? *Money?* You expected that to work?!

555a5164323437080f00276b_103.original:
{{GM}}Is0bel's eyes narrow.{{/GM}}

Seriously, $(l.name)? *Money?* You expected that to work?!
555a5164323437080f00276b_103.spoken: Seriously? *Money?* You expected that to work?!

555a5164323437080f00276b_126.original:
I'm with Izz, $(story.Global_Gobbet_Nickname). This is fucking stupid, and if you can't see that, you deserve a bullet in the head.

I don't wanna shoot you. Please don't force me to.
555a5164323437080f00276b_126.spoken: I'm with Izz, Seattle. This is fucking stupid, and if you can't see that, you deserve a bullet in the head. I don't wanna shoot you. Please don't force me to.

55bd19c6626632801f003c8e_1.original:
Let the meaninglessness of their deaths serve to seal our arrangement. Leave this place, $(l.firstname) $(l.lastname) - there is nothing here for you now but sorrow and pain.

Step beyond the boundaries of our Queendom, and reap the benefits of our benevolence. Fourteen years of good fortune, just as we promised.
55bd19c6626632801f003c8e_1.spoken: Let the meaninglessness of their deaths serve to seal our arrangement. Leave this place, mortal - there is nothing here for you now but sorrow and pain. Step beyond the boundaries of our Queendom, and reap the benefits of our benevolence. Fourteen years of good fortune, just as we promised.

5600347d626632e015004458_46.spoken: You're correct, of course. Guava juice, freshly pressed from fruit grown in the Yuen Long District. I respect a man who knows their fruit. Extravagances such as this serve us well on the open sea; scurvy is no joke, after all.

5600347d626632e015004458_57.original:
$(l.name), this is Trompa. 

{{GM}}The three-eyed snake lifts its head from the edge of the table, revealing a powerfully-muscled neck. Its long tongue flickers twice more, as if to greet you.{{/GM}}

55455138656333641b003bab_10.original:
{{GM}}Bao's gaze doesn't flicker.{{/GM}}

Just take care of it, $(L.name).

55455138656333641b003bab_18.original:
{{GM}}Bao stares at you with pure, patient malevolence.{{/GM}}

Someday, $(L.name)... we'll finish what we started.
55455138656333641b003bab_18.spoken: Someday... we'll finish what we started.

55455138656333641b003bab_20.spoken: This needs to be handled soon. Thank you. Your skill is appreciated.

55455138656333641b003bab_28.original:
{{GM}}Bao's eyes widen with hate.{{/GM}}

Someday, $(L.name), we'll finish this.

555f608e6236667431006bac_49.spoken: What is wrong with you? Auntie Cheng's lost too many runners already. Besides, there are cleaner ways to end your life than jumping in front of a train.

5600327e626632e01500440a_32.original:
{{GM}}Jomo guffaws loudly, slapping a hand against his thigh.{{/GM}}

This is why we are friends, $(l.name)! No matter what the situation, you keep your sense of humor. It will be good to work together again, even if it's the police who are paying me this time.
5600327e626632e01500440a_32.spoken: This is why we are friends! No matter what the situation, you keep your sense of humor. It will be good to work together again, even if it's the police who are paying me this time.

5600327e626632e01500440a_35.original:
Ahh! You must be $(l.name). Qiu and Lam told me about you. I am Captain Jomo - pirate, smuggler, man of fashion, and owner of one of the fastest boats in Hong Kong.

I am to be your transportation while you work with the police.
5600327e626632e01500440a_35.spoken: Ahh! You must be the one Qiu and Lam told me about. I am Captain Jomo - pirate, smuggler, man of fashion, and owner of one of the fastest boats in Hong Kong. I am to be your transportation while you work with the police.

565f332762663208210043d4_2.spoken: Oh-ho? And this worries you? Take it from me... it shouldn't. Look around you. See for yourself.

565f332762663208210043d4_21.spoken: Qiu, you're with me. We have a captain to meet.

56ad342b626632980d007eb8_10.original:
Yes, my friend. And from there, directly onto the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName)!

Kindly Cheng has informed me that big changes are afoot within her organization, and that we should prepare ourselves for a lengthy voyage aboard your fine ship!
56ad342b626632980d007eb8_10.spoken: Yes, my friend. And from there, directly onto the Bolthole! Kindly Cheng has informed me that big changes are afoot within her organization, and that we should prepare ourselves for a lengthy voyage aboard your fine ship!

54e393aa3063640c0c0027dc_78.spoken: A wise decision. Farewell. And good luck.

54e3b9f43063640c0c00288f_17.original:
I'm not sure you want to pick this fight, $(l.name)!

Hand over the goods, and I'll pay you in nuyen. Less than initially promised, of course, but it's better than being paid in bullets.
54e3b9f43063640c0c00288f_17.spoken: I'm not sure you want to pick this fight! Hand over the goods, and I'll pay you in nuyen. Less than initially promised, of course, but it's better than being paid in bullets.

54e615b33063644414007020_2.spoken: A pleasure. I will be certain to recommend you to anyone who asks after reliable freelancers. Good evening.

5616dd7530636484010066e6_9.original:
Now that you've been treated, will you leave the remaining antidote in the sub bay?

Please, do this for me. You know that I run a Shiawase lab... I've got money, believe it. Give me the vials that you don't need, and you'll be a very rich $(l.man).
5616dd7530636484010066e6_9.spoken: Now that you've been treated, will you leave the remaining antidote in the sub bay? Please, do this for me. You know that I run a Shiawase lab... I've got money, believe it. Give me the vials that you don't need, and you'll be a very rich man.

56182456306364e415006ab9_18.spoken: Now, unlike you, this shadowrunner dealt straight with me - they let me and my team live. Somehow I doubt that you would have done the same. The way that I see it, I owe a lot to this runner, and I intend to return the favor. *Now.*

56182456306364e415006ab9_22.spoken: Now, unlike you, this shadowrunner dealt straight with me - they let me and my team live. Somehow I doubt that you would have done the same. The way that I see it, I owe a lot to this runner, and I intend to return the favor. *Now.*

5640cca7306364b811003b46_27.spoken: And *that's* why you don't have to worry about me running into open fire. man, I *got* this.

564528e4306364e01b008184_31.spoken: Truth is, that Fuchi locked me up inside my own goddamn penthouse. Didn't want their botched experiment getting out. But to hell with that! I want to *live!* I didn't spend my life in servitude to Fuchi to end in... in *un*birth.

564528e4306364e01b008184_45.spoken: I don't know. What do you think? I just don't know...

557109403234316c1c0044d9_36.original:
C'mon, $(l.name). We got what we came for.

Let's go ho--
557109403234316c1c0044d9_36.spoken: C'mon. We got what we came for. Let's go ho--

557109403234316c1c0044d9_38.spoken: Oh, that son of a bitch. Rhom must've called the cops... he's probably got a PanicButton, or something. Get ready. We've got company.

557109403234316c1c0044d9_56.original:
$+(l.he)'s right, Izz. That's exactly what this is.

Look, you want the encryption key for the memories that we locked away? It's yours.

I don't envy you the pain that you'll feel when you unlock them, but that's your decision to make.
557109403234316c1c0044d9_56.spoken: they's right, Izz. That's exactly what this is. Look, you want the encryption key for the memories that we locked away? It's yours. I don't envy you the pain that you'll feel when you unlock them, but that's your decision to make.

563a7eb8306364fc140006b9_81.original:
If anyone asks, this $(l.man) here is an associate of mine.

Now, my new friend and I have business to attend to. *Step aside.*
563a7eb8306364fc140006b9_81.spoken: If anyone asks, this man here is an associate of mine. Now, my new friend and I have business to attend to. *Step aside.*

54b99b13306364e41b000280_25.original:
{{GM}}He takes the invitation and scrutinizes it. He then looks at you, reluctance plain on his face.{{/GM}}

Enjoy the party, $(l.sir).

54b99b13306364e41b000280_26.original:
{{GM}}The security guard pauses. He leans forward and scans your face, his expression uncertain. After a moment, he steps back.{{/GM}}

Yeah... Yeah, I remember you. Talking to Kevin Chiu. Terribly sorry, $(l.sir). Won't happen again.
54b99b13306364e41b000280_26.spoken: Yeah... Yeah, I remember you. Talking to Kevin Chiu. Terribly sorry. Won't happen again.

54eb9f4a3430617007000f3f_8.original:
{{GM}}The troll ignores your threat, unphased, his eyes gliding across the faces of newly-arrived guests.{{/GM}}

Believe me, $(l.sir), you'd find the consequences of such an outburst most…unsavory. Behave yourself, and you'll get to indulge in the fine cuisine here at Shangri-La. Good evening.
54eb9f4a3430617007000f3f_8.spoken: Believe me, you'd find the consequences of such an outburst most…unsavory. Behave yourself, and you'll get to indulge in the fine cuisine here at Shangri-La. Good evening.

54eb9f4a3430617007000f3f_9.original: Certainly not, $(l.sir). Most of our weekday business is confined to the private rooms upstairs. Corporate affairs and such...
54eb9f4a3430617007000f3f_9.spoken: Certainly not. Most of our weekday business is confined to the private rooms upstairs. Corporate affairs and such...

54f1208b3430615c05005793_0.original:
{{GM}}A guard steps forward and raises his hand.{{/GM}}

Sorry, $(l.sir). This area's off limits.

54fe12ff343061c813005052_0.original:
{{GM}}The guard watches you with suspicion as you approach.{{/GM}}

You seem confused, $(l.sir). Something I can help you with?
54fe12ff343061c813005052_0.spoken: You seem confused. Something I can help you with?

54fe12ff343061c813005052_4.original:
{{GM}}The guard watches you with suspicion as you approach.{{/GM}}

You seem confused, $(l.sir). Something I can help you with?
54fe12ff343061c813005052_4.spoken: You seem confused. Something I can help you with?

54fe12ff343061c813005052_11.original:
{{GM}}The guard hastily scans your face.{{/GM}}

I... I don't... please forgive me, $(l.sir). Just let me see your ID, and I'll let you through.
54fe12ff343061c813005052_11.spoken: I... I don't... please forgive me. Just let me see your ID, and I'll let you through.

56097ecf643661801100391d_3.spoken: Yes, of course. My apologies, Senior Inspector Qiu. And as for you... you must be wondering what you and your team are doing here.

56097ecf643661801100391d_27.spoken: I hope to change that....And in the interest of full disclosure, we are both technically Mitsuhama employees.

56097ecf643661801100391d_28.original:
We're nearer to Aberdeen than we are to Heoi. That's about all that you need to know.

Secrecy is one of our most important tools for survival, $(l.name). We can't give you an exact address.
56097ecf643661801100391d_28.spoken: We're nearer to Aberdeen than we are to Heoi. That's about all that you need to know. Secrecy is one of our most important tools for survival. We can't give you an exact address.

56097ecf643661801100391d_37.original: Our motives aren't sinister, $(l.honorific) $(l.lastname). But you do know about this task force, and unfortunately, that makes you a security risk.
56097ecf643661801100391d_37.spoken: Our motives aren't sinister. But you do know about this task force, and unfortunately, that makes you a security risk.

56097ecf643661801100391d_49.original: That APB should never have been called on you in the first place, $(l.name). We rescinded it to correct an injustice, not to put you in our debt.
56097ecf643661801100391d_49.spoken: That APB should never have been called on you in the first place. We rescinded it to correct an injustice, not to put you in our debt.

5609dc5c643661e00e007ff7_30.original:
She's right, $(l.name). We can't afford to take any chances.

If Krait and her employers find out about this task force, it'll put our entire operation in jeopardy.
5609dc5c643661e00e007ff7_30.spoken: She's right. We can't afford to take any chances. If Krait and her employers find out about this task force, it'll put our entire operation in jeopardy.

5609dc5c643661e00e007ff7_56.original:
If $(l.honorific) $(l.lastname) is ready, certainly.

This briefing is for $(l.hisher) benefit, Qiu. Not yours.
5609dc5c643661e00e007ff7_56.spoken: If our guest is ready, certainly. This briefing is for their benefit, Qiu. Not yours.

5609dc5c643661e00e007ff7_64.original:
Those protocols will be revisited soon enough, believe me.

There are going to be a lot of changes inside of the HKPF after we've completed this mission, $(l.honorific) $(l.lastname). I promise you that.
5609dc5c643661e00e007ff7_64.spoken: Those protocols will be revisited soon enough, believe me. There are going to be a lot of changes inside of the HKPF after we've completed this mission. I promise you that.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_20.spoken: Oh, come, now. Don't storm off in a huff. Our conversation was only just getting started.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_21.original:
{{GM}}Shyu and Gin exchange a look. They glance between you and Lau before Gin finally leans forward and speaks to you in a low voice.{{/GM}}

Because, $(l.name), Master Lau--

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_60.spoken: You can't come in here demanding this and that of us! Show some respect to your elders, young man. Just what makes you think we'd be comfortable telling a stranger about our dreams, anyway?

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_119.original:
{{GM}}He points at you.{{/GM}}

I can see right through that ennui of yours, young $(l.man). Trying to appear "cool" and "hip" - well, you don't need to play it up here. We're already unimpressed.
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_119.spoken: I can see right through that ennui of yours, young man. Trying to appear "cool" and "hip" - well, you don't need to play it up here. We're already unimpressed.

54c2c61f30636498210021b1_24.spoken: Good man! That's what I like to hear! When you're done, drop Cheng a line - I'll come meet you back here and I'll hand over the money.

5600340a626632e015004432_20.spoken: ...I mean. About time I got that right. What brings you to my corner?

5600340a626632e015004432_50.original:
I go by Hui.

You're $(l.lastname), right? That's what it said on the form.
5600340a626632e015004432_50.spoken: I go by Hui. I saw your name on the form. That's you, right?

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_4.original: Ahh, $(l.name)! I've the urge to hug you, but I doubt these old bones could withstand your embrace. So good of you to visit us old men again.
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_4.spoken: Ahh! I've the urge to hug you, but I doubt these old bones could withstand your embrace. So good of you to visit us old men again.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_12.spoken: I believe that's the first time you've ever called our friend here by their name, Gin. Don't tell me you're growing *fond* of them!

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_41.original: You should practice your Go, $(l.name). Then someday we can all play together.
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_41.spoken: You should practice your Go. Then someday we can all play together.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_44.spoken: Why, hello young man. Something you need?

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_52.spoken: Ahh. You got me there, Gin. Why, hello there, young man. Something you need?

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_70.original: Nonsense! Master Lau and I have both told $(l.him) our dreams. And now it's your turn.
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_70.spoken: Nonsense! Master Lau and I have both told them our dreams. And now it's your turn.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_89.original: Of course. Stop by again sometime soon, $(l.name). Your company has been refreshing.
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_89.spoken: Of course. Stop by again sometime soon. Your company has been refreshing.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_90.original: It seems that way. Stop by again sometime soon, $(l.name).
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_90.spoken: It seems that way. Stop by again sometime soon.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_91.original: Of course. Take care, $(l.name). And if you find some time on your hands, you're always welcome at our game table.
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_91.spoken: Of course. Take care. And if you find some time on your hands, you're always welcome at our game table.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_92.original: Appreciated, young $(l.man). We'll be seeing you.
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_92.spoken: Appreciated, young man. We'll be seeing you.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_132.original:
{{GM}}Shyu's eyes eagerly seek you out, and land on your face with silent relief. He gives you a shy smile.{{/GM}}

Welcome back, $(l.name).

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_158.original: You should practice your Go, $(l.name). Then someday we can all play together.
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_158.spoken: You should practice your Go. Then someday we can all play together.

54e3b9f43063640c0c00288f_9.original:
{{GM}}Hwang shakes his head at you, incredulous.{{/GM}}

What is *wrong* with you, $(l.man)?! I laid everything out for you, and you're still not--
54e3b9f43063640c0c00288f_9.spoken: What is *wrong* with you, man?! I laid everything out for you, and you're still not--

54e3b9f43063640c0c00288f_16.spoken: A wise decision. I'll see the money is wired to your account. Farewell. And good luck.

55a59bbf306364900e0061a5_8.original:
{{GM}}X-Floh is crouched over the bar, nursing a glass of something brown and unfettered by niceties such as ice or garnish. As you approach, she lifts a hand in greeting.{{/GM}}

Welcome to the party, $(l.name). Hope you're not in the mood for anything fancy. The best you can hope for in here is not to go blind.
55a59bbf306364900e0061a5_8.spoken: Welcome to the party. Hope you're not in the mood for anything fancy. The best you can hope for in here is not to go blind.

55a59bbf306364900e0061a5_10.original:
{{GM}}X-Floh stands up, reaching over the bar to pull out an unmarked bottle and a spare glass from the other side. She tops off her own drink, and pours one for you.{{/GM}}

Bottoms up, $(l.name). After the stuff we've been doing, I think we could both use it.
55a59bbf306364900e0061a5_10.spoken: Bottoms up. After the stuff we've been doing, I think we could both use it.

55a59bbf306364900e0061a5_12.original:
{{GM}}The elf cuts loose with a single, sharp laugh, and slaps a palm down on the bar.{{/GM}}

You're a $(l.man) after my own heart, that's for sure. I can drink to that attitude.
55a59bbf306364900e0061a5_12.spoken: You're a man after my own heart, that's for sure. I can drink to that attitude.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_32.original:
That shit creeps me out. I mean, seriously. Nobody should be as lucky as you are, not even in the Sixth World.

So yeah... we're supposed to be here. I get it. But I don't like it. Do you know why they're holding us, $(l.name)?
5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_32.spoken: That shit creeps me out. I mean, seriously. Nobody should be as lucky as you are, not even in the Sixth World. So yeah... we're supposed to be here. I get it. But I don't like it. Do you know why they're holding us?

5525b55b30636400170026dc_36.original: Is there anything we can do for you, $(l.name)?
5525b55b30636400170026dc_36.spoken: Is there anything we can do for you?

5525b55b30636400170026dc_76.spoken: You believe this vermin? This creature that feasts on metahuman flesh, that kills and dismembers our tribesmen? You are a naive and foolish man, if that's the case. What proof do you have that Magpie is dead?

5525b32a30636444150020a1_18.spoken: In that case, take the damn key. You'll have to forgive me if I don't want to go down there with you. Knock yourself out, man. There's an entrance up by the Jade Mountain restaurant. Can't miss it.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_75.original:
{{GM}}Porter nods at the Elders, looking back to you with a wary expression.{{/GM}}

I'm interested to hear what kind of evidence you have to support this theory, $(l.name). As far as I can tell, this monster killed Tong and the others, and that makes him a threat that should be eliminated.
5525b55b30636400170026dc_75.spoken: I'm interested to hear what kind of evidence you have to support this theory. As far as I can tell, this monster killed Tong and the others, and that makes him a threat that should be eliminated.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_123.original:
The waters are muddy on this matter. The ghoul seems to be telling some of the truth, and I respect that. But the fact remains: he is a dangerous creature who's killed many of our number.

Our law is clear on this - he must die. You seem to be blameless in this, $(l.name) - what do you say to this decision?
5525b55b30636400170026dc_123.spoken: The waters are muddy on this matter. The ghoul seems to be telling some of the truth, and I respect that. But the fact remains: he is a dangerous creature who's killed many of our number. Our law is clear on this - he must die. You seem to be blameless in this - what do you say to this decision?

5525b55b30636400170026dc_130.original:
{{GM}}Porter turns to face you.{{/GM}}

Thank you, $(l.name). I'll make certain that justice is meted out. You are free to go, and I will ensure payment is delivered to you - so long as you take Gaichu with you. I can't have him staying here.
5525b55b30636400170026dc_130.spoken: Thank you. I'll make certain that justice is meted out. You are free to go, and I will ensure payment is delivered to you - so long as you take Gaichu with you. I can't have him staying here.

5668ba94643661cc120023e7_64.spoken: In a way, I think that's what they're doing. Look at the insignias on those vehicles. Knight Errant-branded police vehicles... Ares regalia on HKPF materiel, and enough firepower to take out half the buildings in Victoria Harbour. Hell, you do the math.

566b46da643661f4110066d7_1.spoken: That was quite a feat, taking down our people like that. Hell, you’ve even hijacked one of Ares' spider drones. Very impressive. Don't get your hopes up, though. It won't be enough to save you.

566b46da643661f4110066d7_16.original:
Look, $(l.name). If you've got that monster on your side, I don't want a thing to do with you... Ares isn't paying me enough to deal with that nightmare again. So I'll tell you what I'm gonna do. On the count of three, I'm going to tell my men to lower their weapons. And then we're going to walk out of here, calmly and peacefully.

You take the warehouse, and we disappear.
566b46da643661f4110066d7_16.spoken: Look. If you've got that monster on your side, I don't want a thing to do with you... Ares isn't paying me enough to deal with that nightmare again. So I'll tell you what I'm gonna do. On the count of three, I'm going to tell my men to lower their weapons. And then we're going to walk out of here, calmly and peacefully. You take the warehouse, and we disappear.

566b46da643661f4110066d7_37.spoken: Don't insult me. I've got a job to do, same as you do. Speaking of which...

566b46da643661f4110066d7_38.spoken: Sorry. Not gonna happen. You made a decent point back there, but that's all it was, and I still have a job to do. Speaking of which...

566b46da643661f4110066d7_40.original:
All right, $(l.name). I'll tell you what I'm gonna do. On the count of three, I'm going to tell my men to lower their weapons. And then we're going to walk out of here, calmly and peacefully.

You take the warehouse, and we disappear.
566b46da643661f4110066d7_40.spoken: All right. I'll tell you what I'm gonna do. On the count of three, I'm going to tell my men to lower their weapons. And then we're going to walk out of here, calmly and peacefully. You take the warehouse, and we disappear.

566b46da643661f4110066d7_42.spoken: We're out of here. Pleasure doing business. Oh, and you should know... it was never anything personal. I was just carrying out my clients' wishes - first Jo Tsang's, then Ares'. Same as you do every day.

557650c5623666c02b003595_8.spoken: they needs *what?* I don't think I should be getting into this.

557650c5623666c02b003595_60.original: I don't know, $(l.man). I'm kinda done with the business.
557650c5623666c02b003595_60.spoken: I don't know, man. I'm kinda done with the business.

557650c5623666c02b003595_62.original:
That's great, $(l.name). Now, go away.

I got my own problems to deal with.
557650c5623666c02b003595_62.spoken: That's great. Now, go away. I got my own problems to deal with.

569ed20a306364a81f0057b1_16.spoken: You wound me! Food of the gods, I promise you.

55a6a50c306364f41b0073cb_11.original:
{{GM}}Eos has the internal workings of a micro-drone spread out on the table in front of her. She pokes and prods at it with a multimeter, studiously marking the results on a nearby PDA. As you approach, she holds up a hand.{{/GM}}

Shhh, $(l.name). Thirty seconds. Then I'll have all of this down, and can give you--
55a6a50c306364f41b0073cb_11.spoken: Shhh. Thirty seconds. Then I'll have all of this down, and can give you--

55a6a50c306364f41b0073cb_14.original:
{{GM}}Eos is examining a disassembled micro-drone, the parts spread across the grimy table she's at. She excitedly waves you over.{{/GM}}

Hey, $(l.name)! Check this out!

55a59c0b306364900e0061b4_6.spoken: Hey there! Welcome to the party. Hope your night's going well. Have a drink with me.

54d5426a323437e81a005d05_19.original:
{{GM}}Is0bel gives you a sidelong glance.{{/GM}}

Cheng didn't want any Yellow Lotus killed, $(l.lastname).
54d5426a323437e81a005d05_19.spoken: Cheng didn't want any Yellow Lotus killed.

54eb63293234375428006ec6_11.original: I don't offer a lot of compliments, $(l.name). Not my style. But that... that was a thing of beauty.
54eb63293234375428006ec6_11.spoken: I don't offer a lot of compliments. Not my style. But that... that was a thing of beauty.

5585e03e626632881500678d_1.original: What do you want, $(l.man)? We're talking here.
5585e03e626632881500678d_1.spoken: What do you want, man? We're talking here.

559d82ed62663268440067a6_7.original:
Smart $(l.man). 

Nothing can fix what's coming for the Walled City, and Heoi is *way* too close to that place for comfort.
559d82ed62663268440067a6_7.spoken: Smart man. Nothing can fix what's coming for the Walled City, and Heoi is *way* too close to that place for comfort.

5588a592303031e827004f11_7.original:
Then you've decided. A pity. I was hoping that we could do business together. 

Well, let's not drag this out... get $(l.him)!
5588a592303031e827004f11_7.spoken: Then you've decided. A pity. I was hoping that we could do business together. Well, let's not drag this out... get them!

5588a592303031e827004f11_8.spoken: I knew you were a reasonable man. Good luck to you.

55a59ab130636420200089d6_3.original:
{{GM}}Fixing you with a dubious look, the elf cocks his head.{{/GM}}

What the hell do you think, $(l.man)? Look at you. We're obviously working the same angle here in Heoi.
55a59ab130636420200089d6_3.spoken: What the hell do you think, man? Look at you. We're obviously working the same angle here in Heoi.

55a59ab130636420200089d6_14.original: Good to see you, $(l.name). We have another job coming up?
55a59ab130636420200089d6_14.spoken: Good to see you. We have another job coming up?

54f6285b306364140400187c_33.original:
{{GM}}The receptionist raises an eyebrow very slowly.{{/GM}}

You're just stringing business-related words together, $(l.sir). You have no idea what those mean, do you?
54f6285b306364140400187c_33.spoken: You're just stringing business-related words together. You have no idea what those mean, do you?

54f6285b306364140400187c_37.original:
...If you say so, $(l.sir). Not my sort of party, I suppose.

Please go inside, but don't leave this floor. Your friend can escort you up.
54f6285b306364140400187c_37.spoken: ...If you say so. Not my sort of party, I suppose. Please go inside, but don't leave this floor. Your friend can escort you up.

54f6285b306364140400187c_46.original: Excuse me, $(l.sir), you have to check in before entering the building.
54f6285b306364140400187c_46.spoken: Excuse me, you have to check in before entering the building.

54f6285b306364140400187c_47.original: Good evening, $(l.sir). How may I assist you?
54f6285b306364140400187c_47.spoken: Good evening. How may I assist you?

559f14f7303031181b0064f0_6.spoken: there they are! they's the one who used their silver tongue to lull me into a state of trust. Then, when my defenses were down, they beat the containment code out of me!

54dd4f1c653937e81300425c_6.original:
{{GM}}A raise of his hand, and the Talon steps forward.{{/GM}}

Talon, this miscreant has distracted us from our meal. And now, I'm afraid, it's grown cold. We must repay $(l.him) in kind. Let $(l.his) corpse cool out back when you're done.
54dd4f1c653937e81300425c_6.spoken: Talon, this miscreant has distracted us from our meal. And now, I'm afraid, it's grown cold. We must repay them in kind. Let their corpse cool out back when you're done.

550b0530306364f8110000d8_92.spoken: You, are a real stand up individual. So what now? Do you want us to leave, or can we stick with you until we get to the MTR station?

5589ee2a303031b009007f83_1.original:
Absolutely. We have no problems here. But my office rarely does - our Sales team is Tsang's top performer.

The Contracts & Acquisitions team to the south of us, however... I'd check in with them, $(l.sir). They're bound to be mired in technical problems, as one would expect from professional slackers.
5589ee2a303031b009007f83_1.spoken: Absolutely. We have no problems here. But my office rarely does - our Sales team is Tsang's top performer. The Contracts & Acquisitions team to the south of us, however... I'd check in with them. They're bound to be mired in technical problems, as one would expect from professional slackers.

5589ee2a303031b009007f83_14.original:
{{GM}}Her voice rises.{{/GM}}

Everyone, this $(l.man) has just informed me that there's a maintenance emergency in our area. I need all of you to drop what you're doing and leave so $(l.he) can make $(l.hisher) repairs.
5589ee2a303031b009007f83_14.spoken: Everyone, this man has just informed me that there's a maintenance emergency in our area. I need all of you to drop what you're doing and leave so they can make their repairs.

560c5be2643661ac15004d4e_17.original:
There. You've got your money, now go away.

Leave us to our fuckin' work, $(l.man).
560c5be2643661ac15004d4e_17.spoken: There. You've got your money, now go away. Leave us to our fuckin' work, man.

560c5be2643661ac15004d4e_94.spoken: I'm done talking to you, man. Walk away and let us get back to our business. Go on! Git!

5589ef11303031b009007f94_18.original:
{{GM}}The manager's eyes light up at your approach.{{/GM}}

Thank you again, $(l.sir). If there's anything my team can do to help you in the future, you let me know.
5589ef11303031b009007f94_18.spoken: Thank you again. If there's anything my team can do to help you in the future, you let me know.

55a59c51306364900e0061c3_6.original:
{{GM}}Ducé raises a hand to you as you approach.{{/GM}}

Hey, $(l.name). Any chance we'll get any jobs running against Shiawase?
55a59c51306364900e0061c3_6.spoken: Hey. Any chance we'll get any jobs running against Shiawase?

5612c1fd306364d414004eae_10.original:
She's not crazy, $(l.name). Fizz here's been the lucky recipient of a Shiawase neuroimplant. Nasty little thing; it rewires the brain to react positively to high-stress situations.

Thing makes it so that a carrier won't break under torture or run away from a fight - they enjoy it too much.
5612c1fd306364d414004eae_10.spoken: She's not crazy. Fizz here's been the lucky recipient of a Shiawase neuroimplant. Nasty little thing; it rewires the brain to react positively to high-stress situations. Thing makes it so that a carrier won't break under torture or run away from a fight - they enjoy it too much.

56156cc0306364981c00349a_11.original:
She's not crazy, $(l.name). Fizz here's been the lucky recipient of a Shiawase neuroimplant. Nasty little thing; it rewires the brain to react positively to high-stress situations.

Thing makes it so that a carrier won't break under torture or run away from a fight. They enjoy it too much.
56156cc0306364981c00349a_11.spoken: She's not crazy. Fizz here's been the lucky recipient of a Shiawase neuroimplant. Nasty little thing; it rewires the brain to react positively to high-stress situations. Thing makes it so that a carrier won't break under torture or run away from a fight. They enjoy it too much.

56156cc0306364981c00349a_41.original:
She's not crazy, $(l.name). Fizz here's been the lucky recipient of a Shiawase neuroimplant. Nasty little thing; it rewires the brain to react positively to high-stress situations.

Thing makes it so that a carrier won't break under torture or run away from a fight - they enjoy it too much.
56156cc0306364981c00349a_41.spoken: She's not crazy. Fizz here's been the lucky recipient of a Shiawase neuroimplant. Nasty little thing; it rewires the brain to react positively to high-stress situations. Thing makes it so that a carrier won't break under torture or run away from a fight - they enjoy it too much.

56393981306364d40d007911_8.spoken: Oh, shut *up,* Keenan. Let them speak for themself. Go on, stranger. Tell us what you need.

56393981306364d40d007911_17.spoken: OW, FUCK. I saw them this time, you limpdick!

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_63.original:
I'll tell you.

{{GM}}The younger man's voice cuts through the din like a razor, and the elders fall silent. He turns to you and he locks his eyes  - dark orbs that burn with piercing scrutiny - onto yours.

He nods, and returns his gaze to the Go board.{{/GM}}

I believe you're trustworthy. Please, $(l.name), make yourself comfortable. I'll share my dream with you.
54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_63.spoken: I'll tell you. I believe you're trustworthy. Please, make yourself comfortable. I'll share my dream with you.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_117.spoken: Excuse us. Our friend is tired. These dreams have taken a toll on all of us. Please come back some other time.

54dbe9e13030316c15006ca2_125.spoken: I'm in agreement with Gin. You've gone too far. I suggest you take a moment to collect yourself.

54beba923063641c1f0019a1_0.original:
{{GM}}The ragged waiter manages to straighten up as you approach.{{/GM}}

Good evening, $(l.sir). Welcome to the Veranda at the Repulse Bay. How may I be of service?
54beba923063641c1f0019a1_0.spoken: Good evening. Welcome to the Veranda at the Repulse Bay. How may I be of service?

54beba923063641c1f0019a1_47.original: Good evening, $(l.sir). Welcome to the Veranda at... Oh, it's you again. What do you need this time?
54beba923063641c1f0019a1_47.spoken: Good evening. Welcome to the Veranda at... Oh, it's you again. What do you need this time?

560032c4626632e015004414_0.spoken: Hey! I got news about that friend of mine... you know, the one who was under the weather. He's been stabilized, thanks to you. Looks like he's gonna pull through.

54bd87f83063648803001820_1.spoken: Good evening. I'm sorry, I don't believe we've been formally introduced. I'm Neville Ma, owner of Yellow Springs Studios.

54bd87f83063648803001820_17.original:
Ah. That was... very careless of him. He should not have been discussing my private purchases without my permission.

I am sorry, $(l.honorific) Argyle. I do not feel comfortable discussing this matter, especially not in the midst of such a large crowd. Perhaps another time.
54bd87f83063648803001820_17.spoken: Ah. That was... very careless of him. He should not have been discussing my private purchases without my permission. I am sorry, Argyle. I do not feel comfortable discussing this matter, especially not in the midst of such a large crowd. Perhaps another time.

54bd87f83063648803001820_33.spoken: Hello again, Argent. What can I do for you?

552c2a54306364300300505f_4.original:
$+(l.man), are you deaf? What the hell did I tell you? No, you goddamn well can't wander around our turf. 

{{GM}}The ganger shakes her head, mumbling something about idiots with no memory.{{/GM}}
552c2a54306364300300505f_4.spoken: man, are you deaf? What the hell did I tell you? No, you goddamn well can't wander around our turf.

569ecd67306364a81f00521a_7.original:
{{GM}}Alpha lets out a rough cackle.{{/GM}}

$+(l.man), you don't know the half of it. You tally up the runs I've been on, I think I might have seen more stuff than even FastJack. I might not be as old as him, but I think that I take jobs a lot more regularly than he does.
569ecd67306364a81f00521a_7.spoken: man, you don't know the half of it. You tally up the runs I've been on, I think I might have seen more stuff than even FastJack. I might not be as old as him, but I think that I take jobs a lot more regularly than he does.
