{{GM}}A timid woman looks at you from her station.{{/GM}}

Excuse me, $(l.sir). The Tsang employees on this floor may only be seen through a pre-approved appointment. Do you... Do you have an appointment?
55860475303031b027004d1b_1.spoken: Excuse me. The Tsang employees on this floor may only be seen through a pre-approved appointment. Do you... Do you have an appointment?

55860475303031b027004d1b_5.spoken: You would do that? I'm up for my quarterly review next week and I'm *really* hoping to go from facilitator four to facilitator five... A positive mention from you will help - I'm sure of it. Oh, sorry, I'm holding you up. Good luck with your report!

55860475303031b027004d1b_6.original:
{{GM}}The receptionist whips toward the guard.{{/GM}}

Pardon me, mister security guard - yes, you - may I please get your opinion on something? It seems to me that this $(l.man) should have a security escort if $(l.he)'s doing a security sweep. Is that correct?
55860475303031b027004d1b_6.spoken: Pardon me, mister security guard - yes, you - may I please get your opinion on something? It seems to me that this man should have a security escort if they's doing a security sweep. Is that correct?

{{GM}}A timid woman looks at you from her station.{{/GM}}

Excuse me, $(l.sir). The Tsang employees on this floor may only be seen through a pre-approved appointment. Not even maintenance is exempt. Do you... Do you have an appointment?
55860475303031b027004d1b_8.spoken: Excuse me. The Tsang employees on this floor may only be seen through a pre-approved appointment. Not even maintenance is exempt. Do you... Do you have an appointment?

What have we here? A curious little pest, come looking for things that don't concern $(l.him). What do we do with pests, Galina?
55244c803063647812004d1f_6.spoken: What have we here? A curious little pest, come looking for things that don't concern them. What do we do with pests, Galina?

55244c803063647812004d1f_24.original:
{{GM}}Vasilisa shoots Galina a sidelong glance.{{/GM}}

$+(l.he)'s right, Galina. Andrey would have our heads if we had to break cover before the shipment was ready.
55244c803063647812004d1f_24.spoken: they's right, Galina. Andrey would have our heads if we had to break cover before the shipment was ready.

55244c803063647812004d1f_28.original: $+(l.he)'s right, Galina. You know how sounds can echo through these tunnels.
55244c803063647812004d1f_28.spoken: they's right, Galina. You know how sounds can echo through these tunnels.

55244c803063647812004d1f_40.spoken: You think we'll let you do that? You seemed smarter than that. Kill them.

555a76a5323431800800153f_22.original:
{{GM}}Her lip curls, parting in the center.{{/GM}}

Yeah, we're backing down. For now. But you watch your back, $(l.man).
555a76a5323431800800153f_22.spoken: Yeah, we're backing down. For now. But you watch your back, man.

555a76a5323431800800153f_27.original: Walk away, $(l.man). And don't let us see you here again!
555a76a5323431800800153f_27.spoken: Walk away, man. And don't let us see you here again!

555a76a5323431800800153f_28.spoken: You're making a big mistake, man. Lucky for you I'm busy. You know what's good for you, you'll turn and run, *right now.* Your call.

555a76a5323431800800153f_36.spoken: Then why are you wasting my time? Get out of my hair, man!

54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_49.original:
{{GM}}The caller's expression is pleasant, but there is a level of unspoken menace in his eyes. The glint of killer.{{/GM}}

Good evening, $(l.name). My name is Hwang Jae-Min, and I represent the Blue Heaven Seoulpa Ring. I've just become aware that you are in possession of data and tissue samples from Project Omega Sequence #358 G. I would like those samples, and I am willing to pay you for them.
54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_49.spoken: Good evening. My name is Hwang Jae-Min, and I represent the Blue Heaven Seoulpa Ring. I've just become aware that you are in possession of data and tissue samples from Project Omega Sequence #358 G. I would like those samples, and I am willing to pay you for them.

54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_50.original:
Quite frankly, your employer doesn't know the first thing about Matrix security. We've hacked his commlink and his rental car. I simply re-dialed you once you called him.

My apologies for such an unorthodox introduction. A $(l.man) of your stature should be afforded more respect, but time is short.
54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_50.spoken: Quite frankly, your employer doesn't know the first thing about Matrix security. We've hacked his commlink and his rental car. I simply re-dialed you once you called him. My apologies for such an unorthodox introduction. A man of your stature should be afforded more respect, but time is short.

54dbef30653937cc15006dd1_5.original:
{{GM}}He slams back a shot and hoots with satisfaction.{{/GM}}

Much appreciated. Thank you, my good $(l.man).
54dbef30653937cc15006dd1_5.spoken: Much appreciated. Thank you, my good man.

5525b55b30636400170026dc_119.original:
Thank you, Porter. 

You disappoint me, $(l.name). You're obviously a fool and a poor choice for hired help. I regret ever contacting you.
5525b55b30636400170026dc_119.spoken: Thank you, Porter. You disappoint me. You're obviously a fool and a poor choice for hired help. I regret ever contacting you.

56182456306364e415006ab9_31.spoken: Is that right? You owe me fifty nuyen, Hwang - they actually bought it! All personnel, open fire!

54bd54a5306364641300167d_17.original: So, $(l.honorific) Argyle, tell me... what brings you here if you're not interested in these sorts of affairs?
54bd54a5306364641300167d_17.spoken: So, Argyle, tell me... what brings you here if you're not interested in these sorts of affairs?

54bd54a5306364641300167d_22.spoken: Welcome back, Argyle. To what do I owe the pleasure?

{{GM}}His brusque demeanor relaxes.{{/GM}}

I suppose I can make time for a fan all the way from... where is it you said? Seattle? Quite the trip you've made.

What is it you need, $(l.sir)?
54dbb4eb653937cc150069a2_11.spoken: Ah. A fellow epicure? I suppose I can make time for a fan all the way from... where is it you said? Seattle? Quite the trip you've made. What is it you need?

Better keep your dog over there on a shorter leash, $(l.man), or he's likely to get put down.
550a053a306364fc1b000156_6.spoken: Better keep your dog over there on a shorter leash, man, or he's likely to get put down.

Leave $(l.him) alone, Matchstick. $+(l.he)'s with us.

"Merchant," $(l.he) says. That crook didn't so much as leave as he was chased off by Kindly. No sales permit. Not a big loss, though - the local shops have way better stuff than that smalltime hustler.

Tsang's big in Hong Kong and getting bigger. She's already on the Executive Council and is a front-runner for the next Chairperson position.

55aff6d0306364c414007270_17.original:
{{GM}}$(scene.global_AljernonName) inclines his head politely.{{/GM}}

Hello again, my friend. Was there something else I could assist you with?
55aff6d0306364c414007270_17.spoken: Hello again, my friend. Was there something else I could assist you with?

New here? You must be joking, $(l.man). You've been on that kiosk for twenty minutes now!
5570e6b6323431541e005e1d_7.spoken: New here? You must be joking, man. You've been on that kiosk for twenty minutes now!

But $(l.he)'s been hogging the kiosk for nearly a half an hour already--

{{GM}}He brings up his wrist to stare at the screen, a frown etched onto his face.{{/GM}}

But $(l.he)'s been hogging the kiosk for nearly a half an hour already--

5570e6b6323431541e005e1d_95.spoken: You didn't read the instructions? You must be joking, man. You've been on that kiosk for twenty minutes now!

564d03236266328c12006ba2_11.original:
Don't try to fight it, $(l.name). You'll only hurt yourself. We all know what has to happen here, but there's no reason why it can't be quick and painless.

Just look at Fiona... she isn't struggling. She's accepted it.
564d03236266328c12006ba2_11.spoken: Don't try to fight it. You'll only hurt yourself. We all know what has to happen here, but there's no reason why it can't be quick and painless. Just look at Fiona... she isn't struggling. She's accepted it.

54d3f034323437f057003738_16.spoken: man, you don't listen, do you? Now I'm gonna have to get my clothes all bloody.

54f6495b30636444130071ba_0.spoken: Sorry. The elevator systems are experiencing a temporary interruption of service. Until they're back up, I'm afraid you'll have to use the stairs.

54f6495b30636444130071ba_8.original: Sorry, $(l.sir). The elevator systems are experiencing a temporary interruption of service. Until they're back up, I'm afraid you'll have to use the stairs.
54f6495b30636444130071ba_8.spoken: Sorry. The elevator systems are experiencing a temporary interruption of service. Until they're back up, I'm afraid you'll have to use the stairs.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_8.spoken: I think that they's right. Villiers is no fool. He has to have some sort of ulterior motive for plundering the Fuchi coffers. This wouldn't have gotten out at all if he didn't have some reason to want it to.

556d09653234312c01003b35_12.original:
{{GM}}He raises an eyebrow, his curiosity piqued.{{/GM}}

A gala event, you say? In that case, please forgive me. I hadn't realized that I was speaking with a $(l.man) of quality.
556d09653234312c01003b35_12.spoken: A gala event, you say? In that case, please forgive me. I hadn't realized that I was speaking with a man of quality.

54da97d0653937300b002dc0_0.original:
{{GM}}A waitress swamped with orders is caught unaware by your approach.{{/GM}}

 Oh! W-welcome to the Shangri-La, $(l.sir).

54da97d0653937300b002dc0_2.original:
{{GM}}A loud exhalation escapes through her nose, and her eyes dart toward the kitchen. She musters an empty smile and nods in false hospitality.{{/GM}}

Absolutely, $(l.sir). What is it you need?
54da97d0653937300b002dc0_2.spoken: Absolutely. What is it you need?

54da97d0653937300b002dc0_12.original:
Wish I could help more, $(l.sir), but I need to place these orders. Enjoy your meal.

{{GM}}She darts around you and hurriedly resumes her duties, leaving you no time to respond.{{/GM}}
54da97d0653937300b002dc0_12.spoken: Wish I could help more, but I need to place these orders. Enjoy your meal.

54f8ce523430612c15004d70_7.spoken: Right. Go ahead and grab your new creds at the check-in terminal. Have a good night.

54fe2ee0343061c8130053e9_3.original: Just a moment, $(l.sir). The scanner says your credentials didn't take. Let me see your ID.
54fe2ee0343061c8130053e9_3.spoken: Just a moment. The scanner says your credentials didn't take. Let me see your ID.

54fe2ee0343061c8130053e9_4.original:
{{GM}}The attendant's eyes skim your card, then go wide.{{/GM}}

Trespasser alert! Guards, detain $(l.him) - this ID's a fake!
54fe2ee0343061c8130053e9_4.spoken: Trespasser alert! Guards, detain them - this ID's a fake!

54fe2ee0343061c8130053e9_5.spoken: Right, of course. Well, go to the terminal and re-up your creds. Even with the pass, you know I can't let you through.

556e0b27323431681a000f44_44.original:
Look, $(l.he)'s back.

What do you want? You're interrupting a serious conversation.
556e0b27323431681a000f44_44.spoken: Look, they's back. What do you want? You're interrupting a serious conversation.

561304f56436613816004e54_12.original: See? This $(l.guy) agrees. It isn't safe here for us. The police will protect us if we ask them to.
561304f56436613816004e54_12.spoken: See? This person agrees. It isn't safe here for us. The police will protect us if we ask them to.

55383ac63234379836002154_0.original:
Oh, I know I got what you need! As soon as you walked in that door, I was thinking, I know exactly what that $(l.man) is lookin' for. No doubts, no questions.

It's you. You are that $(l.man). The one with the NEED. The HUNGER.
55383ac63234379836002154_0.spoken: Oh, I know I got what you need! As soon as you walked in that door, I was thinking, I know exactly what that man is lookin' for. No doubts, no questions. It's you. You are that man. The one with the NEED. The HUNGER.

560dba1d643661e016004ecf_3.spoken: Later, constable. We'll catch the looters when we're done here. But look at this man's clothes, their gear. These people are armed criminals, and they're breaking curfew. You have your orders.

560dba1d643661e016004ecf_7.spoken: Later, constable. We can go cordon off the bodies when we're done here. But look at this man's clothes, their gear. These people are armed criminals, and they're breaking curfew. You have your orders.

560dba1d643661e016004ecf_9.spoken: Later, constable. If there are gangers out there, we'll catch them when we continue our sweep. But look at this man's clothes, their gear. These people are armed criminals, and they're breaking curfew. You have your orders.

560dba1d643661e016004ecf_12.spoken: Save your breath, constable. Look at this man's clothes, their gear. These people are armed criminals, and they're breaking curfew. You have your orders.

566f64316436613815007b72_3.spoken: Drink order? We'll be coming by with the cart momentarily, but if you'd like to purchase an alcoholic beverage, I can take your credstick now. We have beer, wine, and spirits.

Very good, $(l.sir).

Yes, $(l.sir). Timmy will be by with the cart in a jiff.
566f64316436613815007b72_5.spoken: Yes. Timmy will be by with the cart in a jiff.

{{GM}}She beams at you.{{/GM}}

You're a very generous $(l.man)! I'll head back and let Timmy know... he should be by with the cart in a jiff!
566f64316436613815007b72_13.spoken: You're a very generous man! I'll head back and let Timmy know... he should be by with the cart in a jiff!

5525b2a13063644415002071_0.spoken: Ho there. You look like a man who understands the value of self-defense. Breaker Hui, at your service - and I can promise you I can help you defend yourself. What do you say? Want to take a look?

564cf2b66436611c0f00324f_30.original: Gun $(l.him) down, men! $+(l.he) doesn't walk out of here alive!
564cf2b66436611c0f00324f_30.spoken: Gun them down, men! they doesn't walk out of here alive!

5525b45c30636400170026af_0.original:
Welcome, $(l.sir)! Welcome to Kwok Atelier, home of the finest clothing in Whampoa Garden. I am the owner, master tailor Wing-Kei Kwok.
How may I serve you today?
5525b45c30636400170026af_0.spoken: Welcome! Welcome to Kwok Atelier, home of the finest clothing in Whampoa Garden. I am the owner, master tailor Wing-Kei Kwok. How may I serve you today?

555a61da323431501900164e_8.original:
$(l.FirstName)... you need to clear me a...p-path to the sarcophagus... that surrounds the Fortune Engine. It will be at the center of a-all of this.

Please... please help me fix this. I can't do it by myself.
555a61da323431501900164e_8.spoken: Listen... you need to clear me a...p-path to the sarcophagus... that surrounds the Fortune Engine. It will be at the center of a-all of this. Please... please help me fix this. I can't do it by myself.

54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_22.original:
{{GM}}The caller's face is obscured and their voice digitized, but can still feel a sense of cold threat from the caller.{{/GM}}

$(l.name), you are in possession of data and tissue samples from Project Omega Sequence #358 G. Those samples are not your property, and if you attempt to keep them, we will be forced to take action.
54da5dae306364a88e0035e1_22.spoken: you are in possession of data and tissue samples from Project Omega Sequence #358 G. Those samples are not your property, and if you attempt to keep them, we will be forced to take action.

54d50af63234372c68007117_4.original:
Business is good here, $(l.man). Real good. 

Yeah, it's disgusting, but you go where the market is.
54d50af63234372c68007117_4.spoken: Business is good here, man. Real good. Yeah, it's disgusting, but you go where the market is.

54e2771c653937bc1600027f_7.spoken: Shit - a runner? Don't let them take off with Rooster! GET 'EM!

56393981306364d40d007911_26.original:
Oh shit, *ohhh shit.*

$+(l.he) looks like $(l.he)'ll do it, man. And then I'll be next!

Just give $(l.him) the goddamn code, Francis! I need my fingers!
56393981306364d40d007911_26.spoken: Oh shit, *ohhh shit.* they looks like they'll do it, man. And then I'll be next! Just give them the goddamn code, Francis! I need my fingers!

54c2c193323437f024003921_37.original: Our sources report that Seattle natives Duncan Wu and $(l.fullname), along with their Hong Kong-based accomplices, are still at large. They are well armed and should be considered extremely dangerous.
54c2c193323437f024003921_37.spoken: Our sources report that Seattle native Duncan Wu and an unidentified associate, along with their Hong Kong-based accomplices, are still at large. They are well armed and should be considered extremely dangerous.

54fe411b343061c813005572_7.original: Now's our chance, $(l.name). Security's tied up here. Let's head upstairs.
54fe411b343061c813005572_7.spoken: Now's our chance. Security's tied up here. Let's head upstairs.

54d96ae73030316814006f45_78.original:
Wu's cabin appears to be the only clean spot on the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName). His equipment is neatly laid out on his bedding, grouped by type, arranged just so.

He's currently in the process of cleaning his weapon with meticulous care.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_78.spoken: Wu's cabin appears to be the only clean spot on the Bolthole. His equipment is neatly laid out on his bedding, grouped by type, arranged just so. He's currently in the process of cleaning his weapon with meticulous care.

54d96c983030316814006fac_136.original:
You focus on the enormous manipulator arms that you saw earlier. They're bulky, industrial things, dented from years of heavy use.

Each arm has been fitted with at least a dozen different welders, soldering guns, extruders, and metal fabrication tools.

You've seen machinery like this in factories before, but they look terribly out of place in the $(story.global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName)'s cramped engine room.
54d96c983030316814006fac_136.spoken: You focus on the enormous manipulator arms that you saw earlier. They're bulky, industrial things, dented from years of heavy use. Each arm has been fitted with at least a dozen different welders, soldering guns, extruders, and metal fabrication tools. You've seen machinery like this in factories before, but they look terribly out of place in the Bolthole's cramped engine room.

54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_1.original: A blinking message in the upper-right corner notifies you that you have $(scene.numUnreadMessages) unread messages.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_1.spoken: A blinking message in the upper-right corner notifies you that you have unread messages.

54fe2ee0343061c8130053e9_10.original:
Multipersonnel pass accepted. Access granted.

GREETING: Welcome, $(l.honorific) C. Pang. Have a nice evening.
54fe2ee0343061c8130053e9_10.spoken: Multipersonnel pass accepted. Access granted. GREETING: Welcome, C. Pang. Have a nice evening.

553f0154303031700f005028_1.original: The original name has been sloppily painted over with black paint. Freshly painted characters have been recently done in bold brush strokes and read "$(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName)".
553f0154303031700f005028_1.spoken: The original name has been sloppily painted over with black paint. Freshly painted characters have been recently done in bold brush strokes and read "Bolthole".

5543c201323431601600390f_10.original: The bloodied local tosses $(s.hisher) gun aside and raises a pair of trembling hands. $+(s.hisher) eyes have gone wide with terror.
5543c201323431601600390f_10.spoken: The bloodied local tosses their gun aside and raises a pair of trembling hands. Their eyes have gone wide with terror.

555f608e6236667431006bac_46.original:
You turn to head back toward the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) - toward your teammates and the relative comfort of your new home.

And that's when the first twinge tickles your chest. Lets you know that something's coming.
555f608e6236667431006bac_46.spoken: You turn to head back toward the Bolthole - toward your teammates and the relative comfort of your new home. And that's when the first twinge tickles your chest. Lets you know that something's coming.

55a928d46236667419006738_1.original:
You drop your head onto the pillow and haul the rough naval blanket over you. The $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) rocks like a cradle and, moments later, you are wrapped in the comforting arms of sleep.

There are no nightmares.
55a928d46236667419006738_1.spoken: You drop your head onto the pillow and haul the rough naval blanket over you. The Bolthole rocks like a cradle and, moments later, you are wrapped in the comforting arms of sleep. There are no nightmares.

55a94da3623666741900929c_0.original:
The deck of the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) is quiet. The boat feels much larger - and emptier - than it did a few hours ago.

There is no sound, save for the creaking of wooden planks and the distant sloshing of water against the side of the hull.
55a94da3623666741900929c_0.spoken: The deck of the Bolthole is quiet. The boat feels much larger - and emptier - than it did a few hours ago. There is no sound, save for the creaking of wooden planks and the distant sloshing of water against the side of the hull.

55a94da3623666741900929c_38.original:
The scene on the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) is quiet, save for the sounds of eating. Raymond and your crew are crowded around Gobbet's electric hotplate. Her cast iron pot simmers on top and they hold bowls of soup in their hands. You recognize the smell: chicken-style soya broth, elbow macaroni, tinned "ham," and a heaping scoop of egg-flavored mycoprotein.

Raymond eats heartily. It may be the first meal he's had in days.
55a94da3623666741900929c_38.spoken: The scene on the Bolthole is quiet, save for the sounds of eating. Raymond and your crew are crowded around Gobbet's electric hotplate. Her cast iron pot simmers on top and they hold bowls of soup in their hands. You recognize the smell: chicken-style soya broth, elbow macaroni, tinned "ham," and a heaping scoop of egg-flavored mycoprotein. Raymond eats heartily. It may be the first meal he's had in days.

5604a7a9643661740e0013c2_7.original:
At the edge of the impound yard, tethered to the docks, the rusting hulk of the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) rises above its surroundings.

Heavy chains snake up from secure moorings on the docks to heavy maglocks that clamp down on the vessel's hull. She isn't going anywhere.

560d71ff306364c41800495f_3.original: $(l.name) grabs a vial and places in their pocket. Hopefully it will be worth something to someone.
560d71ff306364c41800495f_3.spoken: You grab a vial and place it in your pocket. Hopefully it will be worth something to someone.

560d71ff306364c41800495f_8.original: $(l.name) reaches in, finds the appropriate vial, and pockets it.
560d71ff306364c41800495f_8.spoken: You reach in, find the appropriate vial, and pocket it.

563fe5d93063641815000704_2.original:
A watchful guard commander - a mage, judging by the talismans on her lapel - scans the faces of the people in the plaza. As $(l.name) approaches, she looks over.

After a split second before her eyes go wide, and she begins shouting.
563fe5d93063641815000704_2.spoken: A watchful guard commander - a mage, judging by the talismans on her lapel - scans the faces of the people in the plaza. As you approach, she looks over. After a split second, her eyes go wide, and she begins shouting.

564cf2b66436611c0f00324f_29.original:
You're the one who's getting hurt. Should've complied while you could.

Gun $(l.him) down, men. $+(l.he) doesn't walk out of here alive.
564cf2b66436611c0f00324f_29.spoken: You're the one who's getting hurt. Should've complied while you could. Gun them down, men. they doesn't walk out of here alive.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_1.original:
Your PDA buzzes. The shrill sound reverberates down the empty halls of the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName).

It's Qiu.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_1.spoken: Your PDA buzzes. The shrill sound reverberates down the empty halls of the Bolthole. It's Qiu.

565f3a8c62663208210043f1_2.original:
The $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) stands empty, just as it always has since you made your deal with Qian Ya.

You take a moment to enjoy the stillness, then carry on.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_2.spoken: The Bolthole stands empty, just as it always has since you made your deal with Qian Ya. You take a moment to enjoy the stillness, then carry on.

566f69ef6436613815007c49_0.original: The $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) motors along, cutting through the choppy waves of the South China Sea. The coarse sound of Captain Jomo's voice echoes down from the wheelhouse; he's singing a crude Indonesian sea shanty, and in between verses he barks with laughter.
566f69ef6436613815007c49_0.spoken: The Bolthole motors along, cutting through the choppy waves of the South China Sea. The coarse sound of Captain Jomo's voice echoes down from the wheelhouse; he's singing a crude Indonesian sea shanty, and in between verses he barks with laughter.

566f69ef6436613815007c49_72.original:
You're on your way back to Seattle, for better or worse. Sixteen days on the open ocean.

Pacific crossings can be hazardous in the Sixth World, even for commercial shipping fleets and their escorts. All manner of toxic spirits and Awakened sea life prey on oceangoing vessels, and the $(story.Global_HK_Hub_SafeBoatName) wouldn't stand much of a chance against a hungry kraken or Megalodon. You've got nothing to worry about, though; your deal with Qian Ya will keep you perfectly safe.

Pacific crossings can be hazardous in the Sixth World, even for commercial shipping fleets and their escorts. All manner of toxic spirits and Awakened sea life prey on oceangoing vessels, and the Bolthole wouldn't stand much of a chance against a hungry kraken or Megalodon. You've got nothing to worry about, though; your deal with Qian Ya will keep you perfectly safe.
